title: 第二天工廠晉篩選組辦公室
body:
Lawrence Chang: I said I'm OK!
Lawrence Chang: Oh, good day, Jason!
Thought: Lawrence? I thought he's hurt pretty badly yesterday?
<<#Simple(99999)>>
->I thought you were hurt pretty bad.
    <<Set($DLState,主角瞬移靠上前)>>
    Lawrence Chang: Not at all. Just a flesh wound.
->Hi.
    <<Set($DLState,主角瞬移靠上前)>>
    Lawrence Chang: Haha, hi!
    Jeff Wu: Save your breath.
<<#EndSimple>>
Jeff Wu: You'd better be OK. Yesterday you were like bleeding yourself out!;<< Play (吳晉峰, MBU_吳晉峰_側站插腰看內) >>
Lawrence Chang: I'm tough!;<< Play (張隆生, MBU_安全帽_斜坐左看) >>
Tyler Cao: Well, he knows himself best...;<< Play (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_工廠_看內) >>
Lawrence Chang: And Tyler knows me.;<< Play (張隆生, MBU_安全帽_斜坐左看轉右) >>
Jeff Wu: Come on, I'm really worried about you.;<< Play (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_工廠_看內返回) >>
Lawrence Chang: I'm really, absolutely OK, man!;<< Play (張隆生, MBU_安全帽_斜坐右看轉左) >>
Lawrence Chang: Hey, how is the nutjob doing now?
Lawrence Chang: I thought the cops took over?
Tyler Cao: Yeah. They had him arrested, and found out his motive.;<< Play (吳晉峰, MBU_吳晉峰_側站插腰看內返回) >>;<< Play (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_工廠_看內) >>;<< Play (張隆生, MBU_安全帽_斜坐左看轉右) >>
Tyler Cao: His family died while contributing. An accident. He was here to take revenge.
Jeff Wu: So it was true...;<< Play (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_工廠_看內返回) >>
Lawrence Chang: What was true?;<< Play (張隆生, MBU_安全帽_斜坐右看轉左) >>
Lawrence Chang: Hold on. You mean, juicers dying on the farm is what, normal?
Jeff Wu: Actually, I can't say for sure...;<< Play (吳晉峰, MBU_吳晉峰_側站插腰返回) >>
Lawrence Chang: Why? You've been working here for years, no?
Tyler Cao: Accidents happen in the Cellar. We at Screening don't know anything about it.;<< Play (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_工廠_看內) >>;<< Play (張隆生, MBU_安全帽_斜坐左看轉右) >>;<< Play (曹泰銘, MBU_曹泰銘_斜坐低頭) >>
<<#Simple(6)>>
->Sounds weird to me.
->There must be at least rumors?
    Lawrence Chang: Yeah. People died. How come no one talks about it at all?
    Tyler Cao: Because of contracts and confidentiality clauses.
->...
<<#EndSimple>>
Lawrence Chang: What?
Tyler Cao: The company does not allow unapproved communications between divisions.
Lawrence Chang: But eventually, someone has to talk, right? Family of the victim? Like this time...;<< Play (吳晉峰, MBU_吳晉峰_側站看內) >>
Jeff Wu: Usually not.;<< Play (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_工廠_看內返回) >>
Jeff Wu: The flop contribution contract has accidental death indemnity and confidentiality clauses in it.
Tyler Cao: Simply put, the farm shuts them up before anything happens.;<< Play (吳晉峰, MBU_吳晉峰_側站看內返回) >>;<< Play (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_工廠_看內) >>
Thought: Airtight and very practical. I can't believe Eva Yeh approves it, though, with all her talk about juicer rights.
<<#Simple(6)>>
->Ms. Yeh approves this?
    Jeff Wu: No. It's standard procedure made by HQ.;<< Play (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_工廠_看內返回) >>;<< Play (張隆生, MBU_安全帽_斜坐右看轉左) >>
    Jeff Wu: Auntie has been trying to change these rules...
    Tyler Cao: Although they wouldn't allow Vision's reputation to be tarnished without a proper reason.;<< Play (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_工廠_看內) >>;<< Play (張隆生, MBU_安全帽_斜坐左看轉右) >>
    <<#GoTo(@敗壞名聲已經講過哩)>>
->It's very inhumane, but practical.
    Jeff Wu: ...Yeah.
->...
<<#EndSimple>>
Tyler Cao: They wouldn't allow Vision's reputation to be tarnished without a proper reason.;<< Play (曹泰銘, MBU_曹泰銘_斜坐低頭返回) >>
<<@敗壞名聲已經講過哩>>
Lawrence Chang: Proper reason!?;<< Play (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_工廠_看內返回) >>;<< Play (曹泰銘, MBU_曹泰銘_斜坐左看) >>
Lawrence Chang: How about to not become a heartless bastard? Is that proper enough?;<< Play (吳晉峰, MBU_吳晉峰_側站低頭) >>
Tyler Cao: ...;<< Play (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_工廠_看內) >>
<<#Simple(6)>>
->I'm not convinced. No one tried to bring the story to the press?
    Jeff Wu: Some probably did. The story wouldn't see publication, anyway.
    Jeff Wu: Because Vision is a key investor behind many mainstream media outlets.
    <<#Simple(6)>>
    ->What about smaller outlets? Tabloids?
        Tyler Cao: I see where you're coming from. Stories like these make good click baits.;<< Play (曹泰銘, MBU_曹泰銘_斜坐左看轉右) >>
        Tyler Cao: But even tabloids depend on social networks. Almost all social networks use Vision's content recommendation algorithms.
        Tyler Cao: In other words, no one can afford to rub Vision the wrong way.
        Tyler Cao: If the situation calls for it, Vision could wipe the existence of a media outlet from all social networks overnight.;<< Play (曹泰銘, MBU_曹泰銘_斜坐右看轉左) >>
    ->...
    <<#EndSimple>>
->...
<<#EndSimple>>
Lawrence Chang: Okay... The thing is...;<< PlayUntil (吳晉峰, MBU_吳晉峰_側站低頭返回) >>;<< Play (吳晉峰, MBU_吳晉峰_側站看內) >>;<< Play (張隆生, MBU_安全帽_斜坐右看返回) >>
Lawrence Chang: Why are these people dying in the Cellar anyway?;<< Play (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_工廠_看內返回) >>;<< Play (張隆生, MBU_安全帽_斜坐低頭) >>
Tyler Cao: Ask Ops.
Lawrence Chang: ...
Lawrence Chang: Sounds to me like they're a bunch of monkeys who can't do their job right.
Jeff Wu: More or less, based on my personal experience.

Tyler Cao: Talking about Ops. Jason, aren't you going there for field practice today?;<< Play (吳晉峰, MBU_吳晉峰_側站看內返回) >>;<< Play (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_工廠_看內) >>;<< Play (曹泰銘, MBU_曹泰銘_斜坐左看轉右) >>
<<#Simple(99999)>>
->I am. Now I'm looking for Wayne or Ms. Yeh to take me down there.
    Jeff Wu: I have no idea where they are.
    Tyler Cao: Probably busy taking care of yesterday's mess.
->After all this talk, I don't want to go to Ops anymore.
    Tyler Cao: You'd better go. This is about your career, man.
<<#EndSimple>>
Lawrence Chang: So, no one knows the whereabouts of Wayne?;<< Play (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_工廠_看內返回) >>;<< Play (張隆生, MBU_安全帽_斜坐低頭返回) >>
<<Set($DLState,廖哥一起來看隆生傷勢)>>
//廖哥進場
George Liao: They will be here soon.;<< Play (張隆生, MBU_安全帽_斜坐右看) >>
George Liao: Wayne and Ms. Yeh went to visit the family of the colleague who passed away.;<< Play (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_工廠_看外) >>
Jeff Wu: ...;<< Play (吳晉峰, MBU_吳晉峰_側站低頭) >>
Jeff Wu: I can't imagine how they feel, seeing their son off to work and never coming back again...;<< Play (張隆生, MBU_安全帽_斜坐右看轉左) >>
Jeff Wu: Situations like these make me think...;<< Play (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_工廠_看外返回) >>;<< Play (曹泰銘, MBU_曹泰銘_斜坐右看轉左) >>
Tyler Cao: Think what?
Jeff Wu: Are we the bad guys?;<< Play (吳晉峰, MBU_吳晉峰_側站低頭看手) >>
Tyler Cao: ...
Jeff Wu: Truth be told, I thought about quitting. Don't have the heart to make a living by exploiting others.
Jeff Wu: All these tragedies are caused by the farm. If I quit—;<< Play (吳晉峰, MBU_吳晉峰_側站低頭看手返回) >>
George Liao: Someone else will take your place.;<< Play (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_工廠_看外) >>;<< Play (曹泰銘, MBU_曹泰銘_斜坐左看轉右) >>
George Liao: Do you think it's easy to find a job these days, Jeff?;<< Play (廖吉興, MBU_廖吉興_側站抱胸) >>;<< Play (張隆生, MBU_安全帽_斜坐左看轉右) >>
Jeff Wu: I didn't mean that—;<< Play (吳晉峰, MBU_吳晉峰_側站低頭返回) >>
George Liao: Ever thought about why you are here in an office, instead of being racked up in the Cellar?
George Liao: Get yourself sorted out, before thinking about others.
Jeff Wu: Hey, that's totally unrelated!;<< Play (吳晉峰, MBU_吳晉峰_側站插腰) >>
George Liao: Totally related.
Jeff Wu: You old geezers always over-simplify things.;<< Play (吳晉峰, MBU_吳晉峰_側站插腰抬手) >>;<< Play (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_工廠_看外返回) >>;<< Play (張隆生, MBU_安全帽_斜坐右看轉左) >>
Tyler Cao: Hey, Jeff...;<< Play (曹泰銘, MBU_曹泰銘_斜坐右看轉左) >>
George Liao: ...;<< Play (吳晉峰, MBU_吳晉峰_側站插腰抬手返回) >>
George Liao: Whatever you say.;<< Play (廖吉興, MBU_廖吉興_側站抱胸返回) >>;<< Play (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_工廠_看外) >>;<< Play (張隆生, MBU_安全帽_斜坐左看轉右) >>
George Liao: Don't have the time to argue with you. I don't have as much love to spare as you do.;<< Play (廖吉興, MBU_廖吉興_側站抬頭) >>
George Liao: All I know is that if everyone does their own job right, the world is a much better place. I'm off to work. Suit yourself.
Jeff Wu: Go do your work.;<< Play (廖吉興, MBU_廖吉興_側站抬頭返回) >>;<< Play (張隆生, MBU_安全帽_斜坐右看轉左) >>
Jeff Wu: You turn tail every time I get serious.
Jeff Wu: Go. Take your outdated ideas and live your outdated life.;<< Play (吳晉峰, MBU_吳晉峰_側站插腰手指) >>
//SpeakForLiau這裡記錄玩家的反應，1.幫廖哥2.幫小峰3.不作為
<<#Simple(12)>>
->Jeff, that's too far.;<<Set($SpeakForLiau,1)>>
    << Play (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_工廠_看外返回) >>
    Jeff Wu: What's too far?
    Jeff Wu: Just stating the facts.
    <<#GoTo(@跳過主角轉回去看小蜂欸)>>
->Yeah. Make way for the upcoming generation.;<<Set($SpeakForLiau,2)>>
    << Play (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_工廠_看外返回) >>
    George Liao: This is between him and me. Stay out, Jason Dai.
    Jeff Wu: Why? He's entitled to his own opinions.
    <<#GoTo(@跳過主角轉回去看小蜂欸)>>
->...
<<#EndSimple>>
<< Play (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_工廠_看外返回) >>
<<@跳過主角轉回去看小蜂欸>>
Jeff Wu: ...;<< Play (吳晉峰, MBU_吳晉峰_側站插腰手指返回) >>
Jeff Wu: Tsk. Screw this...;<< PlayUntil (吳晉峰, MBU_吳晉峰_側站插腰返回) >>;<<Set($DLState,小峰不爽走掉)>>;//小峰走掉
George Liao: ...;<< Play (曹泰銘, MBU_曹泰銘_斜坐左看轉右) >>
George Liao: Wayne won't be back in a while. Jason, you have anything to do?;<< Play (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_工廠_看外) >>;<< Play (張隆生, MBU_安全帽_斜坐左看轉右) >>
George Liao: Come find me if not. I have something for you.
//廖哥走調
<<Set($DLState,廖哥看完隆生傷勢走掉)>>
<<#Wait(3)>>
Lawrence Chang: ...;<< Play (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_工廠_看外返回) >>
Tyler Cao: Wasn't expecting it to escalate so quickly.;<< Play (曹泰銘, MBU_曹泰銘_斜坐右看返回) >>
Tyler Cao: Things are not going well between them.;<< Play (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_工廠_看內) >>
<<#Simple(8)>>
->Do you know what's the cause?
    Tyler Cao: No. Probably has to do with Jeff's boyfriend.
->They were not like this before?
    Tyler Cao: Better than this, more or less.
->...
<<#EndSimple>>
Lawrence Chang: ...
Lawrence Chang: Jeff's parents passed away?
Tyler Cao: Yeah, when he was in middle school.;<< Play (曹泰銘, MBU_曹泰銘_斜坐左看) >>
Tyler Cao: His mom's older brother, which is Mr. Liao, took him in.
Lawrence Chang: Meaning Mr. Liao is his only family?
Tyler Cao: That I'm not sure.
Lawrence Chang: ...
Lawrence Chang: You know where Jeff is, Tyler?
Tyler Cao: Right now? The break room, most likely.
Tyler Cao: Every time he's angry, he goes there to make a cup of tea. Says it's soothing.
Lawrence Chang: I'll go talk to him. See ya.;<< Play (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_工廠_看內返回) >>
//隆生走掉
<<Set($DLState,隆生去找小峰)>>
Tyler Cao: Wait, Lawrence!;<< Play (曹泰銘, MBU_曹泰銘_斜坐左看返回) >>
Tyler Cao: ...
//采欣回來
<<Set($DLState,采欣回來好奇隆生去哪)>>
Cathy Hsieh: Lawrence went out in a storm. What's up?;<< Play (曹泰銘, MBU_曹泰銘_斜坐右看) >>;<< Play (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_工廠_看外) >>
<<#Simple(6)>>
->No idea.
->He wants to have a talk with Jeff.
    Cathy Hsieh: Huh.
->...
<<#EndSimple>>
Tyler Cao: Jeff had a fight with Mr. Liao, so...
Cathy Hsieh: He wants to talk some sense into Jeff?
Tyler Cao: Probably.
Cathy Hsieh: I didn't know Lawrence was the peacemaker type.
Cathy Hsieh: *Sigh* I wish he could talk some sense into QQ.
Tyler Cao: QQ's bitching about your relationship with Ops again?
Cathy Hsieh: ...;<< Play (謝采欣, MBU_謝采欣_側站低頭) >>
Cathy Hsieh: ...Yeah.
Cathy Hsieh: Ah, Edith was looking for you.;<< Play (謝采欣, MBU_謝采欣_側站低頭返回) >>;<< Play (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_工廠_看外返回) >>
Cathy Hsieh: Could you go find her, like right now?
Tyler Cao: Of course.;<<Set($DLState,采欣好奇完就走回座位)>>;//采欣回座位
Tyler Cao: Hey, Jason.;<< Play (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_工廠_看內) >>
Tyler Cao: Good luck with the field practice!
<<#Simple(6)>>
->Thank you.
->...
<<#EndSimple>>
Tyler Cao: I'll go find Edith, then.;<< Play (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_工廠_看內返回) >>
<<#End>>



//這時去茶水間會看到隆生根小峰在聊
//去座位會看到球球跟采心在吵架
//找廖哥可以接任務，且她會反應你最後有沒有幫她說話







//所有事情都是同一回事。
//有價值的人就能過好生活，沒價值的人就只能過苦日子。
//什麼叫有價值！？
//萬象給的價值嗎？
//難道人的價值是那些有權有勢的人可以決定的嗎？
//當然不是他們決定的。
//是我們所有人決定的！
//哪個人不想有權有勢，但誰可以做到？
//永遠只有那些有能力的人才做得到，所以他們才有價值。
//誰管他是富二代還是運氣好，他能做到就是能做到。
//你整天想著幹嘛？改善社會啊？公平自由啊？那麼高尚啊？
//你們年輕人總是以為自己可以影響社會，殊不知說那麼多根本一點影響都沒有。
//自己做不出一番事業，又愛管人家過得如何。
//……你說完了嗎？
//要說說不完啦，因為我知道說再多你都不會聽進去。
//只能等你們活到我歲數，看得夠多才會真的懂。
//整天想東想西，不如好好過好自己的生活。
//………
//我聽你說這麼多，只聽懂一件事情。
//你自己放棄做對的事情，所以你看所有還在努力的人不順眼。
//你不想再檢討自己了，所以任何願意自我反思的人都讓你覺得礙眼。

title: 跟廖哥接任務
body: <<#Simple(10)>> ->Hi.;<> <<#GoTo(@讓廖哥給主角任務)>> ->... <<#EndSimple>> <<@讓廖哥給主角任務>> George Liao: You're here to help me out? <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Yes. George Liao: Good. ->No. George Liao: ... <<#End>> <<#EndSimple>> //有幫小峰罵廖哥 <<#If($SpeakForLiau=2)>> George Liao: I see you were on Jeff's side.;<> Thought: I shouldn't have involved in their dispute back there... <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Because he's right. ->I'm more like against your side rather than on his side. George Liao: Hmph. <<#EndSimple>> <<#EndIf>> //有幫廖哥罵小峰 <<#If($SpeakForLiau=1)>> George Liao: Thank you for taking my side back there.;<> <<#Simple(8)>> ->You're welcome. He was going too far. <<@你是不是比較認同小峰廖哥問>> George Liao: But deep down inside, you agree with him, right?;<> <<@你是不是比較認同小峰廖哥問2>> Thought: Actually, I don't. <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Right. George Liao: I knew it.;<> ->No, I don't. George Liao: You'd better mean it.;<> Thought: Is this old guy even listening to me...? <<#EndSimple>> <<#GoTo(@結束幫廖哥或小峰說話環節)>> ->But you were pretty mean, too. George Liao: *Sigh*;<> George Liao: Deep down inside, you agree with him, right? <<#GoTo(@你是不是比較認同小峰廖哥問2)>> ->... <<#EndSimple>> <<#GoTo(@你是不是比較認同小峰廖哥問)>> <<#EndIf>> //什麼都沒說 <<#If($SpeakForLiau=0)>> George Liao: You heard what I told Jeff just now.;<> George Liao: But I guess you wouldn't agree. <<#EndIf>> <<@結束幫廖哥或小峰說話環節>> George Liao: You young folks are like in that sense. Naïve. George Liao: Contribution to society. Helping people. Making the world a better place. So on and so forth.;<> George Liao: You are that kind, aren't you? Thought: I only care about myself and those who matter.;<> <<#Simple(99999)>> ->What's wrong with making the world a better place? George Liao: Nothing wrong.;<> George Liao: The idea is great, but the approach should be more practical, is what I mean. George Liao: Help yourself before helping others, or else you end up making a bigger mess. <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Helping others is helping myself. Thought: I think I'm quoting Fran... George Liao: What's that supposed to mean?;<> <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Myself, others, we are parts of the same community. George Liao: On paper. George Liao: Those rich people, do you really believe they belong to your community? George Liao: If anyone must help the disadvantaged, it's the advantaged. ->What if I need help myself someday? George Liao: All the more reasons to make sure you won't see that day. George Liao: Work hard. Make sure you won't need any help. That is contribution, too. <<#Simple(8)>> ->How do you know hard work will be repaid? George Liao: I don't know. The bottom line is, not everyone has the opportunity to work hard.;<> George Liao: Like those juicers, they are doomed. Won't have an opportunity to work hard, even if they wanted to. George Liao: You have sat through consultation sessions. You know better than anyone else. George Liao: Don't allow yourself to be one of them.;<> ->I can work hard while helping others. George Liao: So you say now. Things are very different when you starve for a week.;<> George Liao: The economy isn't getting any better these days. George Liao: Unemployment is real. Don't take your job for granted.;<> ->... <<#EndSimple>> <<#EndSimple>> ->You're right. George Liao: An old geezer's life experience is seldom wrong.;<> <<#EndSimple>> ->No. I prioritize myself and those who matter the most to me. George Liao: You... George Liao: You're more mature than your peers. <<#EndSimple>> George Liao: OK. Enough life lessons. I need you for real work.;<> Thought: You started life lessons yourself... George Liao: Because of what happened yesterday, we need to change assignments for a few team members. George Liao: I need you to go tell them.;<> <<#Simple(6)>> ->Can't you just send a message? George Liao: I did, but for whatever reason, they are not checking messages. George Liao: Better inform them now than have them crying over it later. ->... <<#EndSimple>> George Liao: I need you to find Cynthia Ho and Jade Lin.;<> George Liao: One of them should be at Logistics. The other, maybe in the corridor outside the contract rooms. George Liao: Go find them when you have a minute. Remind them to check my message.;<> George Liao: This is of low priority, of course. George Liao: If Wayne comes back, do whatever he tells you to first.;<> George Liao: Do me this favor only when you have time. George Liao: I'll go find them myself if they keep ghosting me.;<> George Liao: That's it. George Liao: You're dismissed.;<< Play (廖吉興, MBU_廖吉興_側坐看外返回) >> <> <<#End>>

title: 離開走廊遇到阿緯
body: Wayne Zheng: That's the plan. If anything doesn't work, call me over to help. Wayne Zheng: OK, go now. Thank you. <> Wayne Zheng: Hey! Wayne Zheng: Jason!;<> Wayne Zheng: I'm late again. Really sorry. Wayne Zheng: Had to help resolve some issues left by the day shift staff. Thought: I haven't known him for long, but so far he's always late.;<> Thought: Always running around helping people with this or that... <<#Simple(10)>> ->Dude, you're late every time. Wayne Zheng: Eh...!? Thought: How could I say that to my superior...!? Wayne Zheng: Y-you're right! Terribly sorry... Wayne Zheng: Haha... ->Did you fix the issues? Wayne Zheng: We did. Phew! That was a close one.;<> <<#Simple(8)>> ->Good job. Wayne Zheng: Yeah, thank you. ->Don't be late next time. Wayne Zheng: Ugh. Sorry... ->... <<#EndSimple>> <> ->... <<#EndSimple>> Wayne Zheng: Ah, I need to tell you about your field practice at Ops today.;<> Thought: Shouldn't you tell me whether I passed the interview for Screening? <> <<#Simple(10)>> ->Wait. Did I make the cut for Screening? Wayne Zheng: Oh! Right!;<> Wayne Zheng: Sorry, I'm afraid that will have to wait till tomorrow. Wayne Zheng: Ms. Yeh is still busy with the aftermath of yesterday's assault. I will be occupied, too.;<> //阿姨爆氣 <<#If($InterviewHandleBadCount>1 )>> Wayne Zheng: ...;<> Wayne Zheng: But personally, I guess you should be prepared for bad news. Wayne Zheng: Ms. Yeh wasn't very happy about your result yesterday, I think...;<> //阿緯好感度特別高。 <<#If($EndingChungWeiScoreCoLin=5)>> Wayne Zheng: I did put in a good word for you, though!;<< Play(鄭緯,MBU_鄭緯_側站比一)>> Wayne Zheng: Your performance in the contract room was outstanding! <> <<#EndIf>> Wayne Zheng: Still, we must wait for Ms. Yeh's verdict. <<#EndIf>> //阿姨沒爆氣 <<#If($InterviewHandleBadCount<2 )>> Wayne Zheng: I think you have pretty much nailed it, though!;<> Wayne Zheng: I had a talk with Ms. Yeh yesterday. //對四人都很友善 <<#If($InterviewHandleBadCount=0 )>> Wayne Zheng: She's very happy with your performance throughout the consultation sessions. Wayne Zheng: She said you were handling contributors very well! <<#EndIf>> //有選對人 <<#If($FinalChooseLiu=true )>> Wayne Zheng: And you chose the right candidate in the end. It must have increased your chances, too. <<#EndIf>> <<#If($EndingChungWeiScoreCoLin=5)>> Wayne Zheng: I really appreciate what you did in the contract room, and made sure Ms. Yeh heard about it. <<#EndIf>> Wayne Zheng: Considering everything, I think you have nailed it. Show some confidence!;<> <<#EndIf>> Wayne Zheng: OK. Now, your itinerary at Ops today. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Wayne Zheng: Since Ops is a separate division, someone else will give you the tour there.;<> <<#Simple(8)>> ->Is he or she the division lead? Wayne Zheng: Not yet. <<#Simple(8)>> ->"Yet"? <<@解釋俊恩不是組長>> Wayne Zheng: We joined Vision at about the same time, he and I. So he's definitely eligible for a promotion.;<> Wayne Zheng: But things happened... <<#Simple(8)>> ->Say no more. // ->What kind of things? Wayne Zheng: ...Not my place to talk about it. Wayne Zheng: Ask him if you're really curious. Thought: An awkward smile to cover awkwardness... ->... <<#EndSimple>> Wayne Zheng: Ahem!;<> ->I thought onboarding newbies is the team lead's responsibility? Wayne Zheng: Um... Wayne Zheng: Let's just say that Ops has its own team culture.;<> Thought: His reaction. I guess it's more than a culture issue... Wayne Zheng: But rest assured. He's a very capable man.;<> <<#GoTo(@解釋俊恩不是組長)>> ->... <<#EndSimple>> ->Why not you? Wayne Zheng: Like I said, Ops is its own division. Wayne Zheng: Don't worry. You can trust him.;<> <<#GoTo(@解釋俊恩不是組長)>> ->... <<#EndSimple>> Wayne Zheng: His name is Justin Wu.;<> Wayne Zheng: Let me know when you're ready for field practice. I'll tell him to meet you at Logistics on B7.;<> <<#Simple(6)>> ->I must run some errands for Mr. Liao, though. Wayne Zheng: Ha, not a problem at all. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Wayne Zheng: The executives are furious with Ops because of yesterday's mess.;<> Wayne Zheng: They demanded a very lengthy statement from their team lead. Wayne Zheng: If my understanding of their team dynamics still stands, Justin will be the one to actually write the statement.;<> <<#Simple(8)>> ->Yesterday's mess? How is it related to Ops? Wayne Zheng: Huh? You haven't heard? Wayne Zheng: The assault yesterday...;<> Wayne Zheng: The guy's family died in the Cellar. It was an accident, but he blames us for it. Wayne Zheng: The division in charge of the Cellar is of course liable.;<> ->Sounds like their team lead doesn't do much? Wayne Zheng: Personally, I believe he doesn't deserve his job.;<> Thought: A very harsh opinion. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Wayne Zheng: Considering the statement is due today, I doubt if he has a lot of time for you. Wayne Zheng: Even if I call him now, it will take him a while to be there.;<> Wayne Zheng: I hope you understand. <> <<#Simple(8)>> ->May I know what kind of person he is? Wayne Zheng: Why ask me? <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Because I'm talking to you? Wayne Zheng: Good point. Haha! ->Because you seem to know him well. Wayne Zheng: Ugh, we are friends, kinda.;<< Play(鄭緯,MBU_鄭緯_側站插腰低頭)>> Wayne Zheng: Were friends... <> <<#EndSimple>> Wayne Zheng: He's a very capable man.;<> Wayne Zheng: Poker face most of the time, but quite nice deep down inside. Wayne Zheng: Sometimes annoyingly stubborn, though...;<> Wayne Zheng: You don't have to worry. It's not hard to get along with him. He's totally trustworthy. <<#Simple(8)>> ->Great to know. Thanks. Wayne Zheng: My pleasure. ->Being trustworthy doesn't necessarily mean easy to get along with. Wayne Zheng: You're right, haha!;<< Play(鄭緯,MBU_鄭緯_側站插腰抬頭)>> Wayne Zheng: Don't worry. He's kind of boring, but really not hard to get along with. Wayne Zheng: You will see soon enough.;<< Play(鄭緯,MBU_鄭緯_側站插腰抬頭返回)>> ->... <<#EndSimple>> ->... <<#EndSimple>> Wayne Zheng: Oh, if you have other things to do, just go.;<> Wayne Zheng: Once you go down to the Cellar, it could take a long time to come back up again.;<> Wayne Zheng: What do you say? Cellar right now, or finish other businesses first? <<#Simple(999999)>> ->I have something to take care of. ->Let me think about it. <> Wayne Zheng: Sure. You can always find me at my desk.;<> Wayne Zheng: Let me know any time when you're ready. ->Haven't got anything better to do. I'll go down now. <> Wayne Zheng: Good. I'll call Justin.;<> Wayne Zheng: You can head over to Logistics on B7. Wayne Zheng: Take the elevator down to Logistics and turn left. He will meet you there. <<#EndSimple>> Wayne Zheng: That's it. Ms. Yeh is calling me. Gotta go. Wayne Zheng: See you.;<> <<#End>>

title: 第一次遇到俊恩
body:
//這邊改成，先請吳俊恩來，卻跑去解支線的話，她會提到等很久(或是主角想法會心虛)
//還有她的看外變成是玩家經過會看(向病床啊和)，但玩家得主動跟她對話
//如果先請吳俊恩來，然後解道去跟蕭勇明拿到硬碟
//<< Play (吳俊恩, MBU_吳俊恩_側站看書看外) >>



<<#If($TalkToWaitMCWuBefore=false)>>
    <<Set($TalkToWaitMCWuBefore,true)>>
    Justin Wu: Jason Dai?;<<Play(吳俊恩,MBU_吳俊恩_側站看書拿書)>>
    <<#Simple(6)>>
    ->Yes. Nice to meet you.
        //
    ->How did you know my name?
        Justin Wu: I have read your profile.
    ->...
    <<#EndSimple>>
    Justin Wu: I tried to be here as soon as possible. Didn't want to keep you waiting.
    <<#Simple(8)>>
    ->And you're...?
        Justin Wu: Justin Wu. Nice to meet you.
    ->You must be Justin Wu.
        Justin Wu: Yes, I am.
    ->...
    <<#EndSimple>>
    Justin Wu: I will be your tour guide for the field practice at Ops today.;<<Play(吳俊恩,MBU_吳俊恩_側站拿書放下)>>
    Thought: And I was expecting him to be late...
    <<#Simple(8)>>
    ->My boss said you're busy?
        Justin Wu: "My" boss?
        Justin Wu: You've made up your mind? Screening?
        <<#Simple(99999)>>
        ->No, I didn't mean that.
        ->Kinda.
        <<#EndSimple>>
        Justin Wu: ...
        Justin Wu: I'm actually relieved.
        <<#Simple(6)>>
        ->Huh?
            Justin Wu: Nothing.
        ->...
        <<#EndSimple>>
        Justin Wu: You were right. I have work to do.
    ->Are you done with the statement?  
        Justin Wu: What statement?
        Justin Wu: Ah, I see. You must have heard from Wayne.
        Justin Wu: He's like that, minding other people's business all the time.
        Thought: Very true...
        Justin Wu: No, I haven't finished the statement yet.
    ->...
    <<#EndSimple>>
    Justin Wu: I'm here because you have higher priority.
    Justin Wu: My work is my own problem. Can't let it waste your time.
    Justin Wu: Plus, I don't like to be late.
    Thought: He's indeed better than Wayne at punctuality.
    Justin Wu: Time to go down to the Cellar.
<<#EndIf>>

Justin Wu: Are you ready?
<<#Simple(99999)>>
->Yeah, let's go.
    Justin Wu: Sure.;<<PlayUntil(吳俊恩,MBU_吳俊恩_側站拿書放下返回)>>
    <<Set($DLState,吳俊恩開始帶主角等地窖電梯)>>
->Please give me a moment.
    Justin Wu: ...
    Justin Wu: Roger, ma'am.;<<PlayUntil(吳俊恩,MBU_吳俊恩_側站拿書放下倒播)>>
<<#EndSimple>>
<<#End>>
//俊恩走道地窖電梯

title: 地窖電梯導覽
body: //兩邊漆黑階段 Justin Wu: This elevator passes by many floors.;<> Justin Wu: Like most places on this farm, though, most of them need security clearance.;<> <<#Simple(10)>> ->Floors, for what? ->What floors need security clearance? Justin Wu: Honestly, I'm not entirely sure myself.;<> Thought: You don't know where your elevator goes...?;<> Justin Wu: It might sound weird, but Vision intends it this way.;<> Justin Wu: Confidentiality is a top priority at Vision. We have strict procedures and physical separation.;<>;<> Justin Wu: It's reasonable, considering that the company's entire business depends on proprietary technology. Justin Wu: Cross-division communication is strictly regulated, too. Justin Wu: As a result, most people have no idea what we deal with on a daily basis at Ops.;<> Thought: He's frustrated, I think... Justin Wu: To them, we are just the people who run flop farming systems. <<#Simple(8)>> ->Is it OK to disclose this much to a newbie? Justin Wu: Totally OK. <<@具嗯嗯解釋兩天工作不完整>> Justin Wu: You will see everything on this farm during field practice, and nothing at all when it comes to the real business.;<> Thought: Meaning yesterday's work was not the real business at Screening? Justin Wu: I wouldn't assign you any work that truly matters, either. Justin Wu: Consider this a guided tour.;<> <<#Simple(8)>> ->But I did quite some work at Screening yesterday. Justin Wu: Let me guess. Consultation and contract signing? <<@俊恩猜出主角昨天幹嘛去了>> Thought: How did he know? <<#Simple(8)>> ->How did you know? Justin Wu: I worked at Screening for a while. ->Spot-on. Thought: An affirming smile. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Justin Wu: It is their real business, but the backbone is Vision's automated screening system and flop regulation procedures.;<> Justin Wu: And they also deal with business development folks in Upstairs divisions. Justin Wu: What you did was a fraction of their daily responsibilities.;<> Justin Wu: And frankly, all flop farms have consultation and contract teams. Nothing secret or proprietary there. ->A walk in the park? Nice. Justin Wu: Sorry if I gave the wrong idea.;<> Justin Wu: Your work today does not involve any trade secret, but may not be that easy. Justin Wu: ... Justin Wu: I guess you did consultation and contract signing yesterday?;<> <<#GoTo(@俊恩猜出主角昨天幹嘛去了)>> ->... <<#EndSimple>> ->I will get to know Ops better than anyone else at Screening? Justin Wu: Yes, although it might feel weird to you. Justin Wu: Screening and Ops seldom communicate, until Ms. Yeh starts to ask new recruits to do field practice under both.;<> Justin Wu: I suppose she means to clear up misunderstandings between us... Justin Wu: I doubt if it will work, though. A brief field practice hardly offers any real insight.;<> <<#GoTo(@具嗯嗯解釋兩天工作不完整)>> ->... <<#EndSimple>> ->... <<#EndSimple>> Justin Wu: ... Justin Wu: Hmph. We're approaching Central Control. <<#End>>

title: 初入操作組
body:
//鎖操作組的門

Kevin Hu: Hey, you. Where have you been?
Justin Wu: I was picking up the new recruit, sir.
Kevin Hu: Where's the statement?;<< Play (胡啟維, MBU_胡啟維_側站抬頭) >>
Justin Wu: Working on it. Will deliver before the end of the day.
Kevin Hu: You'd better.;<< Play (胡啟維, MBU_胡啟維_側站抽菸) >>
Kevin Hu: You, the new guy?
Thought: What a douche...;<< Play (吳俊恩, MBU_吳俊恩_側站看外) >>;<< Play (胡啟維, MBU_胡啟維_側站吐菸) >>
<<#Simple(99999)>>
->Yes. Jason Dai.
    Kevin Hu: Just answer me yes or no.;<< Play (胡啟維, MBU_胡啟維_側站吐菸返回) >>
    Kevin Hu: Didn't ask about the name because I don't care.
    Kevin Hu: Smarten up, you stupid hunk.
    <<#Simple(6)>>
    ->Show some respect.;<<Set($DontGiveFuckAsshole78,true)>>
        Kevin Hu: Or what?;<< Play (胡啟維, MBU_胡啟維_側站吐菸) >>
        <<#Simple(99999)>>
        ->Or I'll beat you up.
            Thought: That was not a nice thing to say...
            Thought: But I really do want to kick his fat ass.;<< Play (胡啟維, MBU_胡啟維_側站吐菸返回) >>
            Kevin Hu: ...
            Kevin Hu: This is the "talent" selected by the AI?;<< Play (胡啟維, MBU_胡啟維_側站吐菸) >>
        ->Or I'll tell Ms. Yeh.
            Thought: Justin glanced at me...;<< Play (胡啟維, MBU_胡啟維_側站吐菸返回) >>
            Kevin Hu: That old bag? She can't do a thing.
            Kevin Hu: Go. Tell her. I don't care.;<< Play (胡啟維, MBU_胡啟維_側站吐菸) >>
        ->Or nothing. I just don't like your attitude.
            Kevin Hu: HA! Straightforward, ain't ya?
            Kevin Hu: Good, good.
        <<#EndSimple>>
    ->Sorry.
        Kevin Hu: Heh. Not a smart boy, but a good boy.;<< Play (胡啟維, MBU_胡啟維_側站吐菸) >>
    ->...
    <<#EndSimple>>
->Please show some respect.
    Kevin Hu: Awww, really!
    Kevin Hu: May I know if you're the wonderful new recruit we've been sooooo looking forward to, please?;<< Play (胡啟維, MBU_胡啟維_側站吐菸返回) >>
    Thought: This mocking attitude...
    <<#Simple(99999)>>
    ->Yes. My name is Jason Dai.
        Kevin Hu: I didn't ask about the name because I don't care.;<< Play (胡啟維, MBU_胡啟維_側站吐菸) >>
        Kevin Hu: Smarten up, you stupid hunk.
    ->I don't like your attitude.;<<Set($DontGiveFuckAsshole78,true)>>
    ->Who else could it be?;<<Set($DontGiveFuckAsshole78,true)>>
        Kevin Hu: Oooh, we've got a fancy boy here.;<< Play (胡啟維, MBU_胡啟維_側站吐菸) >>
        Kevin Hu: Alright, alright.
    <<#EndSimple>>
<<#EndSimple>>
Kevin Hu: Do your thing quick, and get the fuck out of here.;<< Play (胡啟維, MBU_胡啟維_側站手指) >>
Thought: What...?
Kevin Hu: They sent you down for field practice, I let you do field practice. But keep in mind that we don't need you.
Kevin Hu: Finish your business, then fuck off. Understand?;<< Play (胡啟維, MBU_胡啟維_側站手指返回) >>
Kevin Hu: And you, Wu, don't use him as an excuse to delay the statement.;<< Play (吳俊恩, MBU_吳俊恩_側站看外返回) >>
Kevin Hu: I'm right here in my office watching you.;<< Play (胡啟維, MBU_胡啟維_側站吐菸結束) >>
Justin Wu: Yes, sir.;<< Play (吳俊恩, MBU_吳俊恩_側站點頭) >>
//操作組組長回辦公室
<<Set($DLState,操作組組長回辦公室)>>
Thought: What's the clown's problem...?
Justin Wu: Sorry about that.;<<Set($DLState,吳俊恩轉回來跟主角討論操作組長多討厭)>>
<<#Simple(8)>>
->Don't be. Not your fault.
    Justin Wu: I...;<< Play (吳俊恩, MBU_吳俊恩_側站低頭) >>
    Justin Wu: Yeah, you're right.
->That asshole is your boss?
    Justin Wu: Funny, I ask myself that question everyday...;<< Play (吳俊恩, MBU_吳俊恩_側站低頭) >>
->...;<< Play (吳俊恩, MBU_吳俊恩_側站低頭) >>
<<#EndSimple>>

//如果有衝著組長罵，就進來
<<#If($DontGiveFuckAsshole78 = true)>>
    Justin Wu: You were very...straightforward just now.
    <<#Simple(6)>>
    ->Sorry. Did I cause you any trouble?
        Justin Wu: Nope.;<< Play (吳俊恩, MBU_吳俊恩_側站低頭返回) >>
        Thought: Looks like he approves.
    ->Better teach him a lesson early on, or he'd come back for more later.
        Justin Wu: Can't be truer.;<< Play (吳俊恩, MBU_吳俊恩_側站低頭返回) >>
        Thought: Looks like he approves.
    ->...
    <<#EndSimple>>
    Justin Wu: Must admit, seeing that makes me feel a bit better.;<< Play (吳俊恩, MBU_吳俊恩_側站低頭) >>
<<#EndIf>>

Justin Wu: Let me show you around the office.;<< Play (吳俊恩, MBU_吳俊恩_側站低頭返回) >>
<<#Simple(8)>>
->Hold on. He said you don't need me. What does that mean?
    Justin Wu: ...
    Justin Wu: Honestly, I don't think we need any new recruits, either.;<< Play (吳俊恩, MBU_吳俊恩_側站抬手) >>
    <<#Simple(6)>>
    ->Honestly, I'm not super inclined to be here, either.
        Justin Wu: Won't blame you, considering that ordeal just now.
    ->You're not hiring?
        Justin Wu: ...
        Justin Wu: Well, you could say that.
    ->...
    <<#EndSimple>>
    Justin Wu: But Silencio wants to assign you to Ops, for whatever reason.
    Justin Wu: We are in no position to say no.;<< Play (吳俊恩, MBU_吳俊恩_側站抬手返回) >>
->Sure, thanks.
->...
<<#EndSimple>>
<<#End>>
//兩個操作組員走過來，後面那個站在身後排隊

title: 和賴潔聊天
body: //賴潔的座位很亂 Jesse Lai: Yo, looking for me, handsome?;<< Play (賴潔, MBU_賴潔_斜坐看內返回) >>;<< Play (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_工廠_側站低頭) >> <<@問賴潔問題循環環環>> <<#Simple(99999)>> ->What do you do here? ($AskLaiJieWhatWork) <> Jesse Lai: Awww, wanna know more about me?;<< Play (賴潔, MBU_賴潔_斜坐前傾) >> Jesse Lai: The thing is, you wouldn't understand if I told you. <<#Simple(8)>> ->Come on, try me. Jesse Lai: Haha, sure! Since you're so curious... ->Ah, I take it back. Jesse Lai: Haha, I'm kidding. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Jesse Lai: My title is senior technician.;<< Play (賴潔, MBU_賴潔_斜坐前傾返回) >> Jesse Lai: What I do is the logical deconstruction of neural networks.;<< Play (賴潔, MBU_賴潔_斜坐抬頭) >> Thought: ...?????;<< Play (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_工廠_側站低頭返回) >> Jesse Lai: Ha! I see the question marks on your head!;<< Play (賴潔, MBU_賴潔_斜坐抬頭返回) >> Jesse Lai: Simply put, my responsibility is to figure out how AI algorithms work.;<< Play (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_工廠_側站低頭) >> <<#Simple(8)>> ->But your team created Silencio's algorithm, no? Jesse Lai: Yes. We made it so that it can learn new things and expand itself.;<< Play (賴潔, MBU_賴潔_斜坐點頭) >> Jesse Lai: Given a ton of data and training... Jesse Lai: Eventually it becomes something totally beyond our comprehension.;<< Play (賴潔, MBU_賴潔_斜坐抬手) >> Jesse Lai: You could say that it knows far more about us than we know about it. Jesse Lai: Am I clear enough?;<< Play (賴潔, MBU_賴潔_斜坐抬手返回) >> <<#Simple(99999)>> ->You mean, it's capable of thinking? <<@演算法算是在思考嗎？>> Jesse Lai: Depends. What's your definition of "thinking"? Jesse Lai: Like, press a button and get a response. Is the computer thinking?;<< Play (賴潔, MBU_賴潔_斜坐抬雙手) >> Jesse Lai: Or instruct your computer to do this thing and that. Is it thinking about how to get things done? Jesse Lai: Or let's talk about my stupid ass neighbor who never remembers to pick up after his dog. He has a human brain, but is he capable of thinking? Jesse Lai: Come on. What do you think "thinking" is?;<< Play (賴潔, MBU_賴潔_斜坐抬雙手返回) >> <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Thinking means being able to create things that did not exist. Jesse Lai: Thinking equals creativity? Jesse Lai: But what is creativity? We exhaust combinations of things that already exist, suddenly we created something new.;<< Play (賴潔, MBU_賴潔_斜坐看內) >> Jesse Lai: This process is pretty much cobbling random things together and checking if the result works. Jesse Lai: Our algorithm is definitely capable of this. Jesse Lai: Or rather, this is exactly what it's created for, to do the cobbling together part faster.;<< Play (賴潔, MBU_賴潔_斜坐看內返回) >> ->Thinking is making judgments and decisions based on provided information. Jesse Lai: Input, processing, and output, huh...;<< Play (賴潔, MBU_賴潔_斜坐低頭) >> Jesse Lai: In that case, yeah, our algorithm is capable of thinking. Jesse Lai: My neighbor isn't. Tons of input. No processing.;<< Play (賴潔, MBU_賴潔_斜坐低頭返回) >> ->Thinking means feelings and emotions. Jesse Lai: Feelings, like being happy or sad? Jesse Lai: We can make it put up a happy or sad face, alright...;<< Play (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_工廠_側站低頭返回) >> <<#Simple(8)>> ->Appearing to be happy doesn't mean being happy. Jesse Lai: What's the difference? You can't tell how other people feel. To you, it's just a bunch of "appears to be".;<< Play (賴潔, MBU_賴潔_斜坐抬手) >> Jesse Lai: Like, if I laugh out loud, can you tell if I'm genuinely happy? Jesse Lai: You can't. So, at the end of the day, it's all "appears to be" in your eyes anyway.;<< Play (賴潔, MBU_賴潔_斜坐抬手返回) >> Paxton Luo: Hey, that reminds me of a video clip I stumbled upon the other day.;<>;<< Play (羅龐安, MBU_羅龐安_正坐左看) >>;<< Play (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_工廠_看外) >> Paxton Luo: It says we can't prove the colors we see are the same colors.;<< Play (賴潔, MBU_賴潔_斜坐看外) >> Jesse Lai: Hey, you're only making the situation more complicated. <<#Simple(8)>> ->Hold on. What do you mean? Paxton Luo: Describe to me the red color you see. What's it like? Paxton Luo: You can't. Only a heap of nouns and adjectives come to mind when you try. You make an analogy, things and ideas that you associate with the color red. Paxton Luo: Without a clear definition of the color itself, you never know if your red is my blue! Thought: Wha...? Jesse Lai: Is that even relevant? ->Yeah, I'm extra confused now. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Paxton Luo: Come on, you guys are weak.;<< Play (羅龐安, MBU_羅龐安_正坐左看返回) >>;<< Play (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_工廠_看外返回) >>;<< Play (賴潔, MBU_賴潔_斜坐看外返回) >> <> //賴潔丟了一個垃圾到胖胖頭上 ->... <<#EndSimple>> Jesse Lai: Anyway, I'm looking for the answer myself, too.;<< Play (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_工廠_側站低頭) >> Jesse Lai: That's why I love this job. <<#EndSimple>> ->Sounds like Skynet. Jesse Lai: Ha, you could call it an early prototype of Skynet, sure. Jesse Lai: The difference is that Skynet has a clear desire to live. For survival, it sees humans as its enemy.;<< Play (賴潔, MBU_賴潔_斜坐抬手) >> Jesse Lai: Our AI is capable of thinking, but hasn't developed any desire yet. Jesse Lai: Or so I believe.;<< Play (賴潔, MBU_賴潔_斜坐抬手返回) >> <<#Simple(8)>> ->It could think? <<#GoTo(@演算法算是在思考嗎？)>> ->Will it develop desire over time? Jesse Lai: That, I'm trying to find out.;<< Play (賴潔, MBU_賴潔_斜坐前傾) >> Jesse Lai: We give it a purpose, and it tries to fulfill this purpose. Jesse Lai: Can we consider that a desire? I don't think so. Jesse Lai: Not in its current form. It has a long way to go.;<< Play (賴潔, MBU_賴潔_斜坐前傾返回) >> <<#Simple(6)>> ->You just said it could think? <<#GoTo(@演算法算是在思考嗎？)>> ->... <<#EndSimple>> ->... <<#EndSimple>> Jesse Lai: My mission is to figure out the growth and expansion of AI algorithms. <<#EndSimple>> ->... <<#EndSimple>> Jesse Lai: Vision is the leader in this field. If I could gain access to their data and resources...;<< Play (賴潔, MBU_賴潔_斜坐看內) >> Jesse Lai: My research work could be massively easier. Paxton Luo: You know what? Jesse used to be a senior scientist at Sunrise!;<< Play (羅龐安, MBU_羅龐安_正坐左看) >>;<> Jesse Lai: Hmph. The resume gave me more trouble than benefit.;<< Play (賴潔, MBU_賴潔_斜坐看內返回) >> <<#Simple(6)>> ->Trouble? Jesse Lai: Vision has trust issues, especially to former Sunrise employees. Jesse Lai: For a long time, I was treated like a spy.;<< Play (賴潔, MBU_賴潔_斜坐傻眼) >> Jesse Lai: Come on! What kind of idiot spy does infiltration by sending over a job application? Paxton Luo: Justin tried everything to talk the management into keeping Jesse here. Jesse Lai: That guy has eyes for talent.;<< Play (賴潔, MBU_賴潔_斜坐傻眼返回) >> Jesse Lai: Not a great job, but hey, this isn't half bad, either! Jesse Lai: All I care is about my research. Now that I have free access to key data, no complaint! ->... <<#EndSimple>> Jesse Lai: Anything else you wanna know?;<< Play (羅龐安, MBU_羅龐安_正坐左看返回) >>;<> <<#GoTo(@問賴潔問題循環環環)>> ->Your snack packaging is on the floor. ($InspectedLaiGarbage);//有調查到零食才會出現的選項。 <> Jesse Lai: Ah, damn!;<< Play (賴潔, MBU_賴潔_斜坐抬頭) >> Jesse Lai: Did you see me eating snack? <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Yeah, I did. ->Pretty hard to not see. Jesse Lai: Gah!!;<< Play (賴潔, MBU_賴潔_斜坐抬頭返回) >> ->No, but I can smell it. Jesse Lai: Seriously!? <<#Simple(6)>> ->Nope. Joking. Jesse Lai: Hey! For a second I believed you! ->... <<#EndSimple>> << Play (賴潔, MBU_賴潔_斜坐抬頭返回) >> <<#EndSimple>> Jesse Lai: Can't have Justin catch me eating. <<#Simple(8)>> ->Why? ->Company regulation? No food or drink at work? Jesse Lai: No such thing! ->... <<#EndSimple>> Jesse Lai: Justin's a bit of a clean freak. He says no food or drink in the office.;<< Play (賴潔, MBU_賴潔_斜坐抬雙手) >> Jesse Lai: My brain needs recharging! Paxton Luo: Justin's not that bad. Thing is, your keyboard is always an oily mess...;<< Play (羅龐安, MBU_羅龐安_正坐左看) >>;<> Paxton Luo: It's a hygiene hazard. We don't even want to touch it, okay? Jesse Lai: Why do you want to touch my keyboard in the first place!;<< Play (賴潔, MBU_賴潔_斜坐抬雙手返回) >> Paxton Luo: The company's keyboard.;<< Play (賴潔, MBU_賴潔_斜坐看外) >> //賴潔丟東西到胖胖頭上 Jesse Lai: Whatever!;<> <<#Simple(6)>> ->Aren't you picking up the trash? Jesse Lai: Later. Thought: ... ->... <<#EndSimple>> Jesse Lai: Okay, that's it. Jesse Lai: Anything else you wanna know, other than my lifestyle?;<< Play (賴潔, MBU_賴潔_斜坐看外返回) >>;<< Play (羅龐安, MBU_羅龐安_正坐左看返回) >> <<#GoTo(@問賴潔問題循環環環)>> ->Nothing. Jesse Lai: OK.;<< Play (賴潔, MBU_賴潔_斜坐看內) >> <<#End>> <<#EndSimple>>

title: 問胖胖問題
body:
Paxton Luo: Hi. Can I help you?;<< Play (羅龐安, MBU_羅龐安_正坐左看) >>;<< Play (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_工廠_側站低頭) >>

<<@繼續問胖胖問題悠悠>>
<<#Simple(99999)>>
->What do you do here? ($AskPonPonWhatWork)
    <<Set($AskPonPonWhatWork,-1)>>
    <<Set($SQ_PonPonStatus,1)>>
    Paxton Luo: Good question.
    Paxton Luo: My job is the most critical in this office.;<< Play (羅龐安, MBU_羅龐安_正坐左看轉右) >>
    Jesse Lai: Bullshit.
    //胖胖轉過去看了一下賴潔
    Paxton Luo: I'm the one and only hardware technician at Ops, at least for now.
    Paxton Luo: Basically, I operate and repair everything except for some parts of the racking system.
    Paxton Luo: Without me, these weak-ass coders can't get a thing done.;<< Play (賴潔, MBU_賴潔_斜坐看內返回) >>
    Paxton Luo: They don't know nothing about these wonderful machines they use.;<< Play (羅龐安, MBU_羅龐安_正坐右看轉左) >>
    //賴潔丟東西到胖胖頭上。
    Thought: Sounds a lot like QQ's responsibilities.;<< Play (賴潔, MBU_賴潔_斜坐看內) >>
    <<#Simple(8)>>
    ->I know a hardware technician at Screening.
        Paxton Luo: I know him.;<< Play (羅龐安, MBU_羅龐安_正坐左看轉右) >>
        Thought: He turned sulky at the mention of QQ...?
        Jesse Lai: Packs doesn't like that guy. Thinks the guy stole his mojo.;<< Play (賴潔, MBU_賴潔_斜坐看內返回) >>;<< PlayUntil (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_工廠_側站低頭返回) >>;<< Play (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_工廠_看內) >>
        Jesse Lai: Well, they are both chubby nerds working on boring hardware.
        Jesse Lai: Ours is extra nerdy and petty, maybe.
        Paxton Luo: Yeah, who the heck needs two chubby nerds in the same company?;<< Play (羅龐安, MBU_羅龐安_正坐右看轉左) >>;<< PlayUntil (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_工廠_看內返回) >>;<< Play (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_工廠_側站低頭) >>
        Paxton Luo: Obviously I'm the superior one. So I kindly tolerate him.;<< Play (賴潔, MBU_賴潔_斜坐看內) >>
        //球球根本不知道胖胖是誰。胖胖？誰啊？操作組的人我根本不認識啊？
        <<#Simple(8)>>
        ->Have you met?
        ->Does he know you?
            Paxton Luo: We met a couple of times.
            Paxton Luo: Including the company's tech showcase conference the other day.
        ->...
        <<#EndSimple>>
        Paxton Luo: Oh, do me a favor if you run into him next time.;<< Play (羅龐安, MBU_羅龐安_正坐左看轉右) >>
        Paxton Luo: Tell him that our showdown is nigh.
        Thought: What showdown...?
        Jesse Lai: Har. Har. Don't mind him. He's in drama mode again.;<< Play (賴潔, MBU_賴潔_斜坐看內返回) >>;<< PlayUntil (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_工廠_側站低頭返回) >>;<< Play (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_工廠_看內) >>
        Jesse Lai: He wants to outshine Screening's chubby nerd with something awesome on the next tech showcase conference.
        Jesse Lai: You know what? I think the other guy isn't even aware of his existence.;<< Play (賴潔, MBU_賴潔_斜坐看內) >>
        Paxton Luo: Only a coward backs out of a duel.;<< Play (羅龐安, MBU_羅龐安_正坐右看轉左) >>;<< PlayUntil (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_工廠_看內返回) >>;<< Play (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_工廠_側站低頭) >>
    ->...
    <<#EndSimple>>
    Paxton Luo: That's about it. Anything else you wanna know?
    <<#GoTo(@繼續問胖胖問題悠悠)>>
->You know Justin pretty well? ($AskPonPonUnderstandWu)
    <<Set($AskPonPonUnderstandWu,-1)>>
    Paxton Luo: What made you think that?
    Thought: I can see a smirk forming...
    <<#Simple(99999)>>
    ->Because you finished his sentence, more than once.
        Paxton Luo: Heh. That.;<< Play (賴潔, MBU_賴潔_斜坐看內返回) >>
        Jesse Lai: Don't encourage him! He tries to predict people's next sentences all the time.
        Jesse Lai: Smart ass.;<< Play (賴潔, MBU_賴潔_斜坐看內) >>
    ->Just a feeling.
        Paxton Luo: Well felt, man!
    <<#EndSimple>>
    Paxton Luo: We are the most senior staff at Ops, practically brothers.
    Jesse Lai: Most senior, because he never had a chance of promotion.
    Paxton Luo: ...;<< Play (羅龐安, MBU_羅龐安_正坐左看轉右) >>
    Paxton Luo: Brothers walk together. I won't take a promotion until he is promoted.
    <<#Simple(8)>>
    ->And how is his promotion going?
    ->Why walk together?
        Jesse Lai: Simple. I can answer that.;<< Play (賴潔, MBU_賴潔_斜坐看內返回) >>
        Jesse Lai: Justin is about the only one in the whole company who would consider promoting him.
        Jesse Lai: He is Packs' only hope.;<< Play (賴潔, MBU_賴潔_斜坐看內) >>
        Paxton Luo: Totally untrue!
    ->...
    <<#EndSimple>>
    Paxton Luo: Justin has been waiting forever to be the division lead. I don't have the heart to leave my brother behind.
    Jesse Lai: Translation, "I'm stuck here forever."
    Paxton Luo: No. There's no way that asshole could cling to his position that long.;<< Play (羅龐安, MBU_羅龐安_正坐右看轉左) >>
    <<#Simple(8)>>
    ->You're talking about the division lead?
        Paxton Luo: Who else?
    ->Which asshole?
        Paxton Luo: Our team lead, Sir Kevin Hu, the glorious.
    ->...
    <<#EndSimple>>
    Jesse Lai: Guy came out of nowhere just when Justin was about to be promoted, and has been the team lead ever since.;<< PlayUntil (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_工廠_側站低頭返回) >>;<< Play (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_工廠_看內) >>
    Jesse Lai: Know the right people at HQ and you'll go a long way. Living example.
    Jesse Lai: He basically does nothing, other than sweep bad stuff under the carpet.
    <<#Simple(8)>>
    ->Bad stuff?
    ->Care to give a few examples?
        Jesse Lai: Anything that proves he's an incompetent leader.;<< Play (賴潔, MBU_賴潔_斜坐看內返回) >>
        Jesse Lai: Plus those jui—
        Paxton Luo: Jesse. Mr. Dai doesn't need to know that.
        Jesse Lai: Gotcha.;<< Play (賴潔, MBU_賴潔_斜坐看內) >>
        <<#Simple(6)>>
        ->Know what?
            Jesse Lai: What I'd better not say.
            Paxton Luo: Saying too much could get us in trouble.
            Jesse Lai: Sorry...
            Thought: What is she apologizing for?
        ->...
        <<#EndSimple>>
    ->...
    <<#EndSimple>>
    Jesse Lai: Ms. Yeh wanted to fire him. Tried and failed, multiple times.
    Paxton Luo: Poor Justin.;<< Play (羅龐安, MBU_羅龐安_正坐左看轉右) >>
    Jesse Lai: Yeah, I feel sorry for him.
    Jesse Lai: Wanted to give him a hand. But who are we, huh? One a spy suspect from Sunrise, the other a salary thief.;<< Play (賴潔, MBU_賴潔_斜坐看內返回) >>
    //胖胖丟東西到賴潔頭上，但賴潔接住丟回去砸到胖胖
    Jesse Lai: What can we do? Nothing.;<< Play (羅龐安, MBU_羅龐安_正坐右看轉左) >>
    Thought: Should I tell Fran about this...?;<< PlayUntil (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_工廠_看內返回) >>;<< Play (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_工廠_側站低頭) >>
    Jesse Lai: Hey, anything else you wanna know?;<< Play (賴潔, MBU_賴潔_斜坐看內) >>
    <<#GoTo(@繼續問胖胖問題悠悠)>>
->Nope.
    Paxton Luo: Okay.;<< Play (羅龐安, MBU_羅龐安_正坐左看返回) >>
    <<#End>>
<<#EndSimple>>

title: 跟作業員二人組對話
body: //許世良跟楊冶平坐在旁邊喝酒，楊冶平好像興致高昂地跟他說什麼，但許世良眼睛盯著前方沒有很理會她 //如果對話過 <<#If($TalkedToXuAndYenBefore=true)>> Yale Yang: Um, hello?;<< Play (楊冶平, MBU_楊冶平_靠牆左看返回) >>;<< Play (許世良, MBU_許世良_靠牆低頭返回) >> <<#GoTo(@暴躁許大哥問問題間)>> <<#EndIf>> <> Liam Hsu: ...;<< Play (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_工廠_背站左看) >>;<< Play (許世良, MBU_許世良_靠牆低頭返回) >> Liam Hsu: What you want?;<< Play (楊冶平, MBU_楊冶平_靠牆左看返回) >>;<< Play (許世良, MBU_許世良_靠牆正看) >> Thought: Hostility at first sight... Yale Yang: Don't be so mean, Mr. Hsu.;<< Play (楊冶平, MBU_楊冶平_靠牆左看) >>;<< Play (許世良, MBU_許世良_靠牆正看返回) >> Liam Hsu: Tsk. I have nothing to say to imbeciles from Screening.;<< Play (許世良, MBU_許世良_靠牆低頭) >> <<#Simple(12)>> ->I'm not from Screening. Liam Hsu: Then why are you in their uniform? ->Say that again, I dare you. Liam Hsu: I said "imbeciles from Screening". So what? Yale Yang: Okay, okay! Yale Yang: Calm down, guys! ->... <<#EndSimple>> Yale Yang: Huh, hold on! Yale Yang: You must be Jason Dai?;<< Play (楊冶平, MBU_楊冶平_靠牆左看返回) >> <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Right. ->How did you know my name? <<#EndSimple>> Yale Yang: My boss said you'd come today. Liam Hsu: Justin is not your boss.;<< Play (許世良, MBU_許世良_靠牆低頭返回) >> Yale Yang: If he does the boss' job, he is the boss.;<< Play (楊冶平, MBU_楊冶平_靠牆抬頭) >> Liam Hsu: Nonsense... Yale Yang: Oh, you did field practice at Screening yesterday? <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Yes. // ->You know everything about me? Yale Yang: You're a special case. Justin especially explained to us the other day. <<#EndSimple>> Liam Hsu: So, he could end up in either Screening or Ops? Yale Yang: Right. <<#Simple(8)>> ->Personally, I'd prefer Screening, though. Liam Hsu: Hmph. ->Personally, I'd prefer Ops, though. Liam Hsu: ...Is that so? Thought: Hmm, he's a little bit less hostile now... ->... <<#EndSimple>> Liam Hsu: Word of advice. Stay clear of Screening. Thought: What's his issue against Screening? Yale Yang: Don't be like that, Mr. Hsu. Cathy is from Screening and you get along with her just fine.;<< Play (楊冶平, MBU_楊冶平_靠牆左看) >>;<< Play (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_工廠_背站左看轉右) >> //在第一日增加一段劇情是幫采欣說話，采心想說一些操作組的難處但被大家罵。那時侯 Liam Hsu: Cathy is different. Hmm, she's a good girl...;<< Play (許世良, MBU_許世良_靠牆正看返回) >> Thought: How did they know Cathy? <<#Simple(8)>> ->You know Cathy Hsieh? Yale Yang: Of course, she comes here quite often these days!;<< Play (楊冶平, MBU_楊冶平_靠牆左看返回) >> Yale Yang: And bombarding Mr. Hsu with questions. She's very curious about how these machines work.;<< Play (楊冶平, MBU_楊冶平_靠牆低頭) >> Liam Hsu: If only you're half as motivated as she is, slacker. Yale Yang: Hahaha... Yale Yang: Wait. You know Cathy, too?;<< Play (楊冶平, MBU_楊冶平_靠牆低頭返回) >> Thought: The old man just glanced at me. <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Sure. ->Just acquaintance. Yale Yang: I see. << PlayUntil (楊冶平, MBU_楊冶平_靠牆左看) >> <<#EndSimple>> ->... <<#EndSimple>> Liam Hsu: She's the only one in the entire Screening who cares about what's happening down here.;<< Play (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_工廠_背站右看轉左) >> Liam Hsu: The rest of them only bitch about how we are "uncooperative", never for once suspecting they are the root of the problem.;<< Play (許世良, MBU_許世良_靠牆正看) >> <<#Simple(8)>> ->What do you mean? ->But they said you are the root of the problem. Liam Hsu: Tsk. Another clueless newbie.;<< Play (許世良, MBU_許世良_靠牆正看轉左) >> Liam Hsu: What did I say, eh? They don't care! Yale Yang: He's a newbie, Mr. Hsu. Of course he's clueless!;<< Play (楊冶平, MBU_楊冶平_靠牆左看講話) >>;<< Play (許世良, MBU_許世良_靠牆左看轉右) >> Yale Yang: If you don't explain, he will stay clueless! Liam Hsu: Hmph... Yale Yang: The Cellar is slowly falling apart. We are in no shape to take in more juicers. Yale Yang: But the Screening people don't listen. They are even lowering the bar to let more people in.;<< Play (楊冶平, MBU_楊冶平_靠牆左看講話返回) >> Liam Hsu: Bunch of bastards, willing to kill people for their performance review.;<< Play (許世良, MBU_許世良_靠牆正看) >> ->... <<#EndSimple>> Yale Yang: I know, right? The point is, we must reason with them first... Liam Hsu: Why would I waste my breath on them?;<< Play (許世良, MBU_許世良_靠牆正看返回) >> Yale Yang: Give it a try, will ya? Yale Yang: Cathy said the other day, that some people at Screening want to know more about us?;<< Play (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_工廠_背站左看轉右) >> //這裡判斷之前有沒有幫采欣說過操作組的好話，可能可以設很多段都有 <<#If($HelpTsaiShinWhenBallTrashControl=1)>> Yale Yang: Like, there's this new guy defending her in an argument. Yale Yang: The new guy even said they should get to know how the Cellar works. Thought: ... Yale Yang: Um, hold on. New guy?;<< Play (楊冶平, MBU_楊冶平_靠牆左看返回) >> Yale Yang: It wouldn't happen to be you, Mr. Dai? Thought: Yeah. I did defend Cathy when she had an argument with QQ... <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Sounds like me.;<> Yale Yang: Ah, small world! Liam Hsu: It's you, huh...;<< Play (許世良, MBU_許世良_靠牆正看) >> Liam Hsu: ...;<< Play (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_工廠_背站右看轉左) >> Liam Hsu: OK. Maybe I did jump to conclusions. Maybe you're not one of them idiots.;<< Play (許世良, MBU_許世良_靠牆正看轉左) >> Thought: Suddenly he's much more approachable. Yale Yang: You're a lot nicer when Cathy is involved.;<< Play (楊冶平, MBU_楊冶平_靠牆左看) >> Yale Yang: I see you're treating her like a granddaughter.;<< Play (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_工廠_背站左看轉右) >> Liam Hsu: Shut up... Yale Yang: Come on, your apprentice could use some grandfatherly love, too! Liam Hsu: Then be a good apprentice like Cathy first. Shut up, for a start.;<< Play (許世良, MBU_許世良_靠牆左看轉右) >> Yale Yang: I'm trying to keep the elderly company. Liam Hsu: Bullshit... Thought: Despite saying that, he can't hide a smile. <<#GoTo(@許大哥問主角要幹嘛嘿)>> ->No, probably not me. Yale Yang: Huh... Liam Hsu: What did I say, eh? <<#EndSimple>> <<#EndIf>> Yale Yang: Still, we want changes, we must start to make changes. Get the conversation going, for example. Liam Hsu: I tried, OK? They didn't want to listen. Liam Hsu: How about you give it a try sometime? Yale Yang: I'm biding my time!;<< Play (楊冶平, MBU_楊冶平_靠牆左看返回) >> Liam Hsu: Tsk. Keep on biding. <<@許大哥問主角要幹嘛嘿>> Liam Hsu: So, what you want?;<< Play (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_工廠_背站右看轉左) >>;<< Play (許世良, MBU_許世良_靠牆正看) >> <<@暴躁許大哥問問題間>> <<#Simple(99999)>> ->I want to learn more about your work. ($AskControllersWhatWork) <> Liam Hsu: Wipe the stinky ass for Screening, is what we do. Yale Yang: Our routine work includes racking up the juicers and keeping the whole Cellar maintained and serviced. Thought: ...I thought Logistics should be responsible for that? <<#Simple(8)>> ->Isn't maintenance and servicing the responsibilities of Logistics? Yale Yang: Lots of people think that. Liam Hsu: This is really annoying. Yale Yang: Haha...;<< Play (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_工廠_背站左看轉右) >> <<@解釋作業員跟操作組建修組的淵源>> Yale Yang: Equipment in the Cellar is based on entirely different technologies.;<< Play (楊冶平, MBU_楊冶平_靠牆歪頭) >> Yale Yang: The Logistics team is not trained for this.;<< Play (許世良, MBU_許世良_靠牆正看返回) >> Yale Yang: Every hardware engineer you see here belongs to Ops. Yale Yang: Although some of them don't want to think so...;<< Play (楊冶平, MBU_楊冶平_靠牆歪頭返回) >> Liam Hsu: Little shits think they're too good to be one of us.;<< Play (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_工廠_背站右看轉左) >> ->You all belong to Ops? Yale Yang: Yes. Yale Yang: But originally we were working for Logistics.;<< Play (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_工廠_背站左看轉右) >> <<#GoTo(@解釋作業員跟操作組建修組的淵源)>> ->... <<#EndSimple>> Yale Yang: But these days we're increasingly involved in cleaning up...;<< Play (楊冶平, MBU_楊冶平_靠牆右看) >> Liam Hsu: Enough, Yale. Liam Hsu: He doesn't need to know so much. Yale Yang: Y-yes, you're right...;<< Play (楊冶平, MBU_楊冶平_靠牆右看返回) >> Thought: I don't need to know what...?;<< Play (許世良, MBU_許世良_靠牆正看) >> Yale Yang: Anyhow, that's about the size of it. Anything else you want to know, Mr. Dai? <<#GoTo(@暴躁許大哥問問題間)>> ->Nothing. Yale Yang: Okay. << PlayUntil (楊冶平, MBU_楊冶平_靠牆左看) >>;<< PlayUntil (許世良, MBU_許世良_靠牆正看返回) >> <<#End>> <<#EndSimple>>

title: 俊恩進入操作環節
body:
//原本送架的流程事自動化的，只要一個作業員待命就好。但最近故障情況頻傳

//時間到或是主角跟作業員二人組對話完(1不幫、2討厭主角、3幫主角、4主角回絕半天才幫、0沒講過話)


Justin Wu: Get ready for the racking procedure.;<< Play (吳俊恩, MBU_吳俊恩_側站看外) >>
Justin Wu: You can start now, Packs.
Paxton Luo: Roger.;<< Play (吳俊恩, MBU_吳俊恩_側站看外返回) >>
<<Set($DLState,開始切操作螢幕第一次)>>
<<#Wait(1)>>
Liam Hsu: Hm? This is the guy?
Justin Wu: Yes.
Justin Wu: I'll do the introduction.
Justin Wu: This is Mr. Liam Hsu, senior operator.
//if剛剛打過招呼
<<#If($TalkedToXuAndYenBefore=true)>>
    Liam Hsu: No need. We have done the self introduction already.
    Justin Wu: I see.
    <<#GoTo(@跳過沒打招呼兩人初認識許世良)>>
<<#EndIf>>
Justin Wu: Behind him is Yale Yang, his apprentice.
Yale Yang: Nice to meet you!
<<#Simple(6)>>
->Nice to meet you.
->...
<<#EndSimple>>
<<@跳過沒打招呼兩人初認識許世良>>
Liam Hsu: Enough chitchat! Let's get this done.
Liam Hsu: You ready for it, boy?
<<#Simple(99999)>>
->I'm ready.
    Liam Hsu: Good. This is very straightforward.
->Don't we need any preparation?
    Liam Hsu: No need. This is very straightforward.
<<#EndSimple>>
Thought: Very straightforward? Why was Justin so nervous, then?;<< Play (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_工廠_側站抬頭) >>
Justin Wu: Wait, Mr. Hsu.;<< Play (吳俊恩, MBU_吳俊恩_側站微慌) >>
Liam Hsu: What?;<< Play (許世良, MBU_許世良_側站抬頭) >>
Justin Wu: This is a great opportunity to make Mr. Dai understand.
Liam Hsu: Understand what? Why this farm must go?;<< Play (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_工廠_側站抬頭返回) >>;<< Play (楊冶平, MBU_楊冶平_側站低頭) >>
Justin Wu: Yes.;<< Play (吳俊恩, MBU_吳俊恩_側站微慌返回) >>
Liam Hsu: ...;<< Play (許世良, MBU_許世良_側站抬頭返回) >>;<< Play (楊冶平, MBU_楊冶平_側站低頭返回) >>
Liam Hsu: I say no need. He can see for himself.
<<@誰來帶實作收尾段落>>
Liam Hsu: Let's get going. The racking console is over there.
Liam Hsu: Follow up, Yale.;<< Play (許世良, MBU_許世良_側站看外) >>
Yale Yang: Coming!;<< Play (楊冶平, MBU_楊冶平_側站點頭) >>;<< PlayUntil (許世良, MBU_許世良_側站看外返回) >>
//兩人走掉，吳俊恩站了一下也跟上，但胖胖攔住吳俊恩
<<Set($DLState,作業員雙人組去機台)>>


Paxton Luo: Hey, Justin, I gave it another thought and...;<< Play (吳俊恩, MBU_吳俊恩_側站看外) >>;<< Play (羅龐安, MBU_羅龐安_正坐左看) >>;<< Play (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_工廠_看外) >>
Paxton Luo: Do you really think this is a good idea?
Justin Wu: Nothing will go wrong. Mr. Hsu has him covered.
Paxton Luo: ...;<< Play(羅龐安, MBU_羅龐安_正坐左看返回) >>;<< Play (吳俊恩, MBU_吳俊恩_側站看外返回) >>
Justin Wu: Listen, Jason.;<< Play (吳俊恩, MBU_吳俊恩_轉身) >>;<< Play (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_工廠_看外返回) >>
Justin Wu: Mr. Hsu may sound grumpy, but he's a very practical man.
Justin Wu: He appreciates talent, although sometimes the attitude may suggest otherwise.
Justin Wu: Whether you like it or not, this is your only opportunity, if Ops is what you want.
Justin Wu: Please take it seriously.
Justin Wu: Come on, we're about to begin.
<<#End>>

//吳俊恩走道操作組底部的一個升降平台

title: 操作前送架前的說明
body: //跟吳俊恩一起上平台後，他自動往前走。 Liam Hsu: Golgotha Mk. III, Vision's original automated racking system. Liam Hsu: This thing belongs in a museum. Thought: This is where they rack people up? Liam Hsu: What are you doing there? Come closer and watch! <> Liam Hsu: You know what we're doing here?;<< Play (楊冶平, MBU_楊冶平_背站炒菜) >> <<#Simple(99999)>> ->No. Liam Hsu: Ha! At least you're an honest kid.;<< Play (許世良, MBU_許世良_側站插腰抬頭) >> Liam Hsu: Better than another kid somewhere in this room. Yale Yang: Ahem!;<< Play (許世良, MBU_許世良_側站插腰抬頭返回) >> ->Yes. Liam Hsu: Tell me then. What do we do?;<< Play (許世良, MBU_許世良_側站插腰抬頭) >> <<#Simple(99999)>> ->We send people into the Cellar. ->We send those in the line out there to juicing. Liam Hsu: Hmph. About half right. << PlayUntil (許世良, MBU_許世良_側站插腰抬頭返回) >> <<#EndSimple>> <<#EndSimple>> Liam Hsu: You saw those juicers hanging up in the Cellar.;<< Play (吳俊恩, MBU_吳俊恩_側站看內) >> Liam Hsu: Before we rack them up, they must be prepared. Liam Hsu: Turn on the conveyor belt, Yale. Set mounting mode to manual.;<< Play (許世良, MBU_許世良_側站插腰看內) >> Yale Yang: Aye aye, captain!;<< PlayUntil (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_工廠_看內) >> //小楊跑去一台電腦(中控平台)旁邊動了一下。 Golgotha Mk. III: Unit entry. E-758. Howard Ho. //一個人被送了上來。可以看得出它虛弱的四處張望看起來很徬徨。 <<#End>>

title: 上車開出去一下以後
body:
//車子開到半路熄火無法發動
Paxton Luo: Eh?
Yale Yang: The gate is not working?;<<Play(楊冶平,MBU_楊冶平_坐車前傾)>>
Paxton Luo: Looks like...yes?;<<Play(羅龐安,MBU_羅龐安_坐車看外)>>
Yale Yang: Wow, this has to be more than a normal malfunction.;<<Play(楊冶平,MBU_楊冶平_坐車前傾返回)>>;<<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_坐車看內)>>
Paxton Luo: Probably. Screw this.
Paxton Luo: Maybe I can fix it. Let me try a remote restart.;//這裡胖胖在車上用平板之類的
Yale Yang: How bad exactly is the situation?;<<Play(楊冶平,MBU_楊冶平_坐車低頭)>>
Paxton Luo: No idea...;<<Play(羅龐安,MBU_羅龐安_坐車看外返回)>>
Paxton Luo: Hold on. Let me try something.;<<Play(羅龐安,MBU_羅龐安_坐車平板)>>
Yale Yang: Thanks, Packs.;<<Play(楊冶平,MBU_楊冶平_坐車低頭返回)>>;<<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_坐車看內返回)>>
<<#End>>

title: 神秘黑衣人攔查
body:
//兩人出電梯後，冶平往左走備站在路邊的黑衣人攔住，主角往前走一段以後也被攔住。
Shea Zhuang: You there!;<<Play(莊詩妍,MBU_莊詩妍_側站看外)>>
Shea Zhuang: Please come here for a moment.
Thought: What now?;<<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_看內)>>
<<Set($DLState,過去黑衣人那邊)>>
//黑衣人用掃描器掃一變主角的身體
Shea Zhuang: As a part of an ongoing investigation, I need to perform a full body scan on you.;<<PlayUntil(莊詩妍,MBU_莊詩妍_側站看外返回)>>;<< PlayUntil(莊詩妍,MBU_莊詩妍_側站抬頭)>>
Thought: ...Full body scan?
Shea Zhuang: This device will detect storage devices on you, if any.;<<PlayUntil(莊詩妍,MBU_莊詩妍_側站掃描)>>
Shea Zhuang: OK. You're clear.
<<#Simple(6)>>
->May I know what's going on?
->What are you scanning me for?
    Shea Zhuang: You're free to go now.
    Thought: ...What?
    <<#Simple(8)>>
    ->Why did you intercept me?
    ->You're not answering my questions.
        Shea Zhuang: I don't have to answer any of your questions.
    ->...
    <<#EndSimple>>
->...
<<#EndSimple>>
Shea Zhuang: Now, please go.
Thought: What the...?
<<#End>>

title: 跟阿姨回報
body: //一進房間發現一個黑衣男站在阿姨面前鎖住玩家 Eva Yeh: Wait. Someone's here... Sean Lu: Do not try to distract me, Ms. Yeh. Thought: What's going on here...? Eva Yeh: ... Eva Yeh: Let me repeat. Eva Yeh: I have no idea what you're talking about.;<< Play (陸石崇, MBU_陸石崇_側站看資料) >> Sean Lu: Our record shows 14 capsules were sent out from this office through the pneumatic tube three hours ago. Sean Lu: Right after the theft of confidential documents. Isn't the timing interesting? Sean Lu: We have to list you as a suspect, Ms. Yeh.;<< Play (陸石崇, MBU_陸石崇_側站看資料返回) >> Thought: She stole the company's confidential documents...? Eva Yeh: I see your point, and I am fully cooperating with your investigation.;<< Play (葉宜樺, MBU_葉宜樺_側坐抬手) >> Eva Yeh: You have already turned this office upside down. What else do you want? Eva Yeh: I know harassing people is your job. Vision hired you as a henchman.;<< Play (葉宜樺, MBU_葉宜樺_側坐抬手返回) >> Eva Yeh: Unlike you, I have real work to do. Eva Yeh: Don't trust me? OK. Go trace those 14 capsules. It's not that hard.;<< Play (葉宜樺, MBU_葉宜樺_側坐後躺) >> Sean Lu: ... Sean Lu: I'm about to inform you that we have located 13 out of them. Eva Yeh: ... Eva Yeh: Fast, aren't you?;<< Play (葉宜樺, MBU_葉宜樺_側坐後躺返回) >> Sean Lu: Said capsules contained trivial items, as we have found.;<< Play (陸石崇, MBU_陸石崇_側站低頭) >> Eva Yeh: Is sending trivial items against company regulations now? Sean Lu: We have good reasons to believe it's a distraction trick, Ms. Yeh.;<< Play (陸石崇, MBU_陸石崇_側站低頭返回) >> Eva Yeh: Really? What happened to the last capsule?;<< Play (葉宜樺, MBU_葉宜樺_側坐前傾) >> Eva Yeh: What, you can't locate it? Sean Lu: ... Sean Lu: You know where it is, and you know we are not authorized to search the farm supervisor's office.;<< Play (陸石崇, MBU_陸石崇_側站抬手) >> Thought: ...Farm supervisor?;<< Play (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_工廠_側站抬頭) >> Thought: That means Fran...;<< Play (陸石崇, MBU_陸石崇_側站抬手返回) >> Eva Yeh: Yes. You can't, unless she gives consent.;<< Play (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_工廠_側站抬頭返回) >> Eva Yeh: Unfortunately, she's not on the farm right now. Ms. Cheng works day shifts.;<< Play (葉宜樺, MBU_葉宜樺_側坐前傾返回) >> Thought: No! She came here together with me...;<< Play (陸石崇, MBU_陸石崇_側站低頭) >> Sean Lu: ... Sean Lu: Let me ask you one last time, Ms. Yeh. Sean Lu: Did you steal confidential documents and send them to the farm supervisor's office through the pneumatic tube system?;<< Play (陸石崇, MBU_陸石崇_側站低頭返回) >> Eva Yeh: Let me say this one last time. Eva Yeh: I did NOT. Eva Yeh: Go, tell your boss to contact the farm supervisor tomorrow morning.;<< Play (葉宜樺, MBU_葉宜樺_側坐手指) >> Eva Yeh: Only a matter of time, isn't it? Sean Lu: ...;<< Play (葉宜樺, MBU_葉宜樺_側坐手指返回) >>;<< Play (陸石崇, MBU_陸石崇_側站看資料) >> Sean Lu: True. Matter of time. Sean Lu: I was just informed that the supervisor, Ms. Cheng, is here right now. Sean Lu: That solves a big problem. We have an appointment with her in 30 minutes.;<< Play (陸石崇, MBU_陸石崇_側站看資料返回) >> Thought: She's visibly shocked... Thought: Damn, did she really do it?;<< Play (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_工廠_側站低頭) >> Thought: Is Fran aware of it, or dragged into this mess against her will? Sean Lu: I'm sincerely offering you one last chance to come clean.;<< Play (陸石崇, MBU_陸石崇_側站抬手) >> Sean Lu: If you insist, then be my guest.;<< Play (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_工廠_側站低頭返回) >> Eva Yeh: I have nothing to hide.;<< Play (陸石崇, MBU_陸石崇_側站抬手返回) >> Sean Lu: Goodbye, Ms. Yeh.;<< Play (陸石崇, MBU_陸石崇_側站點頭) >> Eva Yeh: Fuck off.;<< Play (葉宜樺, MBU_葉宜樺_側坐低頭) >> //黑衣人離開 <> Eva Yeh: ... Eva Yeh: ... Eva Yeh: *Sigh* Eva Yeh: Come here, Jason Dai. <<#End>> //阿姨信任評審機制 //阿姨爆氣or普通or四人對待都很好 //阿偉是否推爆主角 //拉拉桿 //在一兩個日常事件

title: 調查物件: 電梯使用說明
body: //說明電梯會辨識臉跟制服，然後有要去地上區的人會先用。

title: 說服程芳不要交檔案
body: //這裡還有個情境士阿姨不信主角，所以直接衝過來 //知道的事情分成1.拿東西2.跟程芳拿東西3.阿姨是主管4.說謊 //分成主角先到還有主角後到 Yuna Hsu: ... Thought: She's watching me, confused.;<> Frances Cheng: What's the matter?;<>;<>;<> Yuna Hsu: This is...?;<>;<> Frances Cheng: Oh, he is...;<> <<#Simple(8)>> ->I'm Fran's boyfriend. <<@接露主角是芳德男友也>> Yuna Hsu: Ah, huh...!? Thought: She's genuinely surprised... Thought: So surprised that I'm about to take offense...;<> Yuna Hsu: Really?;<> Frances Cheng: Um, yes, really!;<> Frances Cheng: Sorry I never told you about him. This is a private matter, you know.;<> Yuna Hsu: I thought we were good friends, Frances.;<> Frances Cheng: I'm sorry. You know I'm a bit obsessive-compulsive when it comes to privacy...;<> Yuna Hsu: It's OK. I'm just not prepared for the news.;<> <<#GoTo(@繼續討論主角能不能留下來聽聽)>> ->I report to Ms. Cheng, for work. Yuna Hsu: Really? Are you sure now is a good time? Frances Cheng: Wait, Yuna. Actually... ->... <<#EndSimple>> Frances Cheng: Yeah. Frances Cheng: He's my boyfriend, haha...;<> <<#GoTo(@接露主角是芳德男友也)>> <<@繼續討論主角能不能留下來聽聽>> Yuna Hsu: Back to the subject.;<> Yuna Hsu: About Ms. Eva Yeh's theft of confidential documents from the Red Room. Thought: The Red Room...? Yuna Hsu: She caught us by surprise. This is an emergency investigation, so I don't have time to get a search warrant. Yuna Hsu: But since we are friends, I hope you can just hand the hard drive over. Frances Cheng: ... Frances Cheng: What happens to me... <<@芳反問徐媛啊我是會怎樣？>> Frances Cheng: If this hard drive does contain confidential documents? Yuna Hsu: ...;<>;<> Yuna Hsu: Nothing happens. Yuna Hsu: You said you didn't check its contents. Frances Cheng: But it's been in my possession for a while.;<> Yuna Hsu: True. Because of that, we will have to perform a routine investigation on you. Yuna Hsu: But don't worry. I am in full charge of it.;<> Yuna Hsu: The investigation is no more than a casual talk, as long as I trust you. Frances Cheng: As long as...;<>;<> Frances Cheng: We have known each other for years, Yuna.;<> Frances Cheng: You hardly trusted anybody, ever. Plus, given the situation, you have all the reasons to suspect me. Frances Cheng: How can I convince you to trust me? Yuna Hsu: Simple enough. Hand the hard drive over.;<> Yuna Hsu: Don't think. Don't hesitate. Hand it over. Right now.;<> Yuna Hsu: That makes a good enough reason for me to trust you. <<#Simple(12)>> ->Even if she hands it over, you still see Fran as a suspect. I'm not that naïve. <<@徐媛說主角的身分很可疑欸>> Yuna Hsu: You know what?;<> Yuna Hsu: Frances is OK. Right now I'm more interested in you.;<> Yuna Hsu: ... Yuna Hsu: I didn't want to say it out loud, but you made me. Yuna Hsu: You're one of the Downstairs staff, aren't you, Jason Dai? Yuna Hsu: That means you report to Eva Yeh. Frances Cheng: Hey, Yuna... Yuna Hsu: Do I have a reason to believe you're sent here by Eva Yeh to retrieve the hard drive? Yuna Hsu: What will I find if I check the surveillance camera footage from a few minutes ago? Yuna Hsu: Maybe, something like you going into and out of Eva Yeh's office? Frances Cheng: Yuna, you're being paranoid. This is only his second day at work...;<> Yuna Hsu: Even more suspicious. Joining the company right before the theft. Yuna Hsu: And being here with us right after it.;<> Yuna Hsu: And, funny, he happens to be the farm supervisor's boyfriend? Frances Cheng: That is— Yuna Hsu: Enough. Yuna Hsu: Just give me the hard drive, Frances.;<> Yuna Hsu: Cooperate with me, you both, if you don't want this to get worse. Yuna Hsu: The sooner we catch the mastermind, the sooner you're in the clear.;<> Yuna Hsu: Think about it, Frances. Frances Cheng: ...;<> Thought: Damn! What have I done!? Thought: Because of me, Fran is now more of a suspect no matter what she does... Thought: Or maybe I should tell her about Eva Yeh. Fran and I shouldn't have been involved in the first place...;<> <<#Simple(12)>> ->Eva Yeh did steal the documents. I know it. Frances Cheng: What!?;<>;<> Yuna Hsu: Oh? Yuna Hsu: How did you know it? <<#Simple(99999)>> ->She asked me to retrieve the hard drive before you get hold of it. ->Believe it or not, she told me. Yuna Hsu: And you're her accomplice? <<#Simple(99999)>> ->No. I was dragged into this against my will. Yuna Hsu: Because she dragged Frances into this without her knowing? ->What do you think? Yuna Hsu: I think you're just an innocent man, desperate to protect his girlfriend. <<#EndSimple>> Frances Cheng: J... Yuna Hsu: Name your conditions. How can I make you willing to testify? <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Promise to keep both Fran and me out of this mess. Yuna Hsu: Not a problem. That much I can promise. Yuna Hsu: Do you feel comfortable backstabbing Eva Yeh, though? <<#Simple(99999)>> ->She backstabbed us first. Yuna Hsu: Well said, Mr. Dai. Yuna Hsu: I agree very much with the way you see things. Yuna Hsu: You wouldn't, and shouldn't, be responsible for other people's mistakes.;<> Yuna Hsu: The right mindset. Frances Cheng: ...I won't agree. <<@芳芳不爽主角背叛葉宜樺>> Yuna Hsu: You think he should stay with Eva Yeh on a sinking ship?;<> Frances Cheng: I can't ask that of him, or judge his decisions.;<>;<> Yuna Hsu: But? Frances Cheng: But I wouldn't do this if I were him.;<> //這裡芳有點生氣，但他事後會解釋因為他知道葉宜樺是在做好事。主角又不知道，但其實葉宜樺有說他是在做好是讓玩家心虛。 Thought: Is Fran angry with me? Yuna Hsu: OK. You love birds could settle differences at home. Yuna Hsu: I have work to do. As to the hard drive...;<> Yuna Hsu: ...;<> Yuna Hsu: Now that Mr. Dai is willing to testify against Eva Yeh, I don't really need it at the moment. Frances Cheng: ...;<> Thought: Fran is hesitating... Thought: What's on her mind? Frances Cheng: Since you've made the promise, here, you can have it.;<> Yuna Hsu: You're cooperating? Without a search warrant or definite evidence?;<> Frances Cheng: J is the definite evidence. You can take the hard drive now. <>;<> <>;<> <>;<> Yuna Hsu: Thank you for making my life easier.;<> <<#GoTo(@硬碟說服對話事件收尾)>>;<>;//2不幫葉宜樺而且怪她(或是不在乎) ->Can you shelter her from charges, too? Yuna Hsu: Of course not. She is the prime suspect. <<#Simple(6)>> ->Well. Yuna Hsu: Ouch, that was cold. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Yuna Hsu: You don't seem very happy, Frances...;<> <<#GoTo(@芳芳不爽主角背叛葉宜樺)>> <<#EndSimple>> ->Promise to keep me, Fran, and Ms. Yeh out of this. Yuna Hsu: Then what? Show my boss a hard disk and tell him there's no suspect at all? Yuna Hsu: Don't be silly. I can vouch for you two. No more. <<#Simple(12)>> ->No deal, then. Thought: What!? Thought: No, Eva Yeh is expendable for the sake of Fran... Yuna Hsu: For Eva Yeh? Are you sure? <<#Simple(99999)>> ->I'm sure. Yuna Hsu: *Sigh* Yuna Hsu: Aren't you saying something, Frances?;<>;<> Frances Cheng: ...;<> Frances Cheng: I fully support Jason's decisions.;<> Yuna Hsu: I take it as you won't hand over the hard drive? Frances Cheng: Right. Let's go through the due process.;<> Yuna Hsu: Wonderful. Great.;<>;<> Yuna Hsu: We have nothing to talk about, then. <> <<#GoTo(@硬碟說服對話事件收尾)>>;<>;//1出賣但同時挺葉宜樺 ->I take it back. Please keep me and Fran safe. <<#EndSimple>> ->OK. Just keeping us safe will do. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Yuna Hsu: Giving up so easily? Yuna Hsu: Looks like you didn't really want to help Eva Yeh after all. Only trying to ease your guilt. Frances Cheng: Yuna...;<> Yuna Hsu: I know, I know.;<> Yuna Hsu: Since Mr. Dai is willing to testify against Eva Yeh, I don't really need it at the moment. Frances Cheng: ...;<>;<> Thought: Fran is hesitating... Thought: What's on her mind? Frances Cheng: Since you've made the promise, here, you can have the documents.;<> Yuna Hsu: You're cooperating? Without a search warrant or definite evidence? Frances Cheng: J is the definite evidence. You can take the hard drive now. <>;<> <>;<> <>;<> Yuna Hsu: Thank you for making my life easier.;<> <<#GoTo(@硬碟說服對話事件收尾)>>;<>;//3出賣然後要挺幫葉宜樺但後來反悔(芳不怪主角臨陣退縮) <<#EndSimple>> <<#EndSimple>> ->Give it to her, Fran. Yuna Hsu: A wise call. Yuna Hsu: Don't resist, Frances. You're only making things worse. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Frances Cheng: ...;<> Frances Cheng: OK. Here it is.;<> Frances Cheng: But you must promise me to leave Jason alone.;<> Yuna Hsu: By which, you mean keeping him out of the investigation? Thought: Fran is grilling her with a hard stare. Yuna Hsu: *Sigh* Don't be like that, Frances...;<> Yuna Hsu: Mr. Dai is a legitimate suspect. I can't just delete him from the list without a good explanation.;<> Yuna Hsu: But I promise to be easy on him.;<> Yuna Hsu: If he's proven innocent, the company will not press charges or administer punishment. Yuna Hsu: Is that good enough? Frances Cheng: ...;<> Frances Cheng: Yes. Thought: I made a burden for Fran...;<> Yuna Hsu: Good. Now hand it over.;<> <>;<>;<> <>;<> Yuna Hsu: Thank you. Yuna Hsu: I will leave you alone, then.;<> <<#GoTo(@硬碟說服對話事件收尾)>>;<>;//4芳保護主角而不得不交硬碟 ->Do you promise? Yuna Hsu: Promise? Ha! <<#GoTo(@徐媛說主角的身分很可疑欸)>> ->... <<#EndSimple>> Frances Cheng: ...;<> Frances Cheng: OK. Here is the hard drive.;<>;<> <>;<> <>;<> <>;<> Thought: This is a valid solution... Thought: Now she should let go of Fran. Yuna Hsu: A wise decision, Frances.;<> Yuna Hsu: I'm taking it to HQ. We will get to the bottom of this soon enough. <>;//5玩家沒插嘴，芳也為了避免嫌疑其實直接給就好 <<#GoTo(@硬碟說服對話事件收尾)>> <<@硬碟說服對話事件收尾>> <> <<#Wait(0.5)>> <> Frances Cheng: ...;<>;//芳在沉思，徐媛站起來 Frances Cheng: Yuna.;<> Yuna Hsu: Hm? Frances Cheng: Have you found any motive? Why is Ms. Yeh doing this? Yuna Hsu: It's always for the money, of course. Yuna Hsu: Anything from the Red Room will fetch a handsome price on the black market. Frances Cheng: But I don't think she's the money type.;<> Yuna Hsu: Honestly, I don't think she's the type, either.;<> Yuna Hsu: But motive isn't important. She did what she did.;<> Frances Cheng: ... Yuna Hsu: *Sigh* You might want to keep this in mind, Frances.;<> Yuna Hsu: I have been in this position for 3 years. We have information theft cases every single month. Yuna Hsu: In every single case, the mole ends up in prison.;<> Yuna Hsu: No one escapes Vision's investigations. Yuna Hsu: Never before. Won't be any in the future. Yuna Hsu: I don't know what you're planning, Frances.;<> Yuna Hsu: But I think you will be better off, with that in mind. Yuna Hsu: Good night, you two. Frances Cheng: Bye. <<#Simple(6)>> ->Bye. ->... <<#EndSimple>> <<#End>>

title: 芳的硬碟事件後對話
body: //電梯裡被套話 //有點出說謊 //1(不交)電梯露餡，但堅持挺葉宜樺。 //2(交)電梯露餡，不幫葉宜樺而且怪她(或是不在乎) //3(交)電梯露餡，要幫葉宜樺但後來反悔(芳不怪主角臨陣退縮) //4(交)電梯露餡，芳保護主角而不得不交硬碟 //5(交)電梯沒露餡，但最後為了避免嫌疑其實直接給就好 //6(交)電梯沒露餡，但怕交硬碟，徐媛到時候又怪程芳，所以乾脆抖出葉宜樺 //7(交)電梯沒露餡，但怕交硬碟，徐媛到時候又怪程芳，所以乾脆抖出葉宜樺(不爽她) //8(交)不信任路線 //徐媛一走程芳就拿出電腦(或是可以看東西的設備)開始認真操作 Thought: Phew! That was a close one...;<> Frances Cheng: Phew...;<>;<> <<#Simple(10)>> ->Finally got rid of her. Frances Cheng: Yeah. ->Are you alright, Fran? Frances Cheng: I am. ->Do you know each other? Frances Cheng: For a long time. We used to be colleagues. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Thought: She's very concerned... Frances Cheng: ... Frances Cheng: I saw what's on the hard drive. Thought: What!? <<#Simple(10)>> ->What!? ->Why did you do that!? ->... <<#EndSimple>> Frances Cheng: The hard drive arrived together with the usual mail. I happened to be in the office. Frances Cheng: So I plugged it in without thinking.;<> <<#Simple(10)>> ->That puts you in danger! Frances Cheng: I couldn't have known back then. Thought: She's right... ->What's in it? ->... <<#EndSimple>> Frances Cheng: ... Frances Cheng: Nothing technical. Certainly not anything related to the Red Room. Thought: But Yuna Hsu was very serious...?;<> <<#Simple(10)>> ->Was Yuna Hsu lying to us? Frances Cheng: Or maybe someone is lying to her. Frances Cheng: Her boss could be trying to cover things up, using the Red Room as an excuse. Frances Cheng: Something above her security clearance. ->Maybe it's something beyond your knowledge? Frances Cheng: No such thing. Frances Cheng: I know everything about this farm. ->Maybe there are hidden files? Frances Cheng: Could be... ->... <<#EndSimple>> <> Frances Cheng: I need to examine these files again.;<>;//芳拿出硬碟 //有交 <<#If($FangHardwareSpySceneEnding>1)>> Thought: Didn't Fran give the hard drive out...? Frances Cheng: I made a copy. Frances Cheng: I could tell there's something special about this hard drive, although not exactly what. So I made a copy right away. <<#Simple(8)>> ->You shouldn't have! What if they find out? Frances Cheng: They won't. Thought: There it is again, her stubborn side... ->Awesome! Frances Cheng: Thank you. Thought: An appreciative smile. ->... <<#EndSimple>> <<#EndIf>> Frances Cheng: Yeah. <<#Simple(8)>> ->What documents are they? ->How could you tell there's something wrong with them? Frances Cheng: A heap of what looks like random files, no clear theme. Frances Cheng: A perfect mess to hide secrets in... ->... <<#EndSimple>> Frances Cheng: I need a few minutes. Hold on... Frances Cheng: ...;<> Frances Cheng: ... //程芳: 搞定。 Frances Cheng: What the...!?;<>;<> Frances Cheng: Damn it! Frances Cheng: They can't be... Frances Cheng: No, no way...;<> Thought: She looks terrified. What has she found...? <<#Simple(8)>> ->What is it? Tell me. Frances Cheng: I... Frances Cheng: This is... ->Are you OK? You're terribly pale. Frances Cheng: I'm OK, but this... ->... <<#EndSimple>> Frances Cheng: Sorry, J, I can't explain right now.;<> Frances Cheng: I must do something. I-I must go.;<> Thought: Damn! I know that look! Thought: That's her ready-to-die-for-the-greater-good face! No, I can't let her! <<#Simple(15)>> ->I don't know what you're planning to do, but please don't. //放生葉宜樺(2) <<#If($FangHardwareSpySceneEnding=2)>> Frances Cheng: I knew you wouldn't care. <<#GoTo(@芳芳質疑主角背叛宜樺所以不會在乎2)>> <<#EndIf>> //沒放生葉宜樺或挺葉宜樺到底 Frances Cheng: Sorry, I can't.;<> <<#GoTo(@芳說明她要去找嚴勝和對質哩)>> ->Calm down, and tell me what is happening. //放生葉宜樺(2) <<#If($FangHardwareSpySceneEnding=2)>> Frances Cheng: I am calm!;<> Frances Cheng: I'm running out of time. Every second counts! Frances Cheng: Explaining it to you won't change anything.;<> <<#GoTo(@芳芳質疑主角背叛宜樺所以不會在乎)>> <<#EndIf>> //沒放生葉宜樺或挺葉宜樺到底 Frances Cheng: No, I'm out of time...;<> <<#GoTo(@芳說明她要去找嚴勝和對質哩)>> ->I can help. Let me help. //放生葉宜樺(2) <<#If($FangHardwareSpySceneEnding=2)>> Frances Cheng: Oh? <<@芳芳質疑主角背叛宜樺所以不會在乎>> Frances Cheng: Do you care? <<@芳芳質疑主角背叛宜樺所以不會在乎2>> Thought: What's she talking about? Frances Cheng: After backstabbing Ms. Yeh!;<> Frances Cheng: She believed in you! With her cause, with so many people's lives! Thought: Why is she so angry? I just...;<> Frances Cheng: You don't care, never cared!;<> Frances Cheng: All you care is about yourself, about...;<> Frances Cheng: About me!;<> Frances Cheng: All the time, all you care is about me... Thought: She's sobbing... Frances Cheng: But I... <<#Simple(12)>> ->Please. I don't want anything to happen to you. Frances Cheng: ... ->Yes. All I care is about you. Please... Frances Cheng: Please let me do what I have to do. ->It's not like that. I really want to help. Frances Cheng: No. You really want to keep me here. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Frances Cheng: You're always like this, never showing me any support... Frances Cheng: I'm not like you. I can't... Frances Cheng: ... Thought: What now? What have I done wrong?;<> Frances Cheng: ... Frances Cheng: ...;<> Frances Cheng: ... Frances Cheng: Sorry, J...;<> Frances Cheng: I lost control. I didn't mean it...;<> Frances Cheng: You had no idea what Ms. Yeh was planning. I shouldn't judge you.
