Justin Wu: Didn't you ask her about the Cellar? //沒觸發過地窖對話 <<#If($TalkTsaiShinAboutCellarBefore=false)>> <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Nope. ->I didn't know she's been there. Justin Wu: Huh... <<#EndSimple>> <<#EndIf>> //有觸發過地窖對話 <<#If($TalkTsaiShinAboutCellarBefore=true)>> Thought: She did say something about the Cellar yesterday... <<#Simple(99999)>> ->She said it's a big and suffocating place. Justin Wu: I see.;<> Justin Wu: She's doing a much better job than I did. Thought: I don't think it's any better, though... <> ->She's kind of vague, too. Justin Wu: Really?;<> Justin Wu: You will see for yourself. <> <<#EndSimple>> <<#EndIf>> <<#GoTo(@跟俊恩等電梯問問題時間)>> ->Ops doesn't get along with Screening? ($AskControlFilterBadRelate) <> <> Justin Wu: About that... Thought: He seems surprised by my question.;<> Justin Wu: ... Justin Wu: I would be lying if I said no.;<> Justin Wu: But it's complicated. Justin Wu: The short version is... Justin Wu: The Screening team has no idea about how flop farms work. Total ignorance.;<> Justin Wu: Because of this, we have many disagreements over decisions and plans. <<#Simple(8)>> ->They don't know how this farm works? ->Disagreements, like what? Justin Wu: Hmm... Justin Wu: I suppose that should be saved for later, when you get to see what we do. Justin Wu: I will go over the specifics when we are down there. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Justin Wu: I believe our disagreements are fundamentally down to the difference of knowledge. Justin Wu: The same thing will happen over and over again, until we are on the same page.;<> Thought: He sounds resigned. Justin Wu: But who knows? Maybe things could change. Justin Wu: Ms. Yeh is trying to break down the barrier. You are one of the bridges. Justin Wu: I don't expect much out of it, but a change is a change.;<> Justin Wu: That was a good question. Anything else you want to know?;<> <<#GoTo(@跟俊恩等電梯問問題時間)>> ->What is Cathy doing at Ops? ($AskTsaiShinWhyCellar);//玩家可能不知道這件事 <> <> Justin Wu: Cathy? Justin Wu: She's under training, learning the fundamentals of Silencio's systems. //判斷有沒有讓他跟球球吵過 <<#If($JoinedBallTsaiShinFight=true)>> Thought: Training? Thought: But she told QQ she's just "helping Ops out"...? <<#Simple(6)>> ->She said she's just helping you guys out. Justin Wu: Hmm... <<#Simple(6)>> ->Cathy wants to transfer to Ops, am I right? Justin Wu: Ugh, about that... ->... <<#EndSimple>> ->... <<#EndSimple>> <<#EndIf>> Justin Wu: You mean, she never talked to anybody about it? <<#Simple(99999)>> ->I didn't ask. ->She never shared anything with us. Justin Wu: In that case, maybe she doesn't want others to know?;<> Justin Wu: If she wants to keep it private, I respect her decisions. Justin Wu: ...;<> Justin Wu: Let's talk about something else. I suppose Cathy wouldn't want people to know too much.;<> <<#Simple(10)>> ->You're worrying too much. ->What made you think that? Justin Wu: As far as I can tell, she's a sensitive girl. Justin Wu: She cares a lot about peer opinions. So, let's not dwell on this subject. <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Peer? Anyone specific? Justin Wu: I'm not sure. Maybe those close with her.;<> <<#Simple(6)>> ->I still want to know what Cathy is doing there. <<#GoTo(@追問采欣話題讓俊恩戒備不開心)>> ->... <<#EndSimple>> ->I see. <<#GoTo(@不繼續糾纏恩恩問采欣的事情)>> ->I'm still curious. <> <<@追問采欣話題讓俊恩戒備不開心>> Justin Wu: Sorry. I won't let you pursue this subject. Thought: He's getting irritated. <<#Simple(8)>> ->Come on, just a little bit more?;//一直逼俊恩/////////////////////////////////////////////////// Justin Wu: I mean it when I said no more. Thought: Oops, he's starting to get angry now... ->OK. I'll stop here. Justin Wu: *Deep breath* <<#GoTo(@不繼續糾纏恩恩問采欣的事情)>> ->... <<#EndSimple>> <<#EndSimple>> ->You're right. <<@不繼續糾纏恩恩問采欣的事情>> Justin Wu: Thank you.;<> <<#Simple(8)>> ->What for? Justin Wu: For not forcing me.;<> Justin Wu: If you keep pushing, I'll run out of ways to say no without being offensive. Justin Wu: I don't want to offend you, and I don't want to fail Cathy.;<> Thought: This is what I call "overly considerate"... <<#Simple(8)>> ->You're, um, very considerate. Justin Wu: They say I'm obsessive-compulsive.;<> Justin Wu: I know I'm kind of nitpicky all the time. Justin Wu: Hopefully you don't mind.;<> Thought: An awkward smile, trying to cover up more awkwardness. ->Sorry for giving you a hard time. Justin Wu: It's nothing. My fault.;<> Justin Wu: I know I'm kind of nitpicky all the time. Justin Wu: Hopefully you don't mind. Thought: An awkward smile, trying to cover up more awkwardness.;<> ->... <<#EndSimple>> ->I should thank you. Thought: ...Why did I say that? Justin Wu: Huh? Why? <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Thank you for letting me know. Or I could have stepped on her landmines. Justin Wu: Right. You can't be too careful around sensitive people like Cathy. Thought: Huh, I didn't know that. ->I don't want to make her life hard. Justin Wu: You're a considerate man. Thought: You call this considerate, huh... <<#EndSimple>> ->... <<#EndSimple>> ->...;<> <<#EndSimple>> Justin Wu: Let's talk about something else. <<#EndSimple>> <<#GoTo(@跟俊恩等電梯問問題時間)>> ->I have no more questions. ($ElevatorJunEnAskCount) Justin Wu: Acknowledged. <<#EndSimple>> <> <<@第一次地窖電梯可以來了>> <<#End>> //兩人淡入淡出進電梯 //以後主角自己搭要安排讓玩家等電梯，然後有人出現排隊，一起淡入淡出。

title: 地窖電梯間
body:
Justin Wu: OK, here we are.
Thought: That was a loooooong ride...;<<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_側站抬頭)>>
Thought: How deep exactly are we...?
Justin Wu: I need to do what Rose asked first. Be right back.;<<PlayUntil(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_側站抬頭返回)>>
<<#End>>

title: 俊恩停在地窖中間
body:
//攝影機拉遠看整個地窖，然後俊恩把車停在一個中間
Justin Wu: This is the Cellar.
Thought: Wow, this is...;<<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_坐車看內)>>
Justin Wu: You can't quite tell from here. Those little dots up there are racked juicers.
Thought: Hanging from the ceiling, like sausages...?
Justin Wu: Part of our job is to rack up juicers sent down by Screening.
Justin Wu: What do you think? Not as expected?
<<#Simple(99999)>>
->I thought they should be in pods, or something.
->I thought the setup should be more futuristic-ish.
    Justin Wu: I know what you mean.
    Justin Wu: I thought the same before coming down here for the first time.
->No. I was kinda expecting this.
    Justin Wu: Were you? I'm surprised.
    Justin Wu: So far as I've seen, most outsiders expect something more...
    Justin Wu: Cozy.
    Justin Wu: This is the ugly side of flop farms that they don't want the world to see.
<<#EndSimple>>

Justin Wu: It makes sense, though, if you think about it...
Justin Wu: To have so many people racked up at the same time, they can't afford to make the system too fancy.
Justin Wu: Here at Silencio we use outdated hardware. But newer systems aren't much better. Cost control is key.
Justin Wu: The objective is to rack up as many people as possible. Economy of scale.
Thought: ...;<<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_坐車看內返回)>>
Justin Wu: Let's keep going.
<<#End>>

title: 抵達操作組停車間
安裝發送走廊說明
body:
//俊恩走到安裝機器前面，有一些作業員在維修和看面板

Justin Wu: This is the sending row. Juicers line up here, wait to be racked up.;<< Play (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_工廠_看內) >>
Justin Wu: This machine will keep them in place, inject necessary fluids, and mount juicing hardware.;<< Play (吳俊恩, MBU_吳俊恩_背站抬頭) >>
Justin Wu: Then they're moved into the Cellar. This whole process is called "racking".;<< Play (吳俊恩, MBU_吳俊恩_背站抬頭返回) >>
<<#Simple(8)>>
->Does it hurt?
->Doesn't look comfortable.
    Justin Wu: Frankly, I don't know. Never tried it myself.;<< Play (吳俊恩, MBU_吳俊恩_背站低頭) >>
    Justin Wu: ...
    Justin Wu: But I guess it can't be very enjoyable.;<< Play (吳俊恩, MBU_吳俊恩_背站低頭返回) >>
->...
<<#EndSimple>>
Justin Wu: These people are candidates sent down by Screening.
Thought: They look kind of doped.
Justin Wu: They are put into protective suits, provided by the farm, before racking.;<< Play (吳俊恩, MBU_吳俊恩_背站左看) >>
Justin Wu: Beneath Silencio, we have a total of ten Cellars like this one.;<< Play (朱平皓, MBU_朱平皓_背站左看) >>
Harold Zhu: Hey, Justin!
Justin Wu: Is it break time?;<< Play (吳俊恩, MBU_吳俊恩_背站左看返回) >>
Harold Zhu: Yeah. Will start racking soon.
Justin Wu: Thank you for your hard work.
Harold Zhu: Nah, your work is harder.;<< Play (黃世婷, MBU_黃世婷_背站右看) >>
Stella Huang: My work is probably harder still!;<< Play (吳俊恩, MBU_吳俊恩_背站左看) >>
Harold Zhu: Shut up.;<< Play (黃世婷, MBU_黃世婷_背站右看返回) >>
Justin Wu: It's about time. Let's keep moving.;<< Play (吳俊恩, MBU_吳俊恩_背站左看返回) >>;<< Play (朱平皓, MBU_朱平皓_背站左看返回) >>
<<#End>>

title: 劉漢銘可憐事件
body:
//俊恩走到隊伍的一半，突然一個人伸手抓住主角。
Hank Liu: You! You...!;<<Set($DLState,吳俊恩發現怪怪的走回來)>>
Thought: Hank Liu...!?
Thought: He looks...weird. Those bloodshot eyes.
<<#Simple(4)>>
->Let go!
->Are you OK?
->...
<<#EndSimple>>
Hank Liu: I don't know. I fit, f-fail, feel...
Justin Wu: Calm down. It's going to be OK.;<< Play (吳俊恩, MBU_吳俊恩_側站微慌) >>
Hank Liu: You...?;<< Play (劉漢銘, MBU_劉漢銘_排隊右看) >>;//看向吳俊恩
Hank Liu: I no know you. I know him. I...
Hank Liu: You let me in. Y-you say...;<< Play (吳俊恩, MBU_吳俊恩_側站微慌返回) >>
Hank Liu: S-sssafe. I'm safe, no?
Hank Liu: I'm safe. I w-won't...??
Thought: I don't know what to say...
<<#Simple(99999)>>
->This is absolutely safe. Relax.
    Hank Liu: Go-go-good.
    Hank Liu: Gooood.;<< Play (劉漢銘, MBU_劉漢銘_排隊呆滯) >>;<< Play (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_工廠_被劉放) >>
->I'm not sure.
->You asked to come here. Don't blame me.
    Hank Liu: Bbbbut...
    Hank Liu: I di-ddidn't know...;<< Play (劉漢銘, MBU_劉漢銘_排隊呆滯) >>;<< Play (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_工廠_被劉放) >>
<<#EndSimple>>
Hank Liu: I—
//劉漢銘低下頭變得垂頭喪氣的感覺
Thought: He suddenly froze, mid-sentence.
Justin Wu: The tranquilizer is kicking in.
<<#Simple(6)>>
->What!?
->...
<<#EndSimple>>
Justin Wu: It's only natural to panic once they see what's going on here.;<< Play (吳俊恩, MBU_吳俊恩_側站看內) >>
Justin Wu: To keep thing smooth and safe, juicers are given tranquilizer and muscle relaxant before racking.
Justin Wu: That way they won't thrash around, which could harm themselves.
Thought: That's why they are like zombies.;<< Play (吳俊恩, MBU_吳俊恩_側站看內返回) >>
Justin Wu: Terrible, huh?
<<#Simple(99999)>>
->Yeah.
    Justin Wu: ...;<< Play (吳俊恩, MBU_吳俊恩_側站低頭) >>
->I see you don't have any alternative.
    Justin Wu: Yeah.;<< Play (吳俊恩, MBU_吳俊恩_側站低頭) >>
    Justin Wu: This is the only way...
<<#EndSimple>>
Justin Wu: Unlike Screening, we have to deal with this, day in, day out.
Thought: ...
Justin Wu: Let's keep moving.;<< Play (吳俊恩, MBU_吳俊恩_側站低頭返回) >>
<<#End>>
//俊恩走到操作組，進入操作組

title: 陳家騏抱怨賴潔
body:
//俊恩往下走，一個人。
Kaylee Chen: Justin! Do you have a minute? I—
Justin Wu: Sorry, I'm occupied.;<< Play (吳俊恩, MBU_吳俊恩_側站抬手) >>
Kaylee Chen: I will keep it short. Jesse—;<<Play(陳家騏,MBU_陳家騏_側站插腰)>>
<<#End>>

title: 跟賴潔胖胖第一次見面
body: Justin Wu: Jesse. Huh. Jesse Lai: Oh hi! Welcome back!;//慌忙把再吃的東西藏起來，不跳想法要玩家自己調查 Justin Wu: What's with that fake smile? Jesse Lai: Fake? What are you talking about? Justin Wu: You know what. Justin Wu: Plus, Kaylee was complaining again, about you— Jesse Lai: AHA! Jesse Lai: Where's Cathy? She's not with you?;<< Play (羅龐安, MBU_羅龐安_正坐左看) >> Thought: They all know Cathy, huh...;<< Play (吳俊恩, MBU_吳俊恩_側站抬頭) >> Justin Wu: Cathy? She's back to Screening. Justin Wu: Hold on. Don't try to distract me!;<< Play (吳俊恩, MBU_吳俊恩_側站抬頭返回) >> Justin Wu: I told you over and over again. Don't redo other people's work. You're making teamwork impossible.;<< Play (吳俊恩, MBU_吳俊恩_側站插腰) >> Jesse Lai: I told you over and over again. I don't need teamwork!;<< Play (賴潔, MBU_賴潔_斜坐傻眼) >> <<#End>>

title: 雙組員來報告
body:
Penelope Lai: My work is done, Justin.
Justin Wu: Did you follow procedure E5? I don't want to see any more compliance issues.
Penelope Lai: Yessir. Strictly following E5.;<< Play (賴羽嬪, MBU_賴羽嬪_側站點頭) >>
Justin Wu: Good. Take a break.
Penelope Lai: Thanks, Justin.
<<Set($DLState,賴羽嬪離開)>>
//賴走出操作組透過玻璃還能看到他在在走道上前往地窖的方向
//後面一個人往前走一步
Wyatt Ke: Hey, Justin!
Justin Wu: Hey. How are things going?;<< Play (吳俊恩, MBU_吳俊恩_側站抬手) >>
Wyatt Ke: Not bad. I finally bypassed the loop. Thanks for your help.
Justin Wu: It's a makeshift fix. Don't forget to locate the root cause.;<< Play (吳俊恩, MBU_吳俊恩_側站抬手返回) >>
Wyatt Ke: Roger. Will do!;<< Play (柯義偉, MBU_柯義偉_側站點頭) >>
<<Set($DLState,柯義偉離開)>>
Thought: This is very unlike Screening. They are meticulous, like clockwork.
Thought: Don't think their asshole lead could manage it, though. Justin must be the one doing all the management work.;<< Play (吳俊恩, MBU_吳俊恩_側站看外) >>
Justin Wu: Come over here, Jason.;<< Play (吳俊恩, MBU_吳俊恩_側站看外返回) >>
<<#End>>

title: 作業員雙人組路過對話
body:
Liam Hsu: And you call yourself a racker?
Yale Yang: But I—
Liam Hsu: You don't know half about your job!
Yale Yang: I'm not experienced like you, OK?
Liam Hsu: Then you live and learn!
<<#End>>

title: 送架展示第一步驟
body:
Liam Hsu: Yale will demonstrate how racking is done. Basically, you do everything with this console.;<< Play (許世良, MBU_許世良_側站插腰看內返回) >>;<< PlayUntil (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_工廠_看內返回) >>
Liam Hsu: The process is simple enough, but we can't afford to get anything wrong.
Liam Hsu: Now you watch.
<< PlayUntil (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_工廠_看內) >>
Liam Hsu: First, knock the juicer out, in case he struggles and hurts himself.;<< Play (許世良, MBU_許世良_側站插腰看內) >>
<<#Simple(6)>>
->Aren't they already drugged?;<< PlayUntil (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_工廠_看內返回) >>
    Liam Hsu: Huh? You did your homework.;<< Play (許世良, MBU_許世良_側站插腰看內返回) >>;<< Play (吳俊恩, MBU_吳俊恩_側站看內返回) >>
    Liam Hsu: The tranquilizer is mild stuff. We need them to walk up, not pass out in the corridor.
    Liam Hsu: This is the real deal. Or the mounting process will hurt a lot.;<< Play (吳俊恩, MBU_吳俊恩_側站看內) >>
    << Play (許世良, MBU_許世良_側站插腰看內) >>;<< PlayUntil (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_工廠_看內) >>
->...
<<#EndSimple>>
Liam Hsu: Yale, inject tranq.;//小楊點了一下頭，轉身用一下電腦，一個機械手逼拉著一條帶針的管線插進它的手臂。接著算勞昏了過去。
<<#End>>

title: 送架展示第二步驟
body:
Liam Hsu: Most juicers will be hanging up there for years.;<< Play (許世良, MBU_許世良_側站插腰看內返回) >>
Liam Hsu: To keep them alive, we give them sustenance, a mixture of nutrients and sedatives.
Yale Yang: Um, which line are we using today?;<< Play (楊冶平, MBU_楊冶平_背站炒菜左看) >>;<< Play (吳俊恩, MBU_吳俊恩_側站看內返回) >>
Liam Hsu: Line 2, silly ass.;<< Play (許世良, MBU_許世良_側站插腰看內) >>
Yale Yang: Ah! Right! Line 2!;<< Play (楊冶平, MBU_楊冶平_背站炒菜左看返回) >>
Liam Hsu: Next, connect them to Silencio.
<<Set($DLState,送架展示第二步驟)>>
//小楊轉身操作一下。一個機械手逼拉著一條帶針的管線插進它的後頸。
<<#End>>

title: 送架展示第四步驟
body: Liam Hsu: In this step, we take over his central nervous system, connecting his brain to the flop network. Liam Hsu: Each juicer is assigned to a domain. You can find the domain code on the screen over there.;<< Play (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_工廠_看內返回) >>;<< Play (許世良, MBU_許世良_側站插腰看內返回) >> Liam Hsu: Your job is to manually confirm the domain code. No mistake allowed. Liam Hsu: Rack him up, Yale.;<< Play (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_工廠_看內) >>;<< Play (許世良, MBU_許世良_側站插腰看內) >> //小楊點頭然後操作了一下，算勞連同身後的架子一起被送了出去。 <> Liam Hsu: After preparation, the system will transfer the juicer into the Cellar. Liam Hsu: OK. That's it.;<< Play (吳俊恩, MBU_吳俊恩_側站看內返回) >>;<< Play (許世良, MBU_許世良_側站插腰看內返回) >> Liam Hsu: Like I said, plain and simple. Just follow the routine.;<< Play (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_工廠_看內返回) >> Thought: Simple indeed, but why isn't it automated? Liam Hsu: Any questions? <<@關於哥爾哥達的問題循環起始壓黑>> <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Can you demonstrate again? ($AskUpShelfProcessAgain) <> <<@複習一下上架流程>> <> Liam Hsu: Thought you'd ask. Liam Hsu: Yale, tell him how this goes again.;<< Play (吳俊恩, MBU_吳俊恩_側站看內) >>;<< Play (許世良, MBU_許世良_側站插腰抬頭) >> Yale Yang: Me?;<< Play (楊冶平, MBU_楊冶平_背站炒菜左看) >> Liam Hsu: Any other Yale here?;<< Play (許世良, MBU_許世良_側站插腰抬頭返回) >> Yale Yang: Yessir! Yale Yang: First goes the real deal tranq.;<< PlayUntil (楊冶平, MBU_楊冶平_背站炒菜左看返回) >>;<< Play (楊冶平, MBU_楊冶平_背站炒菜待機) >>;<< Play (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_工廠_看內) >> Yale Yang: Then sustenance. Yale Yang: Today's sustenance, we're using... Yale Yang: ... Yale Yang: Line 2! Right!;<< Play (楊冶平, MBU_楊冶平_背站炒菜左看) >> Liam Hsu: You'd better not get this wrong again.;<< Play (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_工廠_看內返回) >>;<< Play (許世良, MBU_許世良_側站插腰抬頭) >> Yale Yang: Ahem! Sometimes the juicer could feel the pain when attaching sustenance line...;<< Play (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_工廠_看內) >> Yale Yang: If that happens, we knock them out with electric shock.;<< Play (楊冶平, MBU_楊冶平_背站炒菜左看返回) >> Liam Hsu: Mind you, DON'T use shock unless they respond negatively to sustenance.;<< Play (許世良, MBU_許世良_側站插腰抬頭返回) >> Liam Hsu: It hurts a ton. Yale Yang: Next, pull these levers in exactly this order... Yale Yang: Last, attach insulation and confirm domain. Yale Yang: Each juicer has an assigned domain. Find the domain number on that screen there. Yale Yang: Then it's done! Liam Hsu: Remember it well. Your turn next.;<< Play (吳俊恩, MBU_吳俊恩_側站看內返回) >>;<< Play (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_工廠_看內返回) >> <<#If($DLState=不要再進問題循環喔)>> <<#GoTo(@補問送架流程以後接過來這裡)>> <<#EndIf>> <<#GoTo(@關於哥爾哥達的問題循環起始壓黑)>> ->Why do we need training if it's so simple? ($AskSoEasyWhyUseMan) ->Why don't you just automate the whole routine? ($AskSoEasyWhyUseMan) <> Justin Wu: Because of the risk.;<< Play (吳俊恩, MBU_吳俊恩_側站看內) >> Justin Wu: Mr. Hsu did say Golgotha is an automated racking system, remember?;<< Play (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_工廠_看外) >> Justin Wu: The reason why we do everything manually is— Liam Hsu: Because this piece of shit's falling apart.;<< Play (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_工廠_看外返回) >>;<< Play (許世良, MBU_許世良_側站插腰手指) >> Liam Hsu: This thing hasn't been working properly for two years.;<< Play (吳俊恩, MBU_吳俊恩_側站看內返回) >>;<< Play (楊冶平, MBU_楊冶平_背站炒菜左看) >> Thought: It's breaking down...?;<< Play (吳俊恩, MBU_吳俊恩_側站低頭) >> Liam Hsu: The automation system is falling apart.;<< Play (許世良, MBU_許世良_側站插腰手指返回) >> Justin Wu: Now we have to put someone in this control room to keep things going.;<< Play (吳俊恩, MBU_吳俊恩_側站低頭返回) >> Liam Hsu: Ha! Control room?;<< Play (許世良, MBU_許世良_側站插腰抬頭) >> Liam Hsu: This used to be a maintenance nook, for a couple of engineers to do troubleshooting and servicing.;<< Play (吳俊恩, MBU_吳俊恩_側站看外) >> Thought: That explains the crowded space...;<< PlayUntil (楊冶平, MBU_楊冶平_背站炒菜左看返回) >>;<< Play (楊冶平, MBU_楊冶平_背站炒菜待機) >> Liam Hsu: We crammed a manual mounting console here and made it a "control room".;<< Play (許世良, MBU_許世良_側站插腰抬頭返回) >> Justin Wu: On good days, the system works on its own. But somebody must stay here and keep watch.;<< Play (吳俊恩, MBU_吳俊恩_側站看外返回) >>;<< Play (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_工廠_看外) >> Justin Wu: And take over with manual control if/when it refuses to work.;<< Play (吳俊恩, MBU_吳俊恩_側站看內) >> Justin Wu: And most importantly, fix issues as they pop up. Justin Wu: This is why we need Mr. Hsu here all the time.;<< Play (吳俊恩, MBU_吳俊恩_側站看內返回) >> Liam Hsu: Anything else, boy?;<< Play (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_工廠_看外返回) >> <<#GoTo(@關於哥爾哥達的問題循環起始壓黑)>> ->I don't have any more questions. //if沒有問一次流程。 <<#If($LearnSendShelfAgain=false)>> Liam Hsu: You sure about that? Liam Hsu: Then it's your turn next. Don't forget, your job depends on this. Liam Hsu: I'd be damn impressed if you do remember everything after seeing it just once. Liam Hsu: You sure you got the routine right? <<#Simple(99999)>> ->I'm sure.;<< PlayUntil (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_工廠_側站點頭) >> Liam Hsu: Nice. Show me how it's done. ->Could you please demonstrate again? <> <<#GoTo(@複習一下上架流程)>> <<#EndSimple>> <<#EndIf>> <<#EndSimple>> <<@補問送架流程以後接過來這裡>> Liam Hsu: One last thing. Liam Hsu: See that yellow lever over there?;<< Play (許世良, MBU_許世良_側站插腰手指) >> << PlayUntil (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_工廠_側站點頭) >> Liam Hsu: That's the emergency stop. Pull it if the machine goes nuts.;<< Play (吳俊恩, MBU_吳俊恩_側站插腰) >> Liam Hsu: That will stop the whole system, in case the juicer gets hurt. Liam Hsu: Or killed, if you're too slow. Understand?;<< Play (楊冶平, MBU_楊冶平_背站炒菜左看) >>;<< Play (許世良, MBU_許世良_側站插腰手指返回) >> <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Understood. Liam Hsu: Really? ->Does that happen a lot? Liam Hsu: Never happened until two years ago.;<< Play (許世良, MBU_許世良_側站插腰低頭) >> Liam Hsu: A couple of times, by the end of last year. Liam Hsu: Since this year? At least once a month.;<< Play (許世良, MBU_許世良_側站插腰看外返回) >> Thought: Once a month...? <<#EndSimple>> Liam Hsu: You're thinking: "Ha! Easy enough! Things go wrong, pull lever." <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Yes. All I need is fast reflex. Liam Hsu: Exactly as I said.;<< PlayUntil (許世良, MBU_許世良_側站插腰點頭) >> ->No. It sounds very challenging. Liam Hsu: Don't worry, if timing is your concern. <<#EndSimple>> Liam Hsu: You have plenty of time to pull the lever. Liam Hsu: Reflex is not what you need the most.;<< Play (許世良, MBU_許世良_側站插腰手指) >> Liam Hsu: It's courage. Thought: ...Courage?;<< Play (吳俊恩, MBU_吳俊恩_側站插腰低頭) >> Liam Hsu: The moment you pull the lever, a lot of parts will get damaged.;<< Play (許世良, MBU_許世良_側站插腰手指返回) >> Liam Hsu: According to the company's bullshit regulations...;<< Play (許世良, MBU_許世良_側站插腰低頭) >> Liam Hsu: If they decide the action is not justified, meaning the juicer wouldn't die even if you didn't pull the lever... Liam Hsu: All this damage will be your liability. You break it, you pay for it.;<< Play (許世良, MBU_許世良_側站插腰低頭返回) >> Thought: ...Killed? Thought: Isn't the risk of injury alone enough to justify it? <<#Simple(8)>> ->I shouldn't pull the lever, unless someone is gonna die? Liam Hsu: Right. ->I must pay for the whole damage? Liam Hsu: Nah, of course not.;<< Play (許世良, MBU_許世良_側站插腰抬頭) >> Liam Hsu: Don't flatter yourself. You don't have that much money. Liam Hsu: But Vision will make sure to milk you dry.;<< Play (許世良, MBU_許世良_側站插腰抬頭返回) >> ->... <<#EndSimple>> Justin Wu: I know this sounds ridiculous. It's a calculated decision based on risks and indemnities.;<< Play (吳俊恩, MBU_吳俊恩_側站插腰低頭返回) >>;<< Play (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_工廠_看外) >> Justin Wu: The insurance claim wouldn't surpass the cost of an emergency stop unless the juicer in question is killed during racking. Liam Hsu: Otherwise, if the juicer is not in immediate danger of death...;<< Play (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_工廠_看外返回) >>;<< Play (許世良, MBU_許世良_側站插腰抬手) >> Liam Hsu: Paying a crippled juicer is better than fixing broken machines, or so the big bosses think. Liam Hsu: A lot of rackers don't have the guts to pull the lever.;<< Play (許世良, MBU_許世良_側站插腰抬手返回) >>;<< Play (吳俊恩, MBU_吳俊恩_側站插腰返回) >> <<#Simple(8)>> ->How could they? What's more important than a life? Liam Hsu: Listen up, boy.;<< Play (許世良, MBU_許世良_側站插腰抬頭) >> Liam Hsu: Those hypocrites at Screening have no idea what it's like down here. Liam Hsu: Here, love alone doesn't solve your problem.;<< Play (許世良, MBU_許世良_側站插腰抬頭返回) >> ->... <<#EndSimple>> Justin Wu: When Vision goes after you for compensation, it doesn't target you alone.;<< Play (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_工廠_看外) >> Justin Wu: Everyone close to you will be on their list.;<< Play (吳俊恩, MBU_吳俊恩_側站看內) >> Justin Wu: Family, friends, natural persons, legal entities. Everyone with something to do with you is a target. Justin Wu: You thought Sunrise has a killer legal team? Well, Vision's is even better.;<< Play (吳俊恩, MBU_吳俊恩_側站看內返回) >> Liam Hsu: Sunrise? Hmph. They have enough dirty tricks to get things done outside the courtroom.;<< Play (許世良, MBU_許世良_側站插腰低頭) >> Thought: Justin gave him an inquisitive glance. Liam Hsu: What? Can't I say bad things about my old employer?;<< Play (許世良, MBU_許世良_側站插腰低頭返回) >> Liam Hsu: Guess you've heard enough. Now you see what the problem is?;<< Play (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_工廠_看外返回) >> Liam Hsu: Suppose you pull the lever, and they decide the juicer is not in immediate danger...;<< Play (吳俊恩, MBU_吳俊恩_側站看內) >>;<< Play (許世良, MBU_許世良_側站插腰抬手) >> Liam Hsu: Then you're screwed. So is everyone close to you. Thought: Vision could potentially target Fran for what I do...?;<< Play (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_工廠_側站低頭) >>;<< Play (許世良, MBU_許世良_側站插腰抬手返回) >> Thought: I...;<< Play (吳俊恩, MBU_吳俊恩_側站看內返回) >> Liam Hsu: Do you still think you have the guts?;<< PlayUntil (楊冶平, MBU_楊冶平_背站炒菜左看返回) >>;<< Play (楊冶平, MBU_楊冶平_背站炒菜待機) >>;<< Play (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_工廠_側站低頭返回) >> <<#Simple(8)>> ->The way you put it, it's like this will definitely happen. Liam Hsu: I put it like that because it will definitely happen.;<< Play (許世良, MBU_許世良_側站插腰返回) >> Liam Hsu: Muppets' Law. Ever heard of it? Justin Wu: Murphy's Law. Liam Hsu: Whatever.;<< Play (許世良, MBU_許世良_側站插腰) >> ->Bullshit! They can't do that! Liam Hsu: They do whatever they want, because they can. Liam Hsu: Thought you were old enough to have found out? ->... <<#EndSimple>> Justin Wu: Guys. Enough talk. Let Jason start.;<< Play (吳俊恩, MBU_吳俊恩_側站抬雙手) >> Liam Hsu: Let's see how he handles this job.;<< Play (許世良, MBU_許世良_側站插腰抬頭) >> Liam Hsu: I'm not expecting much, mind you.;<< Play (吳俊恩, MBU_吳俊恩_側站抬雙手返回) >> Justin Wu: Remember, a large part of this job is about keeping your cool.;<< Play (吳俊恩, MBU_吳俊恩_側站看內) >>;<< Play (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_工廠_看外) >>;<< Play (許世良, MBU_許世良_側站插腰抬頭返回) >> Justin Wu: But if you get the fundamental routine wrong, I won't keep you at Ops.;<< Play (吳俊恩, MBU_吳俊恩_側站看內抬手) >> Thought: He is much harsher than Wayne... Thought: Looks like there's no trap or test this time around. If I fail, I'm out of the game.;<< Play (吳俊恩, MBU_吳俊恩_側站看內抬手返回) >> Liam Hsu: Make some room for him, Yale.;<< Play (許世良, MBU_許世良_側站插腰返回) >>;<< Play (吳俊恩, MBU_吳俊恩_側站看內返回) >> Liam Hsu: Your turn, Jason.;<< Play (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_工廠_看外返回) >> <<#End>>

title: 送架展示第三步驟
body: Liam Hsu: Damn this cheap sustenance. You pay shit, you get shit. Thought: But he's still convulsing... Justin Wu: Is he OK?;<< Play (吳俊恩, MBU_吳俊恩_側站看內返回) >> Liam Hsu: Of course he's OK. Spasm is normal. That juicer just now was jerking while awake. That was a problem.;<< Play (許世良, MBU_許世良_側站插腰看內返回) >> Thought: Convulsing like this is...normal?;<< PlayUntil (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_工廠_看內返回) >> Liam Hsu: And that zap hurts like hell.;<< Play (吳俊恩, MBU_吳俊恩_側站低頭) >> Liam Hsu: Say, when are we gonna have money for real sustenance, Justin?;<< Play (許世良, MBU_許世良_側站插腰抬手) >> Liam Hsu: Next week? //吳俊恩搖了搖頭 Justin Wu: It's a full month away.;<< Play (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_工廠_看外) >> Liam Hsu: Fuck me...;<< Play (許世良, MBU_許世良_側站插腰抬手返回) >> Justin Wu: Let's continue.;<< Play (吳俊恩, MBU_吳俊恩_側站低頭返回) >> Liam Hsu: Tsk.;<< Play (許世良, MBU_許世良_側站插腰抬頭) >> Liam Hsu: Noticed the juicer is jerking?;<< Play (許世良, MBU_許世良_側站插腰抬頭返回) >>;<< Play (吳俊恩, MBU_吳俊恩_側站看內) >>;<< Play (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_工廠_看外返回) >> Thought: How can I not notice? <<#Simple(99999)>> ->It's hard to not notice. ->Yes. Liam Hsu: Good.;<< PlayUntil (許世良, MBU_許世良_側站插腰點頭) >> ->Is this really normal? Liam Hsu: Told you it's normal. <<#EndSimple>> Liam Hsu: The juicer's brain generates flops. We keep stimulating his brain to keep it working.;<< Play (許世良, MBU_許世良_側站插腰手指) >> Liam Hsu: The stimulation process also generates "noise signals", that makes his limbs jerk. Liam Hsu: Next, we cut off his peripheral nervous system. That will stop the jerking.;<< Play (許世良, MBU_許世良_側站插腰手指返回) >> Liam Hsu: Yale, attach insulation.;<< Play (許世良, MBU_許世良_側站插腰看內) >> << PlayUntil (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_工廠_看內) >> //小楊拉了操作了一下，左右兩側出現機械手臂，將算勞的頭包住，手臂退開後算勞頭上出現頭盔，頭盔上的分別針進進出出的抽差了一下，最後全部一起莫入算勞的腦袋。並發出亮燈 <<#End>>

title: 許大哥跟主角說可開始了
玩家送架_第一人_第一步驟
body:
//紀錄玩家操作到哪個步驟ControllUpSheldState
//紀錄玩家錯了幾次，UpShelfWrongCount
//紀錄玩家上一次操作錯了幾次，用來比較看主角有沒有增加錯誤LastUpShelfWrongCount

//旁邊要顯示當前算勞的名字跟主域網路編號，還有下一個人是誰
//玩家和中控面板互動後

////////第一人;第一步驟/////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////
Golgotha Mk. III: Next entry. T-630. Melinda Lin.
<<@ControllUpSheldState1>>
Golgotha Mk. III: Please give instruction.
<<Set($ControllUpSheldState,1)>>
<<#Simple(99999)>>
->[Instruction] Attach insulation.
    Golgotha Mk. III: <y>Error. Prerequisite procedure not completed.</y>; <<Set($UpShelfWrongCount,$UpShelfWrongCount+1)>>
    <<#GoTo(@操作失誤反應區)>>
->[Instruction] Connect sustenance.
    Golgotha Mk. III: <y>Error. Prerequisite procedure not completed.</y>;<<Set($UpShelfWrongCount,$UpShelfWrongCount+1)>>
    <<#GoTo(@操作失誤反應區)>>
->[Instruction] Shock.
    Golgotha Mk. III: <y>Error. Target heart rate stable.</y>;<<Set($UpShelfWrongCount,$UpShelfWrongCount+1)>>
    <<#GoTo(@操作失誤反應區)>>
->[Instruction] Administer tranquilizer.
    Golgotha Mk. III: Executing instruction.
<<#EndSimple>>
<<#End>>

title: 送架意外發生
跟操作組組長對質
body:
//到樓下發現響警報，大家有點驚慌，吳俊恩站在組長門外猛敲，有幾個人也站在旁邊擔心的看著。
Justin Wu: Please think again, sir!
//組長開門走出來，吳俊恩後退了幾步。
<<Set($DLState,組長走出來)>>
Kevin Hu: Are you doubting my decisions?;<< Play (胡啟維, MBU_胡啟維_側站抬頭) >>
Justin Wu: He is severely injured!;<< Play (吳俊恩, MBU_吳俊恩_慌張抬手) >>
Justin Wu: According to the attached sensors, he's suffering from Grade IV injury! We must—
Kevin Hu: How many fucking times do I need to repeat myself?;<< Play (胡啟維, MBU_胡啟維_側站抬頭返回) >>
Kevin Hu: I don't give a flying fuck if he dies.
Justin Wu: What!?;<< Play (吳俊恩, MBU_吳俊恩_慌張抬手返回) >>
Kevin Hu: Keep him hanging there. For three hours at least. You heard me?;<< Play (胡啟維, MBU_胡啟維_側站抽菸) >>
Justin Wu: But he's not dead yet! We can still save him!
Kevin Hu: I'd rather have him die up there.;<< Play (胡啟維, MBU_胡啟維_側站吐菸) >>
Kevin Hu: He dies, the insurance company takes over. He lives, we pay all the medical bills.;<<Set($DLState,許世良跟楊冶平趕了過來)>>
Kevin Hu: You! Yes, the newbie. Did you rack him up? You did this?
<<#If($DontGiveFuckAsshole78 = true)>>
    Kevin Hu: First the shitty attitude, now this.
    Kevin Hu: Useless piece of shit.
    Thought: Motherf—
<<#EndIf>>
Kevin Hu: You'd better hope he dies quickly.;//組長指著主角;<< Play (胡啟維, MBU_胡啟維_側站吐菸返回) >>
Kevin Hu: Or else I'll make sure every single medical bill of his goes to you.;<< Play (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_工廠_側站隱忍) >>
Thought: What the fuck!?
Justin Wu: You're insane!;<< Play (吳俊恩, MBU_吳俊恩_慌張後傾) >>
Justin Wu: It's a living person! You'd just watch him die!?
Kevin Hu: Calm the fuck down.
Kevin Hu: I'm making an informed decision.;<< Play (胡啟維, MBU_胡啟維_側站吐菸) >>
Kevin Hu: You said Grade IV injury yourself. How much chance does he have. huh?;<< Play (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_工廠_側站隱忍返回) >>
Liam Hsu: The fuck!? We can't just give up trying!;<<Play(許世良,MBU_許世良_側站握拳)>>
Kevin Hu: Says the man who put him there in the first place.
Liam Hsu: What did you say!?
Kevin Hu: I said we wouldn't have any of this shit if you did your fucking job.;<<Play(胡啟維,MBU_胡啟維_側站吐菸返回)>>
Kevin Hu: Someday I've got to fire you all lazy ass rackers.
Liam Hsu: You son of a...
Kevin Hu: ...
Kevin Hu: Watch your fucking language, Liam Hsu.;<<Play(胡啟維,MBU_胡啟維_側站吐菸)>>
Liam Hsu: Do you have any idea what you're doing!?;<<Play(許世良,MBU_許世良_側站握拳手指)>>;<<Play(楊冶平,MBU_楊冶平_側站慌張)>>
Kevin Hu: ...
Kevin Hu: I'm doing my job. You'd better do your job, while you still have one.;<<Play(胡啟維,MBU_胡啟維_側站吐菸返回)>>
Liam Hsu: I've had enough. You—;<<Play(許世良,MBU_許世良_側站手指返回)>>
Justin Wu: Calm down, Mr. Hsu!
Kevin Hu: Shut. Your. Fucking. Mouth.;<<Play(胡啟維,MBU_胡啟維_側站吐菸)>>
Kevin Hu: For every word you say, I'm gonna cut a chunk off your pay. Understood?;<<Play(胡啟維,MBU_胡啟維_側站吐菸結束)>>
//組長作勢打回去，但許世良衝上去一拳把他揍暈。
<<#End>>

title: 操作組收尾
body: //俊恩走出辦公室 Justin Wu: I've taken care of it. The injured juicer is being unracked as we speak.;<> Justin Wu: And thank you, Mr. Hsu. Justin Wu: But you...;<> Liam Hsu: I did it, I pay the price. Don't worry about me.;<> Justin Wu: Yeah.;<> <> Justin Wu: Everyone! The medics are on the way to the unracking bay. <<#Simple(8)>> ->Isn't the juicer coming back here? Justin Wu: No. We have a separate area for unracking. ->Is he gonna be OK? Justin Wu: ...I don't know yet. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Justin Wu: We can only do this much.;<>;<> Justin Wu: We acted fast. He should be alright. Jesse Lai: Should be alright? After that?;<> Paxton Luo: Did anyone pull the emergency stop lever?;<> //沒拉拉桿 <<#If($DoPullEmergencyBar=false)>> Justin Wu: ...;<> Jesse Lai: Judging by his face, I guess no...? Thought: Right. I didn't pull the lever...;<>;<>;<> Justin Wu: ...;<> Justin Wu: No one will blame you, Jason.;<> Justin Wu: Everyone here would have probably done the same.;<>;<>;<> Justin Wu: At the risk of ruining your own life? The stake is too high.;<> Justin Wu: Feels terrible, doesn't it?;<> <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Yeah. I hate myself. // ->No. I did protect myself and those close to me. Justin Wu: You mean, it was a rational decision? Justin Wu: Good for you. ->I didn't know what to do, then it was too late. Justin Wu: We all know the feeling.;<> Justin Wu: Some of us might have this plan or that when it happens. Justin Wu: But when it really does happen, we can't move a muscle...;<> <<#EndSimple>> <> <<#EndIf>> //有拉拉桿 <<#If($DoPullEmergencyBar=true)>> <> Justin Wu: Yes. Jason responded in a split second.;<> Justin Wu: That could have saved the juicer's life.;<> Paxton Luo: Wow, well done...;<>;<>;<> Jesse Lai: Well done, really.;<> Liam Hsu: You did the right thing, boy.;<>;<> Liam Hsu: You have a kind heart. I can tell that much. Liam Hsu: Now think again, whether you still want to work here.;<>;<> Liam Hsu: The Screening folks will keep you for your kind heart. Liam Hsu: Down here at Ops, we don't.;<>;<> Liam Hsu: You see, we deal with consequences they hardly ever see.;<>;<> Liam Hsu: A kind heart won't last very long here. Won't blame you if you change your mind. Liam Hsu: Incidents like this will keep happening. Think carefully.;<> Thought: ...;<> <<#EndIf>> Justin Wu: Everyone, I have bad news.;<> Paxton Luo: Why that face? How bad could it be?;<> Justin Wu: What happened seems to be just a part of a widespread malfunction throughout the entire Cellar.;<> Paxton Luo: What!?;<>;<> Jesse Lai: Why didn't you say so? Now we must— Justin Wu: Calm down.;<>;<> Justin Wu: All key systems are intact, including the life support system. Justin Wu: Many secondary systems are brought offline, though, including part of the ventilation system. Justin Wu: Emergency repair is underway. We have people from Logistics on site for the majority of the work. Justin Wu: Meanwhile, we must provide support. Engineering team, stand by and follow procedure 8-R.;<> Justin Wu: Jesse, you're in charge of the office for now.;<> Jesse Lai: Roger.;<>;<> <> Paxton Luo: What about me? Justin Wu: Hmm... Justin Wu: Paxton, go help Site Four. Yale, report to Logistics and see what they need.;<> Paxton Luo: Roger.;<> Yale Yang: Acknowledged.;<> <> Justin Wu: Now, Jason.;<>;<> Justin Wu: I'm sorry. Looks like your field practice has to stop.;<> Justin Wu: However... Justin Wu: I think I've known enough about you.;<> //最後決定要不要錄取，標準:拉桿、對許大哥的態度、錯誤次數 //決定錄取 <<#If($UpShelfWrongCount<4)>> <<#If($UpShelfWrongCount=0)>> Justin Wu: Your first racking is perfect. I'm impressed. <<#EndIf>> <<#If($UpShelfWrongCount>0)>> Justin Wu: You made a few mistakes during your first racking, but nothing major. <<#EndIf>> Justin Wu: We could always use more detail-oriented rackers.;<> Justin Wu: I have decided to hire you, Jason.;<> Justin Wu: I will inform Ms. Yeh. Thought: Fantastic!;<> Thought: Or...is it? Justin Wu: But I see you have a good reason to turn down my offer. Justin Wu: I will leave this up to you. <<#EndIf>> //不錄取 <<#If($UpShelfWrongCount>3)>> Justin Wu: I'm not planning to hire you.;<> Justin Wu: I will inform Ms. Yeh. Thought: Thought so...;<> <<#Simple(8)>> ->May I know why? ->Hey! What have I done wrong? Justin Wu: You made too many mistakes during the racking process. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Justin Wu: I don't think you're a good fit for Ops. <<#Simple(8)>> ->I don't like it here, anyway. Justin Wu: I know how you feel. ->Thank you for letting me know. Justin Wu: Thank you for not arguing with me. ->... <<#EndSimple>> <<#EndIf>> //有拉拉桿 <<#If($DoPullEmergencyBar=true)>> Justin Wu: Oh, don't worry about what you did. Justin Wu: Grade IV injury is lethal. You had a legitimate reason to pull the emergency stop. Thought: Phew... <<#EndIf>> Justin Wu: Now, go report to Ms. Yeh. Justin Wu: I will inform her what happened, then clean up this mess. Justin Wu: Mr. Hsu, we need to talk.;<> Liam Hsu: What about this turd?;<> Justin Wu: ... Justin Wu: Leave him there. We need to borrow his office. //兩人走去搭車 <<#End>>

title: 揍完人對話
body: Liam Hsu: ... Liam Hsu: Justin. Liam Hsu: Go, get the juicer down... //俊恩衝進組長辦公室 Justin Wu: Understood. <> Paxton Luo: You're the man! Mr. Hsu!;<>;<> Yale Yang: One heck of a punch!;<>;<>;<>;<> Jesse Lai: Mr. Hsu, do you know... Liam Hsu: I know what I'm doing. Yale Yang: That was AWESOME! Stick it to the man! Hell yeah!;<>;<> Liam Hsu: No, not really.;<> Yale Yang: Huh?;<> Liam Hsu: I was not...;<> Liam Hsu: Never mind. Liam Hsu: Unracking needs authorization from the division lead's computer. Liam Hsu: We can't afford to waste any time on this asshole.;<> Liam Hsu: We can't.;<> Thought: ... <<#End>> //接著等一下

title: 胖胖問要不要上車對話
body:
Paxton Luo: Uh, hey...;<<Play(羅龐安,MBU_羅龐安_側站看外)>>;<<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_背站左看)>>
Yale Yang: You're leaving, too? Let's go together.
<<#Simple(99999)>>
->Sure.
    //
->Are you guys waiting for me?
    Paxton Luo: Yeah, thought you'd need a lift.
    Yale Yang: The truth is, Packs wants to make new friends.
    Paxton Luo: Shut up!
    Yale Yang: Haha!
<<#EndSimple>>
Paxton Luo: Let's get going.
<<Set($DLState,跟胖胖說可以搭車囉)>>
<<#End>>

title: 算勞墜落事件
body:
//胖胖車開出去
//一個人在遠方掉下來蹦的很大一聲，地窖側邊的牆壁突然打 開一扇門，一小對人坐在閃爍著黃色警示燈的車上趕往現場，車停下來擋住掉下來的算勞，人們下車走到車後
//同時胖胖煞車
Paxton Luo: FUCK!;<<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_坐車看內)>>;<<Play(羅龐安,MBU_羅龐安_坐車看內)>>
Yale Yang: What was that?;<<Play(楊冶平,MBU_楊冶平_坐車看內)>>
Paxton Luo: Looks like a racked juicer dropping from the ceiling...
Yale Yang: Damn...
<<#Simple(6)>>
->Is it one of those I just racked up?
    Paxton Luo: ...Don't think so.
    Yale Yang: Yeah. Those should have been sent to other parts.
->...
<<#EndSimple>>
Yale Yang: Looks like the issue is way worse than we thought...
Paxton Luo: Holy mother of...;<<Play(羅龐安,MBU_羅龐安_坐車看內返回)>>
Paxton Luo: It's time. It's time.;<<Play(楊冶平,MBU_楊冶平_坐車看內返回)>>
Paxton Luo: This is the end.;<<Play(羅龐安,MBU_羅龐安_坐車看外)>>
<<#Simple(8)>>
->Aren't we going to help him?
    Paxton Luo: The emergency response team is on the way. Leave this to the professionals.
    Paxton Luo: ...
->The end of what?
    Paxton Luo: Of this farm!
->...
<<#EndSimple>>
Paxton Luo: The farm has reached the end of its life. This pile of old junk is falling apart.

<<#Simple(8)>>
->Isn't this just one incident?
    Paxton Luo: This will keep happening!;<<Play(羅龐安,MBU_羅龐安_坐車看外抬手)>>
    Paxton Luo: Things aren't gonna change until we replace these worn out machines.
    Yale Yang: Agreed.;<<Play(羅龐安,MBU_羅龐安_坐車看外抬手返回)>>
    <<#GoTo(@還是成本問題啊。)>>
->People are dying! HQ has to approve the budget now.
    Paxton Luo: The cost doesn't justify the benefit.
    <<@還是成本問題啊。>>
    Paxton Luo: When we say replace the equipment, it means revamping the whole Cellar. It's a gigantic cost.
    Paxton Luo: They have done the math. Paying compensation for injured and dead juicers is much cheaper.
->...
<<#EndSimple>>
Yale Yang: I say just shut this place down already.;<<Play(楊冶平,MBU_楊冶平_坐車低頭)>>
Yale Yang: Mr. Hsu said HQ is seriously considering it.
Paxton Luo: I'm not counting on it.
Paxton Luo: Shutting down Silencio will leave a big dent in the overall flop supply.;<<Play(楊冶平,MBU_楊冶平_坐車低頭返回)>>
//有跟路人事件廢場對話過
//第一日遇到一個女生嬌生慣養，幫她做點事以後會建議主角快離這裡。她爸要把這裡收了。
//    想法: 之前走那個叫陳禾婷女人也說過……
//    <<#Simple(6)>>
//    ->我之前也聽人說過這件事。
//        羅龐安: 喔？你聽誰說的？
//        <<#Simple(99999)>>
//        ->一個說自己是陳董親戚的女生。
//        ->她叫陳禾婷。
//            楊冶平: 啊我知道她，她之前才來過。
//            楊冶平: 好像是陳董帶她來參觀。
//        <<#EndSimple>>
//        羅龐安: 如果是她的話那可信度就很高了……
//        羅龐安: 也是時候了。
//    ->………
//    <<#EndSimple>>
Yale Yang: Well, hope they'll just shut it down anyway.
Paxton Luo: Yeah.
Thought: Don't they worry about losing their own jobs?
<<#Simple(10)>>
->Aren't you unemployed, if the farm is shut down?
    <<@诶你們不怕沒工作嗎？>>;//這裡有bug要把選過的選項都刪掉，兩個選項可以共用一個變數。
    Paxton Luo: Ha, it must be scary, hearing all this talk about farm shut down...
    Paxton Luo: Don't worry. The whole process will take at least three years, if it happens at all.;<<Play(羅龐安,MBU_羅龐安_坐車看外返回)>>
    Paxton Luo: Plus, we're specialists. Finding a new job won't be too hard.
    Paxton Luo: Those talkers at Screening won't be so lucky, though. That's why they want to keep the farm running.;<<Play(羅龐安,MBU_羅龐安_坐車看外)>>
    Yale Yang: Yeah.
    <<#If($AskYanPonDontAfraidJobLoss>-1)>>
        <<#Simple(6)>>
        ->Why do you want the farm shut down so badly?;<<Set($AskYanPonDontAfraidJobLoss,-1)>>
            <<#GoTo(@诶你們為什麼這麼希望這裡被廢掉？)>>
        ->...
        <<#EndSimple>>
    <<#EndIf>>
->Why do you want the farm shut down so badly?
    <<@诶你們為什麼這麼希望這裡被廢掉？>>
    Yale Yang: Because we really, really can't take any more juicers!;<<Play(楊冶平,MBU_楊冶平_坐車前傾)>>
    Yale Yang: These machines are beyond saving. We can't possibly keep them serviced.;<<Play(羅龐安,MBU_羅龐安_坐車看外返回)>>
    Yale Yang: And Screening keeps sending juicers down. What else can we do?;<<Play(楊冶平,MBU_楊冶平_坐車前傾返回)>>
    <<#If($AskYanPonDontAfraidJobLoss>-1)>>
        <<#Simple(6)>>
        ->Aren't you unemployed, if the farm is shut down?;<<Set($AskYanPonDontAfraidJobLoss,-1)>>
            <<#GoTo(@诶你們不怕沒工作嗎？)>>
        ->...
        <<#EndSimple>>
    <<#EndIf>>
    <<PlayUntil(羅龐安,MBU_羅龐安_坐車看外)>>
->...
<<#EndSimple>>

Yale Yang: We've had enough.;<<Play(楊冶平,MBU_楊冶平_坐車抬手)>>
Yale Yang: If the farm can't be saved, it's better shut down sooner rather than later.
Paxton Luo: ...;<<Play(楊冶平,MBU_楊冶平_坐車抬手返回)>>
Thought: I've never heard anything like this at Screening…
Paxton Luo: OK. Let's keep going. Nothing to see here...;<<Play(羅龐安,MBU_羅龐安_坐車看外返回)>>
Yale Yang: Yeah.
<<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_坐車看內返回)>>
<<#End>>

title: 下車對話
body:

Paxton Luo: Here we are.;<<Play(羅龐安,MBU_羅龐安_坐車看外)>>

<<#Simple(6)>>
->Bye.

    <<#Simple(6)>>

    ->Thank you.

    ->You all did well.

    <<#EndSimple>>
->...
<<#EndSimple>>
<<Play(羅龐安,MBU_羅龐安_坐車看外返回)>>;<<PlayUntil(羅龐安,MBU_羅龐安_坐車平板)>>
<<#End>>

body:

title: 阿姨叫玩家過去
信任戴士傑(一)
body:
//$CountYehImpressEvent之後要回頭補這個數值的加減事件
//信任>0
//特別信任>2
//不信任<1
//特別不信任<-2

//信任戴士傑
Eva Yeh: Walking in like you own the place, like always.;<<Play(葉宜樺,MBU_葉宜樺_側坐低頭返回)>>
Eva Yeh: I don't know what made you so special. Silencio keeps opening doors for you.
Eva Yeh: Reporting about your field practice at Ops, Mr. Dai?
<<#Simple(99999)>>
->Yes.
    Eva Yeh: No need.
->What was that about?
    Eva Yeh: Nothing that you should be worried about.
<<#EndSimple>>
Eva Yeh: ...;<<Play(葉宜樺,MBU_葉宜樺_側坐看內)>>
Eva Yeh: *Sigh* From bad to worse.
Eva Yeh: Listen, Mr. Dai.
Eva Yeh: Justin Wu already reported to me what happened in the Cellar.
Eva Yeh: ...
Eva Yeh: I'm sorry for having you involved.;<<Play(葉宜樺,MBU_葉宜樺_側坐看內返回)>>
//if有啦啦感
<<#If($DoPullEmergencyBar=true)>>
    Eva Yeh: And I must say you did exceptionally well by pulling the emergency stop.
<<#EndIf>>
Eva Yeh: I'd like to know what you think, however...;<<Play(葉宜樺,MBU_葉宜樺_側坐低頭)>>
Eva Yeh: ...
Eva Yeh: I have more urgent work to do at the moment.;<<Play(葉宜樺,MBU_葉宜樺_側坐低頭返回)>>
Eva Yeh: That's all for today. I will keep you updated about what happens next.
Thought: What's the situation now...?
Eva Yeh: You're dismissed.
<<#End>>

title: 信任戴士傑(二)
body: //$CountYehImpressEvent之後要回頭補這個數值的加減事件 //信任>0 //特別信任>2 //不信任<1 //特別不信任<-2 //玩家轉身走一半，被阿姨叫住。 Eva Yeh: Hold on...;<> //葉宜樺懊惱苦惱抱頭思考 Thought: What now? Eva Yeh: I...;<> Eva Yeh: ... Eva Yeh: Damn...;<> Eva Yeh: Mr. Dai. I have been watching you closely since yesterday. //人特別好 <<#If($CountYehImpressEvent>2)>> Eva Yeh: It seems to be that you care about others, and try to do the right thing...;<> Eva Yeh: ... Eva Yeh: Conclusion: You're a decent man. Trustworthy.;<> <<#EndIf>> //人普通 <<#If($CountYehImpressEvent<3)>> Eva Yeh: I don't think you're a bad man. Just an average person minding his own business. <<#EndIf>> <<#Simple(8)>> ->Um, thank you? ->What is this about? ->... <<#EndSimple>> Eva Yeh: You heard that conversation just now. You can tell something has happened. Thought: What's she getting at...? <<#Simple(8)>> ->But I can't tell exactly what. // ->Something has happened to you, I reckon. Eva Yeh: I am aware of that. Thought: She looks quite concerned. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Eva Yeh: ...;<> Eva Yeh: Damn it... Eva Yeh: OK, I'm betting on you. Eva Yeh: Mr. Dai, I need your help.;<> Eva Yeh: I'm about to explain what exactly happened.;<> Eva Yeh: Be aware that once you hear it, there's no turning back. Eva Yeh: Do you want me to continue?;<> <<@阿姨問主角要不要聽他的情況ㄚㄚ>> Thought: If this is by any means related to Fran... <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Yes.;<> <<#GoTo(@宜樺開始說明阻止程芳教硬碟作戰)>> ->No. Eva Yeh: Alright. A sound decision. Eva Yeh: You don't have a reason to get involved in this.;<> Eva Yeh: You're free to go now. Eva Yeh: I will handle it myself.;<> Thought: But this could be related to Fran... <<#Simple(6)>> ->Wait, I've changed my mind. Eva Yeh: Are you sure? <<#Simple(99999)>> ->I'm sure.;<> Eva Yeh: Good. <<#GoTo(@宜樺開始說明阻止程芳教硬碟作戰)>> ->No, I take it back. Eva Yeh: Don't waste any more of my time, then. Eva Yeh: You're dismissed. <<#EndSimple>> ->Bye. ->... <<#EndSimple>> <<#End>> ->So it was you? You stole confidential documents? ($SoYouDidStealSecretFromThem);//這個選項選過要關掉 <> Eva Yeh: I won't answer your questions, unless you agree to listen. Eva Yeh: Will you? Answer me. <<#GoTo(@阿姨問主角要不要聽他的情況ㄚㄚ)>> <<#EndSimple>>

title: 不信任戴士傑(一)
body: //$CountYehImpressEvent之後要回頭補這個數值的加減事件 //信任>0 //特別信任>2 //不信任<1 //特別不信任<-2 //不信任戴士傑(態度惡劣自私) Eva Yeh: Walking in like you own the place, like always.;<< Play (葉宜樺, MBU_葉宜樺_側坐低頭返回) >> Eva Yeh: I don't know what makes you special. Silencio keeps opening doors for you... <<#Simple(8)>> ->I have no idea, either. Eva Yeh: I'd be surprised if you do have any idea. ->It that my fault? Eva Yeh: Of course not. Stupid AI. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Eva Yeh: So, what are you doing here? Thought: I must find out how Fran is involved in whatever they were talking about.;<< Play (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_工廠_側站低頭) >> <<#Simple(99999)>> ->The field practice at Ops is concluded.;<< Play (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_工廠_側站低頭返回) >> Eva Yeh: I don't have time to see you right now. ->What was that about?;<< Play (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_工廠_側站低頭返回) >> Eva Yeh: None of your business. <<#EndSimple>> Eva Yeh: I know what happened down there. Justin Wu has sent in a full report.;<< Play (葉宜樺, MBU_葉宜樺_側坐看內) >> Eva Yeh: I'm sorry for what happened. Eva Yeh: Someone will inform you of what happens next. You're dismissed.;<< Play (葉宜樺, MBU_葉宜樺_側坐看內返回) >> <<#Simple(8)>> ->You stole confidential documents from the company? Eva Yeh: No. Eva Yeh: Don't make me repeat myself.;<< Play (葉宜樺, MBU_葉宜樺_側坐手指) >> Eva Yeh: Now, out. Thought: Damn...;<< Play (葉宜樺, MBU_葉宜樺_側坐看內手指返回) >> Thought: I must get in touch with Fran... <<#End>> ->I know Frances Cheng. What did you do? Eva Yeh: Who doesn't know Frances Cheng? She's the supervisor.;<< Play (葉宜樺, MBU_葉宜樺_側坐後躺) >> Thought: She's not taking me seriously... <<#Simple(8)>> ->She's my girlfriend. <<#GoTo(@跟葉宜樺說程芳是你女朋友)>> ->I mean it. I'm a friend of hers. Eva Yeh: Friends, you say? <<#Simple(99999)>> ->She's my girlfriend. <<#GoTo(@跟葉宜樺說程芳是你女朋友)>> ->Yes. ->Acquaintance, more like. Eva Yeh: So? <<#Simple(99999)>> ->So I care about her, don't want anything to happen to her. Eva Yeh: You care that much about an acquaintance? <<#Simple(6)>> ->She's my girlfriend! <<#GoTo(@跟葉宜樺說程芳是你女朋友)>> ->... <<#EndSimple>> Eva Yeh: I'm not convinced. ->So I must find out what the heck you're planning. Eva Yeh: I'm not planning anything. Sorry to disappoint. <<#EndSimple>> Eva Yeh: Now, out of my office. ;<< Play (葉宜樺, MBU_葉宜樺_側坐後躺返回) >> <<#End>> <<#EndSimple>> ->... <<#EndSimple>> Eva Yeh: The door is right behind you. Need me to call you a taxi? Eva Yeh: Get out. I don't have time for you.;<< Play (葉宜樺, MBU_葉宜樺_側坐後躺返回) >> <<#End>> <<@跟葉宜樺說程芳是你女朋友>> Eva Yeh: What?;<< Play (葉宜樺, MBU_葉宜樺_側坐後躺返回) >> Eva Yeh: ... Eva Yeh: Impossible. //普通不信任 <<#If($CountYehImpressEvent>-3)>> Eva Yeh: Coincidence? No way...;<< Play (葉宜樺, MBU_葉宜樺_側坐低頭) >> <<#EndIf>> //特別不信任 <<#If($CountYehImpressEvent<-2)>> Eva Yeh: A good girl like her can't possibly be dating someone like you...;<< Play (葉宜樺, MBU_葉宜樺_側坐低頭) >> Eva Yeh: I've been watching you, and I don't think you're her type. <<#EndIf>> <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Whatever you think. I love her. <<@葉宜樺動搖覺得主角可以真的跟芳在交往>> Eva Yeh: ... Thought: She's hesitating... Eva Yeh: Tell me her birthday.;<< Play (葉宜樺, MBU_葉宜樺_側坐低頭返回) >> Eva Yeh: I'm giving you this one chance. Not everyone in the company knows the supervisor's birthday. Eva Yeh: Prove it.;<< Play (葉宜樺, MBU_葉宜樺_側坐前傾) >> Eva Yeh: Don't even try to lie. I have access to her personal profile. //之前有提過幾次，她提到生日是因為她不喜歡被記錄生日，還曬了一下恩愛，說只有我愛的人我才會告訴她生日喔) <<#Simple(99999)>> ->8-Apr Thought: What!? That's incorrect! Eva Yeh: This is a waste of time. Why did I bother...;<< Play (葉宜樺, MBU_葉宜樺_側坐前傾返回) >> ->27-Oct Eva Yeh: ... Eva Yeh: You... Eva Yeh: Correct.;<< Play (葉宜樺, MBU_葉宜樺_側坐前傾返回) >> Eva Yeh: This is incredible...;<< Play (葉宜樺, MBU_葉宜樺_側坐低頭) >> Eva Yeh: Do coincidences like this ever happen in real life? Eva Yeh: *Deep breath* Eva Yeh: OK, I'm betting on you.;<< Play (葉宜樺, MBU_葉宜樺_側坐低頭返回) >> <> <<#GoTo(@宜樺開始說明阻止程芳教硬碟作戰)>> ->7-Mar ->20-Oct Thought: What!? That's incorrect! Eva Yeh: This is a waste of time. Why did I bother...;<< Play (葉宜樺, MBU_葉宜樺_側坐前傾返回) >> <<#EndSimple>> Eva Yeh: You're dismissed. <<#Simple(6)>> ->Wait! I made a mistake. Eva Yeh: No. I made a mistake.;<< Play (葉宜樺, MBU_葉宜樺_側坐低頭) >> Eva Yeh: I shouldn't have asked in the first place.;<< Play (葉宜樺, MBU_葉宜樺_側坐低頭返回) >> ->... <<#EndSimple>> ->You don't know me. Eva Yeh: Right...;<< Play (葉宜樺, MBU_葉宜樺_側坐低頭) >> Eva Yeh: I don't know you. Eva Yeh: Why should I trust a total stranger? <<#Simple(6)>> ->Trust or not, I'm good either way. But I care about Fran. <<#GoTo(@葉宜樺動搖覺得主角可以真的跟芳在交往)>> ->You self-righteous hypocrite. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Eva Yeh: You're dismissed.;<< Play (葉宜樺, MBU_葉宜樺_側坐低頭返回) >> Thought: Damn... <<#End>> ->... <<#EndSimple>> ->... <<#EndSimple>> <<#End>>

title: 葉宜樺開始說明阻止程芳
body: <<@宜樺開始說明阻止程芳教硬碟作戰>> Eva Yeh: I'm investigating a corruption case within Vision.;<> <<#Simple(6)>> ->On your own?;<> Eva Yeh: ... Eva Yeh: Yes. Thought: Did she hesitate for a brief moment...? ->... <<#EndSimple>> Eva Yeh: I can't disclose too much, but something bad is happening in Vision.;<> <<#Simple(8)>> ->What kind of something? Eva Yeh: I said I can't disclose too much.;<> Eva Yeh: This is for your own good. Eva Yeh: Knowing too much will only bring more trouble. Eva Yeh: We're running out of time. Let me continue.;<> ->How am I supposed to trust you when you're vague like that? Eva Yeh: You have to, like how I decided to trust you. Eva Yeh: We are both running out of options. <<#Simple(12)>> ->You're running out of options, I'm not. ->If you trust me, you might as well go all the way. Eva Yeh: Sorry, I can't tell you about the details. This is my bottom line.;<> Eva Yeh: You will have to help me without questioning. Thought: About that...;<>;<> Eva Yeh: Listen. This is for your own good.;<> Eva Yeh: Knowing too much will only bring more trouble. Eva Yeh: We're running out of time. Let me continue.;<>;<> ->OK. Please continue. ->... <<#EndSimple>> ->... <<#EndSimple>> Eva Yeh: I acquired certain records involving senior executives of Vision.;<> Eva Yeh: Agents from the IIB found their way here before I had a chance to examine the content. <<#Simple(8)>> ->How did they know you have it? Eva Yeh: They... Eva Yeh: I think I accidentally triggered alarms. They must have identified me through the surveillance network. ->How did you acquire it? Eva Yeh: That is not important. Eva Yeh: The only thing you need to know is that I triggered alarms in the process. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Eva Yeh: They're not 100% sure yet. But as you just saw, I am the prime suspect.;<> Eva Yeh: To buy myself some time, I sent out 14 capsules in a flurry, hoping to distract them. Eva Yeh: But I didn't expect them to be so fast. Eva Yeh: Out of the 14 capsules, the one that really matters was sent to the supervisor's office, in the name of monthly report.;<> //知道是女友 <<#If($AYiKnowFangIsGirlfriend=true)>> Eva Yeh: Your girlfriend's office. <<#EndIf>> <<#Simple(8)>> ->Is she collaborating with you? ->Is she aware of this? Eva Yeh: No. She doesn't know anything. <<#If($AYiKnowFangIsGirlfriend=true)>> Eva Yeh: Rest assured, she's not hiding anything from you. Thought: ... <<#EndIf>> ->... <<#EndSimple>> Eva Yeh: I sent the documents, on a hard drive, to her office only to buy some time.;<> Eva Yeh: Ms. Cheng is not at work right now. The IIB can't search a farm supervisor's office without consent or warrant.;<> Eva Yeh: Ideally, I should have time to contact her and retrieve the hard drive. Thought: She wants to drag Fran into this?;<> <<#Simple(8)>> ->You plan to drag Fran into your investigation? //如果不是壞路線。所以不知道成芳跟主角的關係。 <<#If($AYiKnowFangIsGirlfriend=false)>> Eva Yeh: "Fran"? Thought: Damn, I let slip!;<> Eva Yeh: Are you that close with Ms. Cheng? Eva Yeh: ...!;<> Eva Yeh: Are you her boyfriend? I heard rumors. Eva Yeh: They say Ms. Cheng is dating someone, but she keeps private matters secret. Eva Yeh: Now I see why you're so eager to be involved—you want to help her. Eva Yeh: You must be the rumored boyfriend, then.;<> <<#Simple(99999)>> ->I am. Eva Yeh: That explains everything.;<> Eva Yeh: Better still, I have a good reason to trust you. Eva Yeh: Obviously, you don't want to put your girlfriend under risk. <<#Simple(6)>> ->But you have already put her under risk. <<#GoTo(@妳讓程芳陷入危險欸我傻報眼)>> ->... <<#EndSimple>> ->No, I'm not. ->We are friends, but not that kind. Eva Yeh: Still, you're calling her "Fran"...;<> Eva Yeh: ... Eva Yeh: Alright. Let's not dwell on that. <<#EndSimple>> Eva Yeh: What's done is done. The hard drive is in her office. We must deal with this fact. <<#GoTo(@跳到但是我沒想到督導她今天會在。)>> <<#EndIf>> Eva Yeh: No, that is not part of my plan... Thought: She's not very certain... ->... <<#EndSimple>> <<@跳到但是我沒想到督導她今天會在。>> Eva Yeh: I didn't expect Ms. Cheng to be here today.;<> Eva Yeh: So much for buying time. Thought: Wait, if they find the hard drive in Fran's office... Thought: That will make Fran a suspect, too!! Eva Yeh: Lesson learned... Don't trust plans.;<> <<#Simple(10)>> ->Does that mean she's in danger? Eva Yeh: ...;<> Eva Yeh: I'd be lying if I said no. Thought: Damn this woman...;<> ->You're dragging her into this! <<@妳讓程芳陷入危險欸我傻報眼>> Eva Yeh: I wouldn't if I had other choices.;<> Eva Yeh: If we both end up busted, I will tell them I planned it all. <> <<#Simple(8)>> ->As if they'd believe you! Eva Yeh: ...You're correct.;<> Eva Yeh: I apologize. Eva Yeh: But I did what has to be done. There's no going back.;<> ->You'd better. Eva Yeh: I promise. ->... <<#EndSimple>> ->You did it on purpose! Eva Yeh: I simply improvised, although I suppose you have no reason to believe me. Thought: She sounds earnest, though... ->... <<#EndSimple>> Eva Yeh: Because of my failure, Ms. Cheng is now under risk.;<> Eva Yeh: I tried to do the right thing, but involuntarily hurt people in the process. Eva Yeh: I take full responsibility for everything that happened. Thought: It's too late to talk about responsibilities.;<> Thought: At this stage, things are way beyond your control. <<#Simple(6)>> ->Why did you involve her in the first place? Eva Yeh: The matter I'm investigating outweighs the safety of any of us.;<> Eva Yeh: If given a chance to start over, I'd still send the hard drive to Ms. Cheng. <<#Simple(8)>> ->Don't make decisions for others. Eva Yeh: The situation calls for it. Eva Yeh: I'm deeply sorry for any collateral damage. Eva Yeh: Still, I have no regret. Thought: She's not listening at all. ->You'd better be sure that this is worth it. Eva Yeh: Trust me, I'm not exaggerating. Eva Yeh: It involves the safety of many, many people... Thought: I don't think she's lying... ->... <<#EndSimple>> ->...;<< PlayUntil(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_側站隱忍返回)>> <<#EndSimple>> Eva Yeh: I need you to intercept Ms. Cheng right now, Mr. Dai.;<> <<#If($AYiKnowFangIsGirlfriend=false)>> Eva Yeh: Tell her I sent you. Get the hard drive back. Say it's sent by accident. <<#EndIf>> Eva Yeh: Find her before the IIB does. Eva Yeh: We're all doomed if she hands it over to HQ. <<#Simple(10)>> ->Why don't you go yourself? Eva Yeh: That would appear too suspicious.;<> <<#Simple(6)>> ->You're the prime suspect anyway. Eva Yeh: No. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Eva Yeh: I can't be caught. Eva Yeh: If they catch me again, I'll run out of excuses this time.;<> <<#Simple(8)>> ->It's your problem. Eva Yeh: I know.;<> Eva Yeh: In case you didn't notice, I'm asking you for a favor. Thought: Hell of a way to ask for a favor...;<> ->What if she has already seen the content of the hard drive? Eva Yeh: Ms. Cheng? <<#GoTo(@我倒希望他看呢阿姨說)>> ->... <<#EndSimple>> ->What if she has already seen the content of the hard drive? <<@我倒希望他看呢阿姨說>> Eva Yeh: ... Eva Yeh: In a sense, I hope she'd have done that...;<> Thought: ...What? Eva Yeh: There's another reason why I sent the hard drive to Ms. Cheng.;<> Eva Yeh: I know she is a decent person who really cares about what's happening in this company.;<> Eva Yeh: Once given the knowledge, she will take action. Thought: Fuck...;<> Eva Yeh: If I'm caught, maybe... Eva Yeh: Maybe she will pick up the investigation.;<> Thought: I knew it! She planned to use Fran!;<> <<#Simple(12)>> ->You said you're sorry for collateral damage! Eva Yeh: I know what I said!;<> Eva Yeh: But this has to do with the fate of many. More than you can imagine. Thought: I've had enough... <<#GoTo(@我只是想做對的事呀，我沒想害人。)>> ->What do you plan to have her do? Eva Yeh: Continue my investigation.;<> Eva Yeh: This farm, or rather, Vision as a whole... Eva Yeh: They are keeping a secret, one that has far-reaching consequences. Eva Yeh: The reason for such secrecy is that many could die because of it.;<> <<#Simple(10)>> ->So you wish she could help you, of her own accord. <<#GoTo(@所以你希望她看到，然後幫你。)>> ->Selfish. Eva Yeh: Selfish!?;<> Eva Yeh: I'm doing this for the greater good, with no personal gains at all! Eva Yeh: I just...;<> <<@我只是想做對的事呀，我沒想害人。>> Eva Yeh: ... Eva Yeh: I just wanted to do the right thing. Without hurting others, preferably.;<> Eva Yeh: I know others could be dragged into it! I do!;<> Eva Yeh: But if Ms. Cheng decides to take any action, it's out of her own free will. Eva Yeh: This is how I see the situation.;<> Thought: No, I can't let Fran see the documents. Thought: Once that happens, she won't be able to stop herself...;<> ->... <<#EndSimple>> ->So you wish she could help you, of her own accord. <<@所以你希望她看到，然後幫你。>> Eva Yeh: I was not...;<> Eva Yeh: ... Eva Yeh: Right. That was the plan. Eva Yeh: I knew I can't see it to the end, so... Thought: Absolutely no way.;<> <<#GoTo(@我只是想做對的事呀，我沒想害人。)>> <<#EndSimple>> ->... <<#EndSimple>> Eva Yeh: Listen. I don't mind if they catch me.;<> Eva Yeh: But this investigation must go on. Eva Yeh: Now I must retrieve the hard drive, at all costs.;<> Eva Yeh: I have located Ms. Cheng. She's in the entrance lobby on the ground floor.;<> <<#Simple(8)>> ->How do you know? Eva Yeh: I have my ways. ->I'm not authorized to go there. Eva Yeh: Leave that to me. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Eva Yeh: Move, now. I'm granting you access to the entrance lobby right away.;<> Eva Yeh: Get a hold of the hard drive before the IIB does. <<#Simple(8)>> ->What if they beat me to it? Thought: She's frozen... Eva Yeh: ...;<> Eva Yeh: Then we are fucked. <> ->Is it really OK to go up to the ground floor in this uniform? Eva Yeh: Then change into your own clothes. Eva Yeh: ...No, forget about it. That would make you more suspicious.;<> Eva Yeh: The uniform marks you as part of the Downstairs staff, but a Vision employee, nonetheless. <> ->... <<#EndSimple>> Eva Yeh: Let me stress this again... Eva Yeh: If Ms. Cheng hands the hard drive over to the IIB... Eva Yeh: They will see her as my collaborator. You don't want that to happen. Thought: You old weasel... <<#Simple(8)>> ->Damn. You planned for everything, huh. Eva Yeh: ... ->Or they may let her go, if they catch you. Eva Yeh: Wishful thinking. Eva Yeh: The way the IIB does things, all suspects are presumed guilty until proven otherwise. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Eva Yeh: Now, move. I'm counting on you. <>;//阿姨有告訴主角真相 <<#End>>

title: 講完硬碟後主角思考+芳電話
body: <<#If($AYiToldMCEverything=true)>> Thought: What now...?;<< Play (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_工廠_側站隱忍) >> Thought: Eva Yeh said it's for the greater good, although I have more than enough reasons to doubt... Thought: She could totally be doing it for the money. Thought: Whichever case, I must get in touch with Fran now.;<< Play (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_工廠_側站隱忍返回) >> <<#EndIf>> <<#If($AYiToldMCEverything=false)>> Thought: What now...?;<< Play (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_工廠_側站隱忍) >> Thought: I'm positive that Eva Yeh did something bad. Thought: Whichever case, I must get in touch with Fran now.;<< Play (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_工廠_側站隱忍返回) >> <<#EndIf>> << PlayUntil (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_工廠_側站通話) >> Frances Cheng(c): Hello? Jason? Frances Cheng(c): I'm here in the entrance lobby. Come up! I'll grant you access. <<#If($AYiToldMCEverything=true)>> Frances Cheng(c): Huh? It says someone else already granted you access? <<#EndIf>> <<#Simple(12)>> ->Did you receive any hard drive from Ms. Yeh, Fran? ->Can anybody hear us? ->I'm going up right away. Don't move. ->... <<#EndSimple>> Frances Cheng(c): Hm? Frances Cheng(c): Excuse me, what? Thought: She's talking to someone else on the other end... Frances Cheng(c): Ah, yes! Frances Cheng(c): Yes. I'll hang up now. Frances Cheng(c): Sorry, J. I need to take care of something. Frances Cheng(c): Will call you later. <> Thought: Shit!;<< Play (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_工廠_側站通話返回) >> Thought: I must find her, right now. <<#End>>

Yuna Hsu: Because I...

<<#End>>

title: 阿緯約頂樓
body: Wayne Zheng: Let me ask you something.;<< Play (鄭緯, MBU_鄭緯_背坐右看) >> Wayne Zheng: Justin told me about what happened at Ops earlier today. Wayne Zheng: ... Wayne Zheng: Do you see it as your fault, Jason?;<< Play (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_工廠_簽約側坐低頭) >> Thought: ...See what? Thought: Ah, he's talking about the man I racked up... <<#Simple(99999)>> ->I don't think it's my fault. Wayne Zheng: Do you really believe so? <<#Simple(99999)>> ->What do you mean? Wayne Zheng: Sometimes we know things are not our fault, but still blame ourselves for them.;<< PlayUntil (鄭緯, MBU_鄭緯_背坐右看低頭) >> Wayne Zheng: I just want to make sure if you're feeling alright.;<< Play (鄭緯, MBU_鄭緯_背坐右看低頭返回) >> <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Totally. Thank you. Wayne Zheng: Good. ->Not exactly alright. <<#GoTo(@阿瑋說明不要怪自己幫不了人押)>> <<#EndSimple>> ->Really. Wayne Zheng: Good. <<#EndSimple>> ->More or less. <<@阿瑋說明不要怪自己幫不了人押>> Wayne Zheng: ... Wayne Zheng: By now, you have seen a lot. Wayne Zheng: The flop farming industry deals with the ugliest side of society.;<< Play (鄭緯, MBU_鄭緯_背坐右看返回) >> Wayne Zheng: We try to help people, but sometimes things just get out of control...;<< Play (鄭緯, MBU_鄭緯_背坐低頭) >>;<< Play (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_工廠_簽約側坐低頭返回) >> Wayne Zheng: Let's make it clear. We did not create any of these problems. Wayne Zheng: We are doing what we can to fix the problems. If anyone gets hurt in the process, it's not our fault.;<< Play (鄭緯, MBU_鄭緯_背坐低頭返回) >>;<< Play (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_工廠_簽約側坐低頭) >> Wayne Zheng: To keep doing this job, you need to find peace of mind.;<< Play (鄭緯, MBU_鄭緯_背坐右看) >> <<#Simple(12)>> ->Thank you. ->I'll think about it. Wayne Zheng: Right. You have done great. ->I beg to differ. Wayne Zheng: Okay...;<< Play (鄭緯, MBU_鄭緯_背坐右看低頭) >> Wayne Zheng: Don't let me override your own belief. Wayne Zheng: All I want is to help you find peace of mind.;<< Play (鄭緯, MBU_鄭緯_背坐右看低頭返回) >> ->... <<#EndSimple>> <<#EndSimple>> Wayne Zheng: Remember. If anyone is to blame, it's Ops, not you.;<< Play (鄭緯, MBU_鄭緯_背坐右看返回) >> Thought: ...;<< Play (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_工廠_簽約側坐低頭返回) >> Wayne Zheng: Hmm, enough about that. Wayne Zheng: I need to discuss some sensitive matters with you.;<< Play (鄭緯, MBU_鄭緯_背坐右看) >> Thought: Sensitive? <<#Simple(6)>> ->About Ms. Yeh? Wayne Zheng: No, although I am curious. Do you know what's happening? <<#Simple(6)>> ->She stole confidential documents.;///////阿瑋知道阿姨幹了啥了，不過不跟他講應該也會自己知道吧 Thought: Hold on. Should I talk about it...? Wayne Zheng: How did you know!?;<< Play (鄭緯, MBU_鄭緯_背坐右看前傾) >> <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Just a random guess.;<> Wayne Zheng: Huh, almost believed you... Wayne Zheng: I don't think she's the type.;<< Play (鄭緯, MBU_鄭緯_背坐右看前傾返回) >> ->She needs somebody to help cover it up. That somebody is me.;<>;///////阿瑋知道阿姨找主角幫忙/////////////////////////////////////////////////////////// Wayne Zheng: What? For real? Wayne Zheng: Why you, of all people? She didn't know you until yesterday. <<#Simple(99999)>> ->She needed someone and I happened to be there. ->No idea. Maybe I look like the trustworthy type. Wayne Zheng: I'm having a hard time believing it...;<< Play (鄭緯, MBU_鄭緯_背坐右看前傾返回) >> Wayne Zheng: Ms. Yeh? Betraying the company for money?;<< PlayUntil (鄭緯, MBU_鄭緯_背坐右看抬頭) >> Wayne Zheng: There must be a better reason.;<< Play (鄭緯, MBU_鄭緯_背坐右看抬頭返回) >> <<#Simple(8)>> ->Maybe you don't know her well enough. Wayne Zheng: I hope that's not the case... Wayne Zheng: It's not just me. Everyone here trust her. ->She said she's investigating some sort of conspiracy within the company. Thought: Is it really OK to tell him so much...? Wayne Zheng: That's something I can imagine her doing... ->... <<#EndSimple>> <<#EndSimple>> <<#EndSimple>> Wayne Zheng: Anyway. Wayne Zheng: It changes everything, if she's found guilty at the end of the day.;<< Play (鄭緯, MBU_鄭緯_背坐右看低頭) >> Wayne Zheng: I need to think this over... Wayne Zheng: Now we need to talk even more. However...;<< Play (鄭緯, MBU_鄭緯_背坐右看低頭返回) >> ->... <<#EndSimple>> ->... <<#EndSimple>> //阿瑋看看周遭 Wayne Zheng: This is not the ideal place. How about we go to the roof? Wayne Zheng: It should be deserted at this hour. I'll buy you coffee. Wayne Zheng: What do you say? <> Jeff Wu: Wayne! Help!;//曉風跑過來;<< Play (鄭緯, MBU_鄭緯_背坐右看返回) >> Jeff Wu: I'm getting a ton of complaints! Can't handle them on my own!;<< Play (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_工廠_簽約側坐看內) >> Wayne Zheng: You're kidding me.;<< Play (鄭緯, MBU_鄭緯_背坐起身) >> Jeff Wu: I'm covering for Lawrence. He's not here! Jeff Wu: Called him, but he's not picking up! Wayne Zheng: OK. I'm coming!;<> Wayne Zheng: Sorry, Jason. Will be back soon.;<< Play (鄭緯, MBU_鄭緯_背站右看) >>;<< Play (戴士傑, MBU_戴士傑_工廠_簽約側坐看內返回) >> Wayne Zheng: Could you wait here for a moment? <<#Simple(99999)>> ->Sure. ->Don't leave me hanging, man? ->How long is it gonna take? <<#EndSimple>> Wayne Zheng: That's it! Will be back really soon!;<> Thought: I guess he didn't hear me... Thought: Typical Wayne, doing everyone's work while he should be leading... <<#End>>

title: 阿緯買完咖啡回來
body:
//閒置一段時間
Thought: I wonder how Fran is doing...
Thought: Should have stopped her, by force if necessary...
Thought: Why am I acting so out of character...?
//阿偉拿著咖啡跑回來
<<Set($DLState,阿緯買完咖啡開跑回來)>>
Wayne Zheng: Hey! Here's coffee!
<<#End>>

title: 頂樓阿緯收尾
body:
//突然幾架救護無人家飛過
Wayne Zheng: Wow!
Wayne Zheng: That was close.
Wayne Zheng: Those are Vision's ambulance drones...
Wayne Zheng: Flying toward...the HQ building?
Wayne Zheng: Something happened there?
Thought: ...
Wayne Zheng: OK. I should get back to work.;<<Play(鄭緯,MBU_鄭緯_頂樓右看)>>
Wayne Zheng: Don't forget to clock out, Jason.;<<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_頂樓左看)>>
<<#Simple(8)>>
->Manual clock out, again?
    Wayne Zheng: Your field practice was interrupted down there, no?
    Wayne Zheng: You need to close the task. Just manually clock out on your computer will do.
    <<#Simple(8)>>
    ->Can't they automate this?
        Wayne Zheng: Yeah, I guess they are not very motivated to fix the loophole.
        Wayne Zheng: Silencio is totally capable.
    ->Acknowledged.
    ->...
    <<#EndSimple>>
->Acknowledged. On my computer?
    Wayne Zheng: Right.
->...
<<#EndSimple>>
Wayne Zheng: Shall we go down together?
Thought: I could use some more quiet time...
<<#Simple(99999)>>
->I'll enjoy the breeze a bit more.
    Wayne Zheng: Sure thing. See you later.
    <<#Simple(99999)>>
    ->See you.
    ->...
    <<#EndSimple>>
    <<Set($DLState,決定不跟阿緯一起回去)>>
    Thought: It's been a very, very long day...
    Thought: Everything that happened, at Ops, about Ms. Yeh, and what Wayne said...;<<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_頂樓左看返回)>>
    Thought: I wonder how Fran is doing. She should be calling me now.
    Thought: We can still make time for a date.
    Thought: The mood, though...
    Thought: I guess it's not the best day to propose...;<<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_頂樓低頭)>>
    Thought: ...
    Thought: Fran and I, have we been together for that long...?
    Thought: There's no point dwelling over it. Life goes on.
    Thought: One tomorrow after another.
    Thought: ...

title: 調查物件:蔓生
孫茹拜託幫修東西
body:
Rose Sun: Damn it!
Rose Sun: Why are the lights flickering again!?;<<Play(吳俊恩,MBU_吳俊恩_背站右看)>>

//攝影機平移


Rose Sun: Hey!;<<Set($DLState,孫茹朝兩人抱怨)>>
Rose Sun: Which of you forgot to push the circuit board all the way in?
Soma Wan: Um, not me?;<<Play(張參,MBU_張參_側站看外)>>
Nobo Dee: What? Not me, either!;<<Play(李賜,MBU_李賜_側站否認)>>
Rose Sun: Then which of you is gonna fix it?
Soma Wan: Not me. A ride to the Cellar takes forever.;<<Play(張參,MBU_張參_側站看外返回)>>;<<Play(李賜,MBU_李賜_側站否認返回)>>
Nobo Dee: Can't we let them flicker? They are not causing any trouble.
Rose Sun: Not causing any trouble, until they start to!
Rose Sun: Justin!;<<Set($DLState,張李兩人走進建修組)>>;//兩人走掉
Justin Wu: Yes?
Rose Sun: You're going down? Could you give the circuit board a shove?;<<Play(孫茹,MBU_孫茹_側站插腰比一)>>
Justin Wu: Like last time?
Rose Sun: Yes, exactly. Thank you!;<<Play(孫茹,MBU_孫茹_側站插腰比一返回)>>
Justin Wu: You're welcome.
Rose Sun: Great. You did me one huge favor.
Rose Sun: Hey, why are you up here? Thought you should be on duty.
Justin Wu: Taking a new recruitment to Ops for field practice.
//if不認識孫茹
<<#If($KnownSunRuSinceDay1=false)>>
    Rose Sun: New recruitment? That's rare.
    Rose Sun: Hi. Nice to meet you. Rose Sun. You're?
    <<#Simple(99999)>>
    ->New recruitment. Nice to meet you.
        Rose Sun: Haha! You're funny. What's your name?;<<Play(孫茹,MBU_孫茹_側站插腰抓頭)>>
        Justin Wu: This is Jason Dai.
        Rose Sun: I see!;<<Play(孫茹,MBU_孫茹_側站插腰抓頭返回)>>
    ->Jason Dai. Nice to meet you.
        Rose Sun: Welcome to Silencio!;<<Play(孫茹,MBU_孫茹_側站插腰抬手)>>
        Justin Wu: Don't welcome just yet. He's still on probation.
        Rose Sun: Same old blunt Justin, ha!;<<Play(孫茹,MBU_孫茹_側站插腰抬手返回)>>
    <<#EndSimple>>
    Rose Sun: Anyway, nice knowing you, Jason.
<<#EndIf>>

//if已經認識孫茹
<<#If($KnownSunRuSinceDay1=true)>>
    Rose Sun: Oh, Jason, it's you!
    Justin Wu: Have you met?
    Rose Sun: Yeah, at Screening yesterday.;<<Play(孫茹,MBU_孫茹_側站插腰點頭)>>
    Justin Wu: I see.
<<#EndIf>>


Rose Sun: Can I trust you with the circuit board, Justin?
Justin Wu: No problem.
Rose Sun: Thank gods. What would I do without you Ops folks?;<<Play(孫茹,MBU_孫茹_側站插腰返回)>>
Rose Sun: All we have is a bunch of big babies.
Rose Sun: *Sigh*;<<Set($DLState,孫茹拜託完俊恩走掉)>>;<< Play (吳俊恩, MBU_吳俊恩_背站右看返回) >>;//孫茹走調
<<#Simple(6)>>
->What's the circuit board that she talked about?
    Justin Wu: It's nothing. I'll take care of it on the way down.
    Justin Wu: Won't take long. Promise.
->...
<<#EndSimple>>
Justin Wu: Ha, the elevator.
Thought: Finally...;<<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_背站右看返回)>>
//門打開，很多人出來走掉。


//主角跟俊恩進電梯，沒別人。

Justin Wu: We are lucky to have the ride all to ourselves.;<<Play(吳俊恩,MBU_吳俊恩_背站左看)>>
Justin Wu: Sometimes the Logistics people, like them back there, try to cram in.;<<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_背站右看)>>

<<PlayUntil(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_背站右看返回)>>
<<#End>>

title: 頂樓俊恩收尾
body:
//突然幾架救護無人家飛過
Justin Wu: Wow, that was flying really low.
Justin Wu: Those are Vision's ambulance drones...
Justin Wu: Flying toward...the HQ building?
Justin Wu: Something happened there?
Thought: ...;<<Play(吳俊恩,MBU_吳俊恩_頂樓低頭)>>

<<#Simple(8)>>
->I still don't understand why you want to talk to me about this.
    Justin Wu: I need fresh opinions.;<<Play(吳俊恩,MBU_吳俊恩_頂樓右看低頭)>>
    Justin Wu: Opinions from an outsider with no stake in Silencio.
    Thought: But I don't think you're really listening to me...;<<Play(吳俊恩,MBU_吳俊恩_頂樓右看低頭返回)>>
    <<#Simple(8)>>
    ->Outsider?
        Justin Wu: Sorry, I don't mean anything by it.
        Justin Wu: It's just that you've only been here for two days.
        Justin Wu: You're more likely to see things more objectively than the rest of us.
    ->I don't think you really care that much about my opinion.
        Justin Wu: ...
        Justin Wu: Probably.
        Justin Wu: Maybe I just want to hear you say what I'd like to hear.
        Justin Wu: Sorry.
    ->...
    <<#EndSimple>>
->It's OK.
->...
<<#EndSimple>>
Justin Wu: ...
Justin Wu: Thank you for listening.
Justin Wu: I'm back to work, then.

<<#Simple(6)>>
->Bye.
->...
<<#EndSimple>>

<<#EndSimple>>

->...
<<#EndSimple>>
<<CloseCommunicator()>>

Thought: We can still make time for a date.
Thought: The mood, though...
Thought: I guess it's not the best day to propose...
Thought: ...
Thought: Fran and I, have we been together for that long...?
Thought: There's no point dwelling over it. Life goes on.
Thought: One tomorrow after another.
Thought: ...
Thought: ...;<<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_頂樓低頭返回)>>

title: 找到林靜慧跟何歆翊
body:
//林靜慧沮喪坐椅子抱頭，何歆翊蹲在她旁邊安慰她

Cynthia Ho: Oh, hi.;<<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_側站低頭)>>;<<Play(林靜慧,MBU_林靜慧_簽約正坐哭哭返回)>>

<<#If($AskWhereIsHeShinYeeInpolite=0)>>

<<#EndIf>>

Cynthia Ho: Have I met you somewhere before?;<<Play(林靜慧,MBU_林靜慧_簽約正坐右看)>>
Cynthia Ho: You're Jay...
Cynthia Ho: Jason Dai?;<<Play(何歆翊,MBU_何歆翊_簽約正坐右看歪頭返回)>>
<<#Simple(99999)>>
->The very same.
    //
->Glad you remembered me.
    Cynthia Ho: Glad you remembered me, too.
->Have we met?
    Cynthia Ho: We did! When Wayne took you to the consultation lobby, remember?
<<#EndSimple>> 
Thought: Huh? Is Jade crying?
Jade Lin: You're…the one who took care of the lunatic yesterday?;<<Play(林靜慧,MBU_林靜慧_簽約正坐右看緊張)>>
<<#Simple(99999)>>
->Yes.
    Jade Lin: I was scared to death back there!

    Thought: Wild mood swings.;<<Play(林靜慧,MBU_林靜慧_簽約正坐右看緊張返回)>>
->And you're the girl who ran into the contract room crying.
    Jade Lin: Y-yes.;<<Play(林靜慧,MBU_林靜慧_簽約正坐右看緊張返回)>>
    Thought: An awkward smile.
<<#EndSimple>>
Cynthia Ho: Can I help you?
<<#Simple(99999)>>
->George Liao is looking for you.
    Cynthia Ho: Yeah.
->What are you doing here?
    Cynthia Ho: About that...
<<#EndSimple>>
Cynthia Ho: Could you please just tell Mr. Liao that you can't find us?
<<#Simple(99999)>>
->You know he's looking?
->Why?
<<#EndSimple>>
Cynthia Ho: It's Jade. She...
Jade Lin: I lost a very important hard drive...;<<Play(林靜慧,MBU_林靜慧_簽約正坐右看低頭)>>
Jade Lin: HQ asked for a physical copy, because what's inside is super confidential.
Jade Lin: Mr. Liao needs it ready today, but... 
Jade Lin: I can't find it anywhere. Must have dropped it yesterday during the attack.;<<Play(林靜慧,MBU_林靜慧_簽約正坐右看低頭返回)>>
<<#Simple(8)>>
->Did you search this corridor?
    Cynthia Ho: We searched everywhere.
->Just tell him. You don't have any other option.
    Jade Lin: ...
->...
<<#EndSimple>>
Cynthia Ho: Jade has got too many warnings recently.;<<Play(何歆翊,MBU_何歆翊_簽約正坐右看抬手)>>
Cynthia Ho: This time she could be fired.
Jade Lin: I can't. Can't afford to lose this job...;<<Play(林靜慧,MBU_林靜慧_簽約正坐右看返回)>>
Cynthia Ho: ...That is the situation.;<<Play(何歆翊,MBU_何歆翊_簽約正坐右看抬手返回)>>
<<#Simple(8)>>
->But sitting here is not a solution.
    Jade Lin: But I can't...
->Maybe you could ask George nicely?
    Cynthia Ho: It won't help. Mr. Liao won't listen.
    Thought: Yeah. He's your typical stubborn old geezer.
->...
<<#EndSimple>>
Cynthia Ho: ...;<<Play(何歆翊,MBU_何歆翊_簽約正坐右看低頭)>>
Cynthia Ho: The worst part is...;<<Play(林靜慧,MBU_林靜慧_簽約正坐左看)>>
Cynthia Ho: HQ is asking for the hard drive. Mr. Liao can't help us even if he wants to.;<<Play(何歆翊,MBU_何歆翊_簽約正坐右看低頭返回)>>
Cynthia Ho: If he tries, I guess he'd get punished, too.;<<Play(林靜慧,MBU_林靜慧_簽約正坐左看返回)>>
Jade Lin: Why is it always me?
Jade Lin: First the lunatic, then this...;<<Play(林靜慧,MBU_林靜慧_簽約正坐哭哭)>>
Cynthia Ho: I was thinking that the security team must have searched this corridor thoroughly yesterday, after the incident.
<<#Simple(8)>>
->What did they say?
    //    
->But they found nothing?
    Cynthia Ho: I don't know yet.
->...
<<#EndSimple>>
Cynthia Ho: We have sent them messages through the company's communication system.;<<Play(何歆翊,MBU_何歆翊_簽約正坐右看返回)>>
Cynthia Ho: There's no response yet.
Cynthia Ho: We are trying to buy some extra time and wait for them to respond.;<<Play(何歆翊,MBU_何歆翊_簽約正坐右看)>>
Cynthia Ho: Cross-division communication takes time, you know...
Cynthia Ho: ...;<<Play(何歆翊,MBU_何歆翊_簽約正坐右看低頭)>>
Cynthia Ho: It would be great if we could contact the security officer on duty yesterday...;<<Play(林靜慧,MBU_林靜慧_簽約正坐哭哭返回)>>
Thought: A tricky situation...
Cynthia Ho: Now you know everything, Jason...;<<Play(何歆翊,MBU_何歆翊_簽約正坐右看低頭返回)>>
Cynthia Ho: Would you like to help us buy some time?;<<Play(林靜慧,MBU_林靜慧_簽約正坐右看)>>
Cynthia Ho: Just tell Mr. Liao that you can't find us.;<<Play(何歆翊,MBU_何歆翊_簽約正坐右看前傾)>>
Jade Lin: Please! I'm counting on you!;<<Play(林靜慧,MBU_林靜慧_簽約正坐右看緊張)>>
Thought: ...I shouldn't get involved.
<<#Simple(99999)>>
->OK. I'll tell him that.
    <<Play(何歆翊,MBU_何歆翊_簽約正坐右看前傾返回)>>
    <<@搭應不說林靜慧搞丟東西>>
    Jade Lin: Thank you! You're my savior!;<<Play(林靜慧,MBU_林靜慧_簽約正坐右看緊張返回)>>
    Cynthia Ho: Thanks, Jason.
    <<#Simple(8)>>
    ->It's nothing.
        //
    ->You'd better hurry up, though.
        Cynthia Ho: We will.
    ->...
    <<#EndSimple>>
    Thought: This is settled for now.;<<Play(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_側站低頭返回)>>;<<Play(林靜慧,MBU_林靜慧_簽約正坐右看轉左)>>
    <<Set($LieYouDontFindLin,1)>>
    <<#End>>
->No. I have to tell him the truth.
    Jade Lin: Please, Mr. Dai. If he tells HQ that I lost the drive, I'll be fired!;<<Play(何歆翊,MBU_何歆翊_簽約正坐右看前傾返回)>>
    Jade Lin: Just give me a little bit more time!
    <<#Simple(99999)>>
    ->Sorry, no can do.
        Jade Lin: B-but...;<<Play(林靜慧,MBU_林靜慧_簽約正坐右看緊張返回)>>
        Cynthia Ho: Enough, Jade.;<<Play(何歆翊,MBU_何歆翊_簽約正坐右看抬手)>>
        Cynthia Ho: He doesn't have a reason to get involved.;<<Play(林靜慧,MBU_林靜慧_簽約正坐右看轉左)>>
        Thought: Doesn't take an expert to tell she's not happy.;<<Play(何歆翊,MBU_何歆翊_簽約正坐右看抬手返回)>>
        Jade Lin: I know, but I really can't...;<<Play(林靜慧,MBU_林靜慧_簽約正坐左看返回)>>
        Cynthia Ho: I know. Let's think together. There must be a way.
        Cynthia Ho: Thank you, Jason. Go inform Mr. Liao.
        <<Set($LieYouDontFindLin,-1)>>;<<PlayUntil(戴士傑,MBU_戴士傑_工廠_側站低頭返回)>>
        <<#End>>
    ->OK. I'll tell him that.
        <<#GoTo(@搭應不說林靜慧搞丟東西)>>
    <<#EndSimple>>
<<#EndSimple>>
